*   **Arsenal of Destruction:** Wield over 50 weapons and armors, featuring a diverse array of special effects. **Unleash the power of flamethrowers, rocket launchers, plasma cannons, and the formidable powered Brawler armor.**
*   **Unpredictable Augmentations:** Randomized augmentation effects for both your equipment and your character ensure that no two playthroughs are ever the same, adding a layer of unique replayability.
*   **Master of Crafting:** Utilize a robust crafting system to forge special items from the salvaged remains of your defeated enemies.
*   **Vast Item Discovery:** Unearth over 100 items, ranging from familiar tools to ancient, exotic technologies that could turn the tide of battle.
*   **Enigmatic Environments:** Explore dozens of distinct room types, each filled with a host of exotic devices designed to aid – or perhaps impede – your progress.
*   **Uncover the Lore:** Discover and decipher hidden messages, unlock new crafting recipes, and piece together fragments of the compelling *Sword of the Stars* lore.
*   **Fiendish Fates:** Prepare for a multitude of deadly ends, including poisoning, disease, cunning traps, lethal radiation, gnawing starvation, and, of course, the ever-present threat of MONSTERS. As one developer noted, "The Suul'ka were masters of creating environments that were as hostile as they were technologically advanced."

**Nova-111: A Strategic Puzzle Adventure**

Discover **Nova-111**, a game that combines **strategic combat and puzzles** in a **surreal universe**. This unique experience blends **turn-based and real-time gameplay**. You will face **unique creatures** in a **bizarre setting**. To succeed, you must **gain new abilities** and **upgrade your ship**. Remember, **SCIENCE is your best weapon**.

Nova-111 offers **innovative gameplay** with a **fresh mix of turn-based and real-time mechanics**. This **unique system** requires **smart combat**, where **strategy beats brute force**. The game features **mind-bending puzzles** designed to **test your intellect**. Each planet is **beautifully made**, with **different enemies, areas, and strategic challenges**.

To beat these challenges, players can use **powerful abilities**:

*   **Special lasers**
*   **TIME-STOP**, which lets you **control time**

**Upgrading your ship is vital**. Collect **various upgrades and modules** to boost its power. The **dynamic soundtrack** adds to the experience, **changing with your play style** for **full immersion**. The development team includes **former PixelJunk creators**, and the project has **support from Indie Fund**. As one developer noted, "We aimed to make a game where players always find new ways to tackle challenges."

Rift Wizard is a **challenging retro fantasy roguelike** that puts players in the role of an immortal, amnesiac wizard. Your core objective is to **rebuild your spellbook and defeat your rival**. The game features 25 randomly generated levels, each offering procedurally crafted challenges designed to **test your strategic thinking and creativity**.

The game emphasizes **deep character progression** with a vast spell library, allowing players to design their wizard with a wide selection of spells and passive abilities. Rift Wizard offers **player-driven gameplay** with minimal randomness and significant player control, alongside diverse adversaries and demanding challenges, including **high difficulty with permadeath**. Players will also engage in **strategic resource management** and enjoy a **nostalgic aesthetic** with sharp 1990s RPG visuals.

Inspired by classics like Nethack and Dungeon Crawl Stone Soup, Rift Wizard offers a more strategic, combat-oriented experience, often feeling more like a tactical board game. The developer's vision is to **introduce innovation to the roguelike genre**, aiming to craft a profound, demanding game with **over a thousand hours of replayability**. The game is structured to support hundreds of distinct strategies, ensuring each playthrough presents a **new and captivating puzzle**. As one developer stated, "We aim to craft a profound, demanding game offering over a thousand hours of replayability." Ultimately, Rift Wizard inspires players to be **resourceful, creative, and intelligent**.

**"Living the Nightmare": A Roguelike Survival Challenge**

**"Living the Nightmare"** is a **horror roguelike survival game** where players seek vengeance. The core gameplay involves navigating a **changing woodland**, fighting enemies, collecting resources, and improving your character over many attempts. The main goal is to activate **six Carrion Shrines**, battle **shadowy foes**, and ultimately reclaim your life and **achieve revenge**. As the developers state, **"death is frequent and permanent,"** highlighting the game's difficulty.

This title combines **quick, turn-based strategy** on a hex grid with **procedural generation**, making every playthrough unique. Developed by a **small team**, it offers **lots of loot, diverse enemies, and a steep learning curve** that rewards **smart planning**. Despite its turn-based nature, the action feels **quick**, with your actions having immediate effects. While enemies might attack in groups, you have **ample time to plan your moves**. Failing means a **frustrating reset** with just one click.

Your journey involves:

*   **Scavenging for supplies**
*   **Staying alive**
*   **Improving your abilities**

Key elements of the game include:

*   **Gathering gear, ammo, and essential parts** from defeated enemies to upgrade your equipment.
*   Discovering and using over **70 different weapons, masks, and items**.
*   Personalizing your **"Faceless" character** with more than **40 unique skills** for varied playstyles.
*   Facing over **50 bosses and enemies** in a **constantly changing "Nightmare" environment** with multiple areas.
*   Learning the **complex attack patterns** of each enemy.

Designed for **easy access**, "Living the Nightmare" uses **simple, mouse-only controls**, letting you focus on **tough battles and survival**. Even picking up items is automated for a **smooth experience**. A short tutorial covers the basics before you dive into the main gameplay. The game follows the **"easy to learn, hard to master"** philosophy, with a retro guide available for those wanting to **fully understand its complex systems**.

**Dungeon Limbus: Forge Your Legend in the Realm of the Dead**

Embark on an **unforgettable journey** in Dungeon Limbus, a captivating turn-based roguelike where a **mysterious blacksmith** and a **young village manager** stand at the precipice of life and death. Dive deep into a **perilous dungeon** to **recover lost memories**, where **repeated death is not the end, but the path to becoming stronger**.

Dungeon Limbus offers a **rich and engaging experience** with these six core features:

1.  **Intuitive Turn-Based Combat:** Master **strategic battles** on tile maps with **easy-to-learn turn-based controls**.
2.  **Deep Character Progression:** **Grow your character** by **drawing powerful equipment** and **crafting formidable weapons**.
3.  **Village-Based Strategy:** **Build a robust card deck** in your village to unlock the use of **loyal colleagues, potent magic, and delicious cooking**.
4.  **Endless Replayability:** Explore **randomly generated maps** with diverse themes, ensuring **unique challenges and fun every time**.
5.  **Epic Boss Encounters:** Engage in **strategic combat** against **patterned giant bosses** that will test your skills.
6.  **Long-Term Engagement:** Discover **various collection elements** and unlock **multiple endings**, offering **hours of enjoyment**.

Name: 中国象棋-残局大师
Description:
'中国象棋-残局' is a single leisure chess game. This game mainly focuses on the classic remnant game of Chinese chess, currently provides 60 levels, followed by nearly 460 levels. In the final game, the principle is 'red first, red must win'. If you go the right way. The red side will surely win. If you miss a step, you will lose everything.

**Explore the Quirky World of C:\raft: A Dungeon Crawler Unlike Any Other**

Prepare for an **unconventional adventure** in C:\raft, a game where you're not the valiant hero, but rather a **devoted servant to the Crafting Goddess Joann**. This unique experience casts you as someone **chosen by a trans-dimensional entity** for a very specific task: crafting items for her. Your primary mission involves venturing into the **digital dungeons** found within your own hard drive to create the items Joann desires.

**What Sets C:\raft Apart?**

C:\raft offers a truly distinctive gameplay experience, primarily through its innovative approach to dungeon and item generation.

*   **Dungeons Generated from Your Files:** Forget static, pre-designed levels. C:\raft **dynamically creates dungeons** by drawing from the files you choose.
    *   The **size of the files** you select directly influences the **complexity and scale of the dungeons**.
    *   The **variety of file types** you use will determine the **diversity of loot** you uncover during your explorations.
*   **Randomization is Key:**
    *   Expect **items, craftable components, and even monsters** to feature **unique, randomly generated names**, often accompanied by amusing adjectives.
    *   The **requirements for crafting** are also **randomized**, ensuring that no two crafting sessions are ever the same and keeping you constantly adapting.
*   **Engaging Gameplay Elements:**
    *   Experience **randomly generated dungeons** that are a direct reflection of your personal file system.
    *   Discover an **endless array of randomly generated items** to collect and utilize.
    *   Prepare for **epic BOSS FIGHTS** that will test your crafting skills and strategic thinking.
    *   Enjoy **unpredictable playtime**, as the duration of each session can vary significantly.
    *   The game is designed for **one-handed play**, allowing for a more relaxed experience.
    *   Navigate through **multiple distinct paths** to achieve your objectives.
    *   Appreciate the **charming hand-drawn pixel art**, a testament to the developer's dedication.

**Developer's Insight:**

C:\raft is a **text-heavy, no-holds-barred experience** meticulously crafted by a dedicated fan of classic roguelikes for fellow enthusiasts. The game's mechanics are thoroughly explained through **in-game dialogue, helpful tooltips, and comprehensive in-game manuals**. Players are strongly encouraged to utilize these resources to **master the game's intricate mechanics** and unlock its full potential. While the game is designed to be **accessible and expansive**, newcomers to the roguelike genre might find its learning curve a bit steeper.

Jump into C:\raft, and within moments, you'll find yourself **collecting loot, delving into the depths of your hard drive, and, inevitably, experiencing the satisfying challenge of dying**—a true hallmark of the genre! C:\raft offers **minimal narrative but abundant replayability**, with its crafting system serving as a cleverly disguised fetch quest. There's **plenty to keep you thoroughly engaged**, and its design philosophy prioritizes **quick play sessions**, making it an ideal choice for a brief coffee break.

Portal 2 builds on the success of its award-winning predecessor, offering an expanded and enhanced experience for fans of innovative puzzle gameplay, compelling stories, and memorable music. The original game, celebrated for its unique mechanics and captivating narrative, earned over 70 industry awards and cultivated a devoted following.

The **single-player campaign** in Portal 2 introduces a **vibrant new cast of characters** and **novel puzzle mechanics**. Players will explore **uncharted areas** within Aperture Science Labs and encounter the **famously unpredictable AI, GLaDOS**, once again. As one critic observed, "GLaDOS remains a captivating, if slightly terrifying, presence." The game features a **considerably larger array of challenging test chambers**, pushing the boundaries of the original's inventive physics engine.

Portal 2 also introduces a **robust two-player cooperative mode**. This mode boasts its own **distinct campaign, unique story, specialized test chambers**, and **two new playable characters**. The developers emphasize that this cooperative element requires players to "think cooperatively, not just act cooperatively," demanding a **fresh approach to problem-solving**.

Key features of Portal 2 include:

*   **Extensive Single Player:** Experience next-generation gameplay with a deeply engaging story.
*   **Complete Two-Person Co-op:** Dive into a multiplayer mode with its own dedicated narrative, characters, and gameplay mechanics.
*   **Advanced Physics:** The game's physics engine allows for a wide spectrum of inventive challenges, creating a larger, yet still accessible, game.
*   **Original Music:** Enjoy a soundtrack composed specifically for the game.
*   **Massive Sequel:** The original Portal was recognized as Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007.
*   **Editing Tools:** Portal 2 includes comprehensive tools for players to create their own content.

**Portal**, a unique single-player game from Valve, immerses players in the mysterious **Aperture Science Laboratories**. This game fundamentally alters how you interact with and perceive your environment. Much like the **Gravity Gun in Half-Life 2** revolutionized object manipulation, **Portal** demands a fresh perspective and inventive problem-solving.

Within Aperture Science, you will encounter numerous intricate, physics-based challenges. Your primary tool is the **portal gun**. This ingenious device enables the creation of two linked portals, facilitating **rapid transit** between any two locations in the game. It also allows for the movement of both yourself and objects. This core mechanic encourages players to discover novel approaches to navigating each space, resulting in a **fresh and captivating gameplay experience**.

Name: Neon White
Description:
Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though… Features: • You play as Neon White, an assassin plucked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a shot at redemption. • Collect “Soul Cards” to attack your foes or discard them to use unique movement abilities. • Compete for the best times by cleverly combining cards to discover massive shortcuts. • Uncover Heaven’s mysteries by getting to know the other assassins… did you know them in a past life?

**Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time - A Timeless Action-Adventure**

Embark on a journey to ancient Persia in *Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time*, a celebrated action-adventure game renowned for its compelling narrative of **betrayal and deception**.

The story unfolds as a young Prince, **lured by a mystical dagger**, inadvertently unleashes a **terrible evil** upon his homeland. Now, with the aid of a **clever princess** and the **powerful Sands of Time**, he must navigate the **cursed Palace** to restore peace to his **devastated kingdom**.

Developed by Ubisoft's Montreal Studio, *The Sands of Time* is lauded for its **innovative design**, marking a **significant leap forward** in the action-adventure genre. It established **new industry standards** through its pioneering use of physics, lighting, graphics, and animation.

Players embody the Prince, who commands **exceptional acrobatic abilities** and **formidable combat skills**. His most remarkable asset is the **unique power to control time**, enabling players to **rewind past mistakes**, **glimpse the future**, and **freeze the present moment**. This **revolutionary gameplay mechanic** unlocks **numerous strategic possibilities**.

The game plunges players into the **exotic landscapes** of medieval Persia, a setting rich in legend and peril that was **largely unexplored** in gaming prior to its release. This **epic saga** of betrayal and redemption breathes life into the **ancient myths and fearsome creatures** of Persia. The **thrilling narrative**, filled with more twists than the Palace's **labyrinthine corridors**, promises an **unforgettable adventure**. As critics have noted, the Prince stands as an **"exceptional hero"**, revitalizing the genre with **groundbreaking achievements** and the **power to alter his destiny**.

**It Takes Two** is a **unique cooperative adventure** designed exclusively for two players. It offers an unforgettable experience where you and a friend can overcome a wide array of inventive gameplay challenges. This game is built for two, providing **pure co-op perfection** playable either locally with split-screen or online. You will face constantly evolving challenges where **teamwork is absolutely crucial for success**. Plus, you can invite a friend to join for free using the **Friend's Pass**.

Here's what you can expect:

*   **Play as Cody and May:** Step into the roles of a couple magically transformed into dolls and stranded in a whimsical world.
*   **Repair a strained relationship:** They must reluctantly collaborate to mend their relationship, embarking on a journey that intricately blends gameplay and narrative.
*   **Genre-bending challenges:** Prepare for **endlessly inventive gameplay** featuring **genre-bending challenges and new character abilities** that you will need to master in each level.

As game director Josef Fares articulated, "We wanted to create something that was truly unique and pushed the boundaries of what co-op games could be."

The game presents a wild ride complemented by a touching narrative exploring the complexities of relationships. You will assist Cody and May in overcoming their differences as you meet a diverse cast of peculiar and memorable characters. You'll master unique and interconnected abilities in every new stage.

Immerse yourself in various scenarios, including:

*   Battling gangster squirrels
*   Piloting a pair of underpants
*   DJing a vibrant nightclub
*   Bobsledding through a magical snow globe

All this while weaving a heartfelt and humorous story into a uniquely metaphorical journey. Developed by the award-winning studio Hazelight, a recognized pioneer in cooperative play, **It Takes Two** promises a wild and wonderful experience. As the developers themselves highlight, "**We're better together**."

Name: Psychonauts 2
Description:
Razputin “Raz” Aquato, trained acrobat and powerful young psychic, has realized his lifelong dream of joining the international psychic espionage organization known as the Psychonauts! But these psychic super spies are in trouble. Their leader hasn't been the same since he was rescued from a kidnapping, and what's worse, there's a mole hiding in headquarters. Combining quirky missions and mysterious conspiracies, Psychonauts 2 is a platform-adventure game with cinematic style and tons of customizable psychic powers. Psychonauts 2 serves up danger, excitement and laughs in equal measure as players guide Raz on a journey through the minds of friends and foes on a quest to defeat a murderous psychic villain. Experience an imaginative, cinematic story that mixes humor and intrigue, brought to you by legendary game designer Tim Schafer (Grim Fandango, Brütal Legend, Broken Age). Explore unique environments using Raz’s ability to dive into people’s brains to battle their inner demons, unlock hidden memories, and resolve their emotional baggage. Leap acrobatically through the air, traversing tightropes and trapezes in a varied, challenging, and joyful platforming experience. Wield a powerful array of psychic powers to blast, burn and levitate things, or even slow down time itself to solve environmental puzzles and battle strange enemies.

Name: Psychonauts
Description:
A Psychic Odyssey Through the Minds of Misfits, Monsters, and Madmen. This classic action/adventure platformer from acclaimed developers Double Fine Productions follows the story of a young psychic named Razputin. In his quest to join the Psychonauts--an elite group of international psychic secret agents--he breaks into their secret training facility: Whispering Rock Psychic Summer Camp. But this is no average psychic summer camp! A mysterious villain has kidnapped Raz’s fellow campers and stolen their brains. Now he must use his psychic powers of Telekinesis, Levitation, and most of all his ability to project himself into the minds of others--to find the loose noodles and keep them from falling into the wrong hands. Fight mental demons! Uncover hidden memories! Sort emotional baggage! Explore the fantastic realm of the inner mind! Join the Psychonauts!

**OlliOlli World: Skate Through a Vibrant Utopia**

Dive into **OlliOlli World**, a stunning skateboarding action-platformer set in the unique and **vibrant world of Radlandia**. This game captures the thrill of skateboarding, inviting players to **"flip and flow through Radlandia."** Your adventure introduces you to **"colorful characters"** as you seek the **"mystical skate gods"** and aim to reach Gnarvana.

**Explore, Express, and Compete**

**OlliOlli World** encourages exploration and player freedom. Journey through a **"delightful and weird world,"** completing missions and challenges while forming new friendships. The game offers **extensive customization**, letting you personalize your character's look, tricks, and style. Its explorable levels feature **multiple paths**, providing **"opportunities for player expression."**

For competitive players, **OlliOlli World** includes global Leagues to test your skills. You can also challenge friends to beat your high scores on **"millions of sharable levels."** The game is praised for its **"accessibility, depth, and player freedom,"** all tied to its signature **"flow state gameplay."**

**A Masterpiece from Roll7**

This is the third game in the acclaimed OlliOlli series, developed by **Roll7**, a BAFTA-winning studio. The setting is a **"lush skateboarding utopia,"** filled with **"eccentric characters and vibrant locations."** Discover new routes, side quests, and trick opportunities in areas like Inflatable Alley and Los Vulgas. The experience is enhanced by a soundtrack of **"IDM and Electronica tracks."**

Roll7 highlights the game's refined mechanics, stating **"super tight controls combine with highly refined gameplay for a silky smooth ride."** **OlliOlli World** is designed to be **welcoming to newcomers**. Developers assure, **"Not a Pro? Don’t worry – OlliOlli World welcomes you, allowing new players to tear down streets and pull off sick method grabs without fear of faceplanting."**

**Depth for Dedicated Skaters**

Experienced players will find significant depth. Master the game through the sandbox mode's **"millions of unique levels"** or compete globally in Leagues. The game features a **"hugely deep combo system with over 100 moves to master and combine"** for high scores. Unlock special rewards for further character customization, from looks to tricks. Developers emphasize the game's **inclusive nature**, proclaiming, **"Want to skate in your flip flops… go for it. Want to wear a bumble bee onesie …ok then… no judgement. In OlliOlli World as long as you’re on board anything goes!"**

**Prince of Persia: The Two Thrones™: A Darker Journey Awaits**

Prepare for a darker journey in *Prince of Persia: The Two Thrones™*. Players return to the war-torn homeland of Babylon, where the Prince and Kaileena, the Empress of Time, find their kingdom in utter chaos. In a desperate act to save him, Kaileena sacrifices herself, unleashing the Sands of Time.

Now a fugitive, the Prince is haunted by his past. A **deadly Dark Prince**, a manifestation of his inner turmoil, begins to possess him. This **duality** allows players to:

*   **Wield the powers and weapons of two master warriors** with different combat styles, attitudes, and histories.

The game emphasizes player choice in combat, allowing you to **master the expanded Free-Form Fighting system** to destroy enemies in your own style. New stealth tactics are introduced, such as:

*   Surprise decapitations
*   The "deadly Daggertail" for ranged strangulation

Players will **battle freely through Babylon**, navigating perilous rooftops, chaotic streets, and dark underground passageways. The narrative promises "unparalleled depth in storytelling," immersing players in a "twisting tale filled with adrenaline, tension and discovery."

Time manipulation remains a core mechanic. Players can:

*   **Execute powerful attacks** by slowing down or rewinding time.
*   Employ **all-new Sands of Time powers** for surprise attacks.

*The Two Thrones™* delivers a "masterful blend of gameplay," combining action combat, agility challenges, and story-driven puzzles, true to the acclaimed Prince of Persia franchise.

**Death's Door: A Grim Reaper's Journey to Reclaim a Stolen Soul**

In the **ordinary world of the Crows**, collecting souls is a routine task. But for one Crow, this **predictable routine is shattered when a destined soul is stolen**. This theft propels the Crow into an urgent quest within a realm where death holds no sway. Here, beings **defy their natural end**, driven by **insatiable greed and formidable power**.

**Key Gameplay Features:**

*   **Intense Combat:** Engage in a **dynamic combat system** blending melee, ranged attacks, and magic. Face a variety of mythical creatures and minor deities, where **every mistake has consequences**, and victory is earned through skill. Enhance your abilities by **customizing your character's stats** and unlocking new skills.
*   **Visually Striking Realm:** Venture beyond the mysterious Doors to explore a land populated by **unique inhabitants and hidden secrets**. As you navigate this strange environment, you'll bring a glimmer of hope to the memorable characters you encounter.
*   **Gripping Narrative:** Embark on a mission to find and defeat **colossal foes**, each with their own compelling histories and motivations. This dark yet humorous story invites players to explore the deeper truths about soul migration, the vital role of the Crows, and the origin of the Doors. Game creators at Acid Nerve emphasize the game's focus on **challenging gameplay and engaging storytelling**. IGN's preview notes that the game's art style significantly enhances its unique, melancholic charm.

**The Ramp: Experience Pure Vert Skateboarding**

If you're looking for an authentic vert skateboarding experience, **The Ramp** offers pure, unadulterated thrills. While keyboard controls are an option, the developer recommends using a controller for the best experience. This digital toy is designed for players who crave a smooth flow and the exhilarating feeling of shredding a halfpipe, with unnecessary complexities intentionally removed.

**The Ramp** is all about delivering satisfying and unique skateboarding gameplay that prioritizes smooth, continuous movement. It's built to be easy for beginners to pick up but offers a challenge to truly master, providing a rewarding sense of progression. In a departure from many games, **The Ramp** features no unlockable content, no scorekeeping, no missions, and no external objectives. The developer's goal was to capture the unparalleled feeling of real-life vert skateboarding, presenting it as a focused experience akin to a digital toy. By deliberately leaving out extraneous elements, like guns or explosions, players can truly immerse themselves in those crucial moments of flow that can make an ordinary day extraordinary. The developer actively encourages feedback and welcomes players to share their positive experiences.

**Design and Build Thrilling Ski Lifts in a Unique Engineering Game**

This game challenges you to design and construct safe and efficient ski lift systems, from gentle slopes to challenging mountain peaks. You'll need to ensure every passenger reaches their destination, all while navigating **realistic physics** that can lead to amusing disasters.

The game features over **100 challenging levels**, requiring you to build a variety of structures like chairlifts, gondolas, jumps, bridges, and ramps. As you progress, your constructions will become more complex. It's crucial to **manage your materials wisely**, as cutting corners might save money but could result in comical passenger mishaps. As one player noted, "The physics engine is surprisingly robust, making even simple mistakes lead to spectacular failures."

You'll step into the role of a mountain resort engineer, needing to **master rope physics** and understand the stresses and strains on your creations. The game allows you to seamlessly switch between **Build Mode and Simulation Mode** to refine your designs. After construction, you can experience extreme sports like snowboarding, skiing, and motorbiking, taking **direct control of your riders** to guide them to their destination and aim for the top of the leaderboards.

Success hinges on keeping a close eye on your **budget** and completing bonus objectives to climb the **online leaderboards**. The puzzles range in difficulty from easy green to challenging black. For those who want to go further, the **Sandbox Builder Mode** offers an intuitive level editor to create your own challenges. You can also engage with the community through the **Steam Workshop**, sharing your creations and spectacular failures using the built-in **GIF and MP4 exporter**.

Name: Steep™
Description:
Ride a massive open world across the Alps, where the powder is always fresh and the run never ends. Tame the wilderness on the American continent in the Alaska free update, a new region filled with challenges. The mountain is yours to explore. So strap in, suit up, and drop in. - RIDE YOUR WAY -Conquer the world's most epic mountains on skis, wingsuits, snowboards, and paragliders. - LIVE UNFORGETTABLE MOMENTS WITH OTHERS -Ride solo or drop in next to other players to share thrilling, adrenaline-fueled rides. - THE MOUNTAIN IS YOURS TO EXPLORE -Create your own path through a massive open-world, and share your best custom lines with friends. - PUT YOUR SKILLS TO THE TEST -Prove that you're king of the mountain in unique and spectacular challenges. - SHARE EVERYTHING -Capture your most insane stunts and share via social media. A permanent internet connection is required in order to play the game. - SET YOUR SIGHTS ON THE ALPS Rip through the terrains of a snowy open world. Strap in and suit up for some epic stunts as you ride your way to the peak of the excitement. Experience 360° of visual freedom while you explore the Alps. Let your gaze immerse you in the massive winter playground. Situational awareness has never been more fluid with the integrated Tobii Eye Tracking feature set. Using your gaze to shred the hills enhances your gameplay and lets you embark on the ride of your life. Compatible with all Tobii Eye Tracking gaming devices. ---- Additional notes: Eye tracking features available with Tobii Eye Tracking.

Name: Endless Ski
Description:
Rediscover the 90s classic Ski Free, re-imagined in Unreal Engine The player controls a skier on a mountain slope, avoiding obstacles, performing stunts, and avoiding that Yeti! Features Exciting snow landscape adventure Perfect game for all ages! Dodge the dog. Dodge the snowboarder. But most importantly dodge that Yeti! Ski through flags to gain the points The longer you ski, the greater the score! Fun atmospheric music to listen to Special Effects! (In the Menu's)

Name: K-Point Ski Jumping
Description:
Become professional Ski Jumper ! Starting in Junior Cup, you will cllimb the ladder to become next Wolrd Cup winner ! Compete on 34 real world based ski jumping hills located all around the world. Take part in famous tournements like 4 Hills, Raw Sky, Winter Olympics, World Cup, Summer Grand Prix or Ski Flying. Earn money and buy your dream car or dream house, hire coach. Keep track of your morale. Better you do in competitions, your morale will grow higher. Choose on of 4 Ski Jumping styles , including old school one ! Be the best in the world and try to beat online world records!

Name: Snowtopia: Ski Resort Builder
Description:
Welcome to Snowtopia, a world of endless winter fun. Build the ideal ski resort to keep your skiers smiling all the way down the mountain. Get to know every cliff and crevice as you plan pistes, place lifts and build essential facilities. Take on the challenge to create a resort where life is always good! Plan your pistes Place pistes on the mountainside in just a few clicks with the easy-to-use creation tool. Read the terrain, and choose the best spot to lay down trails for every skier ability. 11 different types of ski lift give you plenty of choice for scaling the heights. 12-person gondola lifts are fast, but tricky to build on the steep mountain slopes. A two-person chairlift might be a better choice, but watch out for queues at the bottom! Luckily, ever-advancing ski lift technology means there are always new options to try. The latest models can make even the highest peaks accessible in no time. Plan, build and improve until you’ve created your dream ski area. Welcome skiers of every kind You might have thought perfect pistes were enough to keep skiers happy, but it’s not so simple. With 12 different skier profiles in the game, some are more interested in a good raclette, while others come to commune with nature. And then there are the hardcore ski fanatics, who won’t settle for anything less than the longest run the mountain has to offer. There’s no money in Snowtopia. Make your skiers happy enough and they might join the team of volunteers running the resort. Divide your workforce between the lift operators, maintenance crew, service facilities, and resort improvement team. Growing the reputation of your resort leads to more skiers on the slopes. But beware - more skiers means more accidents! Make sure you have enough snow groomers and ski patrols to keep the slopes safe at all times. Remember, no one likes a broken chairlift, but everyone loves sunbathing on the terrace! Sit back and chill on the mountain Once your resort is built and your skiers are happy, you deserve a little break. So find yourself a perfect little corner on the mountain to drink it all in, maybe near a pretty forest piste next to a ski lift perched on a picturesque clifftop. You’re in the mountains. Enjoy the frosty kiss of the cold air on your face and kick back to some cool tunes. Welcome to Snowtopia, the game where it’s good to just chill.

**Gustav Vasa: A King's Perilous Journey Through the Dales**

In **1522**, a **young nobleman named Gustav Eriksson Vasa** found himself in **grave danger**. His father had been **murdered** during the infamous Stockholm Bloodbath, and **King Kristian of Denmark was actively hunting him**. To **survive**, Gustav made a **desperate flight** into the **rugged Swedish Dales**, a region that would ultimately **shape his destiny** and the future of Sweden.

This **captivating game** places players directly into Gustav's skis, beginning with his **harrowing escape**. You'll experience the **relentless pursuit** of Danish soldiers through the **snow-covered Dales**. The gameplay involves traveling from village to village, **seeking crucial help** from the local Dalesfolk. The game features **thrilling 3D chase sequences** where players must **cleverly use the environment** to evade the **accurate arrows** of their pursuers.

Interspersed with these intense chases are **engaging 2D sidescrolling adventure segments**. These sections **unfold the compelling story** of Gustav Vasa, a Swedish nobleman **destined for the throne**. The narrative masterfully **blends historical facts with enduring legends** surrounding this **pivotal historical figure**. Players will **witness key moments** that defined his rise, including Gustav's **passionate speech in Falun** that **rallied the Dalesfolk**, and his **eventual coronation in Stockholm**, marking the beginning of a new era.

The game is distinguished by its **unique and captivating visual style**. **Beautifully hand-painted environments and characters** draw inspiration from **classic Swedish art** originating from the Dales region. This **distinctive aesthetic** crafts an **immersive and truly memorable experience** for players.

Developed by a talented team including Ingeborg Asplund, Stanislav Hallberg, Natali Hallberg, Joakim Bengtsson, and Gertrud Bondesson, this game is a **masterful blend of action and narrative**. It allows players to **live through the early, formative adventures** of a man who would become a **legendary king**.

**Let's Go! Skiing VR** offers an accessible virtual reality sports experience, making it an ideal choice for gatherings and encouraging active fun, particularly for children. The game immerses players in the **exhilarating sensation of downhill skiing**, challenging them to navigate mountain slopes, collect coins, and skillfully evade various obstacles.

A notable element is the **local leaderboard**, fostering a spirit of friendly competition and showcasing top player achievements. For an added layer of excitement, the game presents a **demanding "dangerous track"** populated with thrilling hazards, including the dramatic threat of avalanches. As the game's developers have stated, "Let's go! Skiing features cartoon-style graphics, making it perfect for kids!"

The game's interface is designed for **remarkable ease of use**. The development team elaborated on this, explaining, "In the game, you use the controllers like ski poles and steer with your head. It couldn't be simpler!" This **intuitive control system** ensures that participants can swiftly engage with the virtual skiing environment and appreciate the gameplay without a significant learning period.

Just Ski+ offers a **distinctive, physics-based skiing challenge**. This simple game aims to **test and perhaps initially vex players**, but rewards them with a **deep sense of achievement** when they succeed.

The **clever control system** in Just Ski+ draws from the mechanics of the old game, Ski Stunt Simulator. You control the skier only with your mouse:
*   **Moving the mouse down makes the skier crouch.**
*   **Moving the mouse up makes the skier extend.**
This control is **easy to understand**, but **requires significant practice** to master.

A **key to succeeding** in Just Ski+ is mastering spins. The game accurately models **angular momentum**.
*   **Crouching speeds up your spin.**
*   **Extending slows it down.**
Your goal is to **ski to the cabin**.

The **difficulty of Just Ski+** is similar to learning to ride a bike. At first, it might feel **clumsy and impossible**. But as you improve and **understand the game's physics**, it becomes **smooth and very satisfying**. The **well-tuned challenge** keeps the game **interesting and rewarding**.

We hope you enjoy Just Ski+! Thanks for playing.

Name: Ski Park Tycoon
Description:
Gameplay mechanics The core gameplay mechanics of Ski Park Tycoon lie in ski lift and slope construction. Before building a park, the player needs to study the mountain topography and terrain. Therefore, it was imperative to allow the player complete freedom of camera movement. Building lifts and slopes is as easy as drawing lines on the ground. Skiers coming to the resort want to enjoy their stay so - apart from lifts and slopes - the player also needs to provide other infrastructure such as restaurants, ski patrols, snow cannons etc. This is where the economic simulation aspect of the game comes into play. You can learn more about the game in the online tutorial ( ). Game features classic tycoon gameplay full 3D environment explore your park in third person view hundreds of skiers in one resort 7 types of lifts 12 types of buildings campaign with 29 missions of various objectives sandbox and unlimited game modes real world ski resorts

**Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: Your Gateway to WWII Strategy**

The **Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition** is your direct entry into the acclaimed World War II real-time strategy experience. This edition grants you access to the latest version, simply titled 'Company of Heroes,' on Steam. For online multiplayer, **always use the updated 'Company of Heroes' version.** You can also explore the active **COH1 Steam Community** and its thriving **Modding scene** to further enrich your gameplay.

**Experience WWII Battles Like Never Before**

Company of Heroes redefined real-time strategy with its **powerful portrayal of World War II**. The game vividly captures the sacrifices of soldiers, the devastation of war-torn landscapes, and the dynamic nature of battlefield combat. Your journey begins with the D-Day invasion of Normandy, where you will lead Allied forces against the German military. Progress through a compelling single-player story set in key WWII battles, highlighting **intense action and the bravery of soldiers**.

**Key Gameplay Features:**

*   **Engaging Single-Player Campaign:** Experience the strategic depth and emotional impact of World War II.
*   **Intelligent Squad AI:** Your troops react realistically, seeking cover and using tactics to gain an edge.
*   **Impressive Visuals:** Relic's advanced engine provides **detailed graphics** and a physics-driven world.
*   **Dynamic Combat Environments:** Real-time physics and a **fully destructible environment** lead to unique battles. You can **destroy many objects**, altering the battlefield. Use structures and terrain for cover or to obstruct enemies.
*   **Thrilling Multiplayer:** Engage in **2-8 player matches** via LAN or online. Forge alliances for intense Axis vs. Allied clashes.

Name: Company of Heroes
Description:
DISCLAIMER FOR ADDITIONAL USER REVIEWS , please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page. Total conversions available on Steam for COH1 are also listed on the Legacy Edition page. DESCRIPTION Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines real time strategy gaming by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Beginning with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, players lead squads of Allied soldiers into battle against the German war machine through some of the most pivotal battles of WWII. Through a rich single player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events. A Cinematic Single Player Experience that captures the turmoil of WWII as never before. Advanced squad AI brings your soldiers to life as they interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute advanced squad tactics to eliminate all enemy opposition. Stunning Visuals - Relic's next generation cutting-edge engine provides graphic quality and a physics driven world that is unprecedented in an RTS. Environmental Strategy - Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guarantee no two battles ever play out in the same way. Destroy anything and re-shape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage, or deny them to the enemy. 2-8 Player Multiplayer Competition via LAN or Internet - Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies.

**Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare: Revolutionizing the Shooter Genre**

**Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare** marked a significant shift in the action game genre. Developed by Infinity Ward, it presented a **gritty and immersive look at modern warfare**. Players experience the conflict through two distinct perspectives:

*   A **U.S. Marine** fighting in global hotspots.
*   A **British S.A.S. operative** tackling a worldwide crisis.

The game's story is packed with **unexpected twists**, demanding players employ **modern weapons, cutting-edge tech, and smart tactics**. Victory hinges on **fast reactions, precise aim, and coordinated effort**.

The game boasts a **vast armory** featuring over **70 real-world firearms**. This includes:

*   Assault rifles equipped with **laser sights**.
*   Precision sniper rifles.
*   The M-249 SAW machine gun.

For covert operations, players can utilize **night-vision goggles and ghillie suits**. The combat feels **authentic**, featuring:

*   **Dynamic air support**.
*   Helicopter insertions.
*   Fierce attack helicopter engagements.

Visually, the game impresses with **stunning graphics**, **realistic environmental physics**, and **captivating audio design**.

Beyond its compelling single-player campaign, **Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare** is celebrated for its **groundbreaking online multiplayer**. Its innovative "create-a-class" feature enables **deep character personalization**. Players earn experience to **unlock new gear and perks**. **Robust matchmaking and competitive rankings** fostered a **vibrant online player base**. As one reviewer put it, the game "established a new benchmark for military shooters."

**Call of Duty®: Experience World War II Through the Eyes of Soldiers**

Step into the intense and realistic world of World War II with **Call of Duty®**. This game puts you in the boots of ordinary soldiers from various Allied nations, highlighting how their **bravery and teamwork** were crucial in shaping history. You'll join a squad and face the **chaos of war**, performing vital actions such as:

*   Providing cover fire
*   Rescuing teammates
*   Witnessing unique skills and personalities emerge under pressure

Remember, victory in this war was a **collective effort**, not the achievement of a single individual or nation.

For the first time, Call of Duty® allows you to see the war through the eyes of:

*   **American soldiers**
*   **British soldiers**
*   **Russian soldiers**

Explore 24 missions across 4 interconnected historical campaigns. These missions feature a variety of objectives:

*   Daring sabotage
*   All-out assaults
*   Stealth operations
*   Vehicle combat
*   Crucial rescue missions

The game features **authentic World War II elements**, including:

*   Accurate weaponry
*   Historically accurate locations
*   Period vehicles
*   Immersive sound design

All these elements are designed to deliver the most realistic experience possible.

© 2003 Activision Publishing, Inc. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights reserved. All other trademarks and trade names are the properties of their respective owners.

**Silent Hunter® III: The Definitive WWII Submarine Simulation**

Silent Hunter® III stands as the ultimate WWII submarine simulation, offering an unparalleled level of realism and authentic naval action. Developed by Ubisoft, this installment features an all-new 3D engine, enhanced crew command, and captivating gameplay that appeals to both hardcore simulation fans and newcomers. The game meticulously recreates the suspenseful atmosphere of underwater warfare with realistic 3D water, dynamic day/night cycles, and historically accurate submarines, ships, and aircraft. Ubisoft highlights the detailed U-boat interiors, evolving weather, and immersive audio design as key elements contributing to the definitive WWII submarine experience. Players can command a variety of U-boats, including the Type II, VII, IX, and XXI, engaging Allied convoys and warships through stealthy torpedo attacks or direct surface engagements.

The game's dynamic campaign allows players to craft their own WWII naval narratives, with career progression influenced by strategic command decisions in an unscripted, non-linear environment. Silent Hunter® III is designed for accessibility, featuring a helpful naval academy tutorial and customizable realism settings to suit a broad range of players. Crew members respond to orders and develop based on patrol outcomes, adding another layer of depth. For a collaborative experience, Silent Hunter® III supports cooperative multiplayer for up to eight players over LAN.

**Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition: Conquer the Age of Enlightenment**

Embark on an **epic global conquest** with Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition, the ultimate package for fans of the acclaimed strategy series. This comprehensive edition includes all downloadable content (DLC) and feature updates released since the game's initial launch, offering **hundreds of hours of immersive gameplay**.

**Experience the Age of Enlightenment Like Never Before**

Total War: EMPIRE transports you to the **turbulent 18th century**, a period defined by political upheaval, groundbreaking military advancements, and radical new ideas. You will **control vast empires**, command mighty navies, forge new nations, and ultimately **dominate the globe**.

**Revolutionary Naval Combat**

For the first time in the Total War series, **experience true 3D naval combat**. Intuitively command individual ships or entire fleets across dynamic seascapes. Master the elements, as **extraordinary water and weather effects** play a crucial role in your success or failure. Engage in thrilling broadsides, then close in to grapple enemy vessels and lead your troops in **intense hand-to-hand boarding actions** on the decks of these wooden behemoths.

**Enhanced Land Battles and Campaign Map**

Total War: EMPIRE also refines the series' signature 3D real-time battles and turn-based campaign map. Prepare for new challenges in land combat with the introduction of **cannon and musket warfare**, demanding mastery of new formations and tactics. The campaign map, the **strategic heart of the game**, has been vastly expanded and improved. Discover new systems for **Trade, Diplomacy, and Espionage** with agents. Enjoy a streamlined user interface, improved advisor guidance, and an extended scope that encompasses the riches of India, the complexities of Europe, and the burgeoning potential of the **United States of America**.

**The Warpath Campaign: Defend Native American Lands**

Dive into the **Warpath Campaign**, a detailed North American expansion that introduces **five new playable Native American factions**. Lead these factions in an epic struggle to **defend your ancestral lands** and repel invaders. These unique units and their distinct strengths can also be deployed in multiplayer battles.

*   **Five New Playable Factions:** Iroquois, Huron, Plains, Pueblo, and Cherokee nations.
*   **Expanded North American Territories:** A new, more detailed campaign map with fresh regions and an earlier start date.
*   **New Elite Units:** Including Mohawk Elite Warriors, Cheyenne Dog Soldiers, Navajo Scout Warriors, and more.
*   **Two New Agent Types:** Utilize the Shaman for infiltration and the Scout for sabotage.
*   **18 New Tribal Technologies:** Featuring advancements like Spirit Medicine, Call of the Wild, and Dreamwalking, creating a unique tribal technology tree.
*   **New Winning Objectives:** Tailored for each playable faction.

**Elite Units of the East: Eastern Prowess**

The **Elite Units of the East** pack adds **12 new elite units** to the Maratha and Ottoman factions, extending the game's reach further east than ever before. These soldiers, honed by battlefield experience or rigorous academic training, offer a **vast array of tactical options** to intimidate and overwhelm your enemies.

*   **Ottoman Empire:** Haydut Irregulars, Wallachian Boyars, Bosnian Panduks, Circassian Armoured Cavalry, Armenian Archers, Libyan Kuloglu, Palestinian Auxiliaries, Cairo Janissaries, Mounted Nizam-I-Cedit.
*   **Maratha:** Rajput Zamindars, Poligars, Barawardi.

**Elite Units of the West: Western Military Might**

Featuring **14 completely unique units** for major Western factions, the **Elite Units of the West** pack introduces new infantry and cavalry. These elite soldiers, equipped with the finest weaponry and subjected to the most demanding training, provide **enhanced battlefield options** for any tactician aiming for victory.

*   **Austria:** Hungarian Grenadiers.
*   **Britain:** Horse Guards, 33rd Foot, Brunswick Dragoons, Hessian Grenadiers, King’s Royal Regiment of New York, Royal Welch Fusiliers, Company of Select Marksmen/Fraser’s Rangers, Tarleton’s Light Dragoons.
*   **France:** Swiss Guards, Royal Deux-Ponts Regiment.
*   **United Provinces:** Blue Guards, Gardes du Corps.
*   **Poland-Lithuania:** Guard Grenadiers.
*   **Prussia:** 2nd Hussars, Bosniaks, Frei-Korps.
*   **Russia:** Gardes à cheval, Siemenovski Foot Guards.
*   **Spain:** Walloon Guards.
*   **United States:** Legion of the United States, US Marines.

**Elite Units of America: Forging a New Nation**

The **Elite Units of America** pack introduces **15 new elite units** for the American, British, and French factions. These units played pivotal roles during the American Revolution, a period of immense political upheaval that ultimately led to the Declaration of Independence. Though influenced by European military traditions, their **unique identity and courage** were forged in the crucible of the fight for the United States.

*   **United States:** 1st Delaware, 1st Maryland, 2nd Continental Light Dragoons, 2nd New York, Lee’s Legion, Morgan’s Provisional Rifle Corp, Pulaski’s Legion.
*   **Britain:** 33rd Foot, Brunswick Dragoons, Hessian Grenadiers, King’s Royal Regiment of New York, Royal Welch Fusiliers, Company of Select Marksmen/Fraser’s Rangers, Tarleton’s Light Dragoons.
*   **France:** Royal Deux-Ponts Regiment.

**Special Forces Units & Bonus Content: Elite Formations**

The **Special Forces Units** pack brings **six of the most influential military forces of the 18th century** to your campaign. These exclusive elite units become available through specific factions or by controlling certain geographical regions. This pack also includes **three additional exclusive Elite Units**.

*   HMS Victory
*   Rogers' Rangers
*   Ottoman Organ Gun
*   Ghoorkas
*   Corso Terrestre Guerillas
*   Bulkeley's Regiment
*   Death's Head Hussars
*   The USS Constitution
*   The Dahomey Amazons

**Discover the Ultimate Strategy Experience: Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete**

Dive into the **complete strategy experience** with Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete. This comprehensive package offers the original game and **all its expansions**, delivering an unparalleled journey into empire building. You'll receive the multiplayer expansion, **Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World**, and the extensive content from **Sid Meier's Civilization III: Conquests!**, including new civilizations, scenarios, and features. As Firaxis Games has highlighted, this powerful combination provides **numerous paths to victory**, ensuring a rich and varied gameplay experience.

This definitive edition seamlessly blends the original game with the engaging multiplayer expansion and the expansive Conquests expansion. While official online multiplayer for **Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World** ended on May 31st, 2014, 2K Games confirms that **local area network (LAN) play is still available**, allowing players to connect and compete with friends. This ensures the strategic depth of Civilization III remains accessible for group play.

**Total War: SHOGUN 2: Conquer Feudal Japan and Master the Art of War**

Total War: SHOGUN 2 transports you to the **mid-16th Century**, a period of intense conflict and division in Japanese history known as the **Sengoku period**. During this era, ten powerful clans fiercely competed for dominance. Your primary goal is to **strategically outmaneuver your rivals**, build crucial alliances, and ultimately **unite Japan under your rule as the new shogun**.

In this game, you assume the role of a **Daimyo**, the leader of your chosen clan. Achieving victory requires a careful equilibrium between **military strength, economic development, and shrewd diplomacy**. The overarching objective is to **restore peace and unity to Japan**, emerging as the **sole ruler of a unified nation**.

The game showcases **stunning 3D battles**, upholding the series' tradition of real-time land and sea combat. The **strategic campaign map** acts as the central hub for your operations, where you will diligently develop your provinces and manage your expanding empire. A sophisticated new AI, **inspired by Sun Tzu's 'Art of War'**, dictates the flow of battle. Creative Assembly developers have confirmed that the AI's strategic decision-making is **directly based on Sun Tzu's enduring principles**, promising a deeply engaging and challenging experience. You will lead disciplined samurai armies and powerful fleets to **achieve supremacy in Feudal Japan**. Grow your influence through economic expansion, political strategy, and military campaigns. **Master the 'Art of War'** by employing clever tactics, espionage, and even assassination. Adapt to changing conditions on the battlefield and within your territories, and test your strategic prowess in **online multiplayer modes**. These include a cooperative two-player campaign and large-scale eight-player competitive matches.

Total War: SHOGUN 2 introduces exciting new features. These include **RPG-style progression** for your Generals and Agents, allowing them to grow and develop. Experience **multi-phase siege battles** that offer more complex and engaging assaults than traditional castle defenses. The game also features the introduction of powerful **hero units**. Furthermore, you will interact with a visually enhanced and highly dynamic **3D campaign map**.

**Total War: SHOGUN 2: Your Path to Becoming Shogun**

Step into 16th-century Japan, a land torn by war. Ten powerful warlords fight for control, breaking the nation's peace. As a Daimyo, your goal is to **unite Japan** and become Shogun, the supreme ruler. This demands a **smart mix of military strength, good economics, and clever diplomacy**.

The main gameplay in Total War: SHOGUN 2 improves the series' known style. Fight in exciting **real-time 3D battles** on land and sea, where every choice matters. The strategic campaign map is your kingdom's hub, letting you plan carefully. A smart new AI, inspired by Sun Tzu, offers a tough but fair challenge. As one designer said, the AI aims to "provide a truly engaging and intelligent opponent that forces players to think critically about their every move."

To win, several key strategies are vital:

*   **Conquer:** Lead your samurai armies and naval fleets in exciting battles.
*   **Expand:** Manage your provinces on the turn-based map. Gather resources, train troops, and build your power through economic, political, and military growth.
*   **Outmaneuver:** Use classic Sun Tzu tactics. This includes using fire, conducting sieges, deploying spies, and carrying out assassinations to adapt to the changing war and political scene.
*   **Engage:** Compete in two-player campaigns or join large online battles with up to eight players in special scenarios.

SHOGUN 2 brings several important upgrades:

*   **Character Evolution:** Generals and agents gain experience and unlock new skills.
*   **Challenging Sieges:** Capturing enemy castles is now a complex, multi-stage event.
*   **Elite Units:** Deploy special units, like Hero units, that can boost troop morale and deal heavy damage.
*   **Dynamic Map:** A new rotating 3D view of the campaign map provides a better strategic overview.

Battlefield 3 plunges players into intense combat, offering direct control as you battle through dynamic action. The game features 29 expansive multiplayer maps, a wide selection of vehicles, weapons, and gear, all crafted to amplify the excitement. Every engagement brings you closer to earning rewards and climbing the ranks.

**Key Gameplay Elements:**

*   **Player Classes:** Choose from four distinct roles: Assault, Engineer, Support, and Recon. Each class provides unique skills, making **teamwork essential for victory**.
*   **Vehicle Options:** Command a broad spectrum of vehicles, including tanks, buggies, helicopters, and jets. You can even directly engage adversaries with the F/A-18E Super Hornet.
*   **Engaging Maps:** Fight across 29 varied multiplayer maps characterized by **highly destructible environments**. These open arenas are ideal for dynamic vehicle warfare.
*   **Advancement System:** Accumulate Ranks, Ribbons, and Medals through gameplay, which **improve your combat effectiveness**. For example, excelling in helicopter piloting can unlock IR flares for missile defense or boost stealth capabilities.

**Battlefield 3 Premium Edition:**

This complete package bundles the core game with all five expansion packs, providing:

*   20 new maps
*   20 new weapons
*   10 new vehicles
*   4 new game modes

**Premium Edition Advantages:**

*   **Immediate Access:** Get instant access to 15 potent weapons, along with vital gadgets and vehicle enhancements.
*   **Enhanced Functionality:** Reset your statistics, enjoy priority server access, and personalize your Platoon with new emblems. Participate in special events like Double XP weekends and exclusive competitions.
*   **Exclusive Content:** Acquire unique items such as new soldier and weapon camos, the ACB-90 knife, and special dog tags.

Prepare for **Dwarf Fortress**, a game renowned for its **unparalleled depth and intricate world simulation**. This isn't merely generated scenery; it's a **fully realized, living world** where civilizations rise and fall, populated by unique individuals, fantastical creatures, and distinct cultures. Experience **virtually endless gameplay**, now beautifully enhanced with **stunning pixel graphics**!

**Getting started is easier than ever!** The new player experience features **guided tutorials** to help you build your first fort and keep your dwarves happy. **Command your dwarves** as they mine for riches in their generated mountain homes. Your dwarves will need a **constant supply of food and beer**, and your **strategic guidance** to survive assaults, wilderness perils, or the undead.

**Key gameplay elements include:**

*   **Crafting treasures and furniture** from various materials.
*   **Establishing a barony** and meeting noble demands.
*   **Monitoring dwarf thoughts and emotions** for happiness.
*   **Constructing floodgates** for water management or magma containment.
*   **Building intricate structures** and observing dwarf culture, including taverns, libraries, temples, and skills like pottery and bookbinding.

Dwarf Fortress is a **lifelong, evolving project**, continuously developed since 2003. **Forge your own unique world** and manage a thriving colony of dwarves as they mine towards their doom. This **endlessly engaging hobby** is tailor-made for you! The legendary Dwarf Fortress is now on Steam. **Construct your fortress** and protect your dwarves from starvation, dragons, and madness.

Within this **complex blend of construction, management, and roguelike simulation**, each procedurally generated world offers a **fresh challenge**. These arise from dwarves' **simulated personalities** or unpredictable **aquifers**. Witness your civilization's decline, learn from mistakes, and prepare for the next setback. The **combat system is extraordinarily detailed**, covering skills, body parts, materials, aiming, wrestling, pain, nausea, poisons, and more.

The **breadth of world generation is immense**. Hundreds of animals and monsters, many **randomly created**, inhabit the game. Discover **generated poetry, music, instruments, and dances**. A **dynamic weather model** tracks wind, humidity, and air masses for realistic fronts, clouds, storms, and blizzards. Over two hundred rock and mineral types appear in their **appropriate geological contexts**. Remember the iconic mantra: "**Losing is fun!**"

Fundamentally, **nothing substantial has changed under the hood**; it's the classic Dwarf Fortress experience with **integrated graphics and music**. Developers Tarn and Zach Adams stated, "A few bells and whistles won’t change that." Their **all-new, official tileset** features **brand-new pixel art**. The Steam edition is enriched by a **15-track soundtrack** composed by Dabu, Simon Swerwer, and Águeda Macias, with tracks in the Dwarvish language.

Dwarf Fortress famously inspired **groundbreaking games** like RimWorld, Prison Architect, and Minecraft. It's also one of the **first video games acquired by the Museum of Modern Art**. Continuously updated by the Adams brothers, their goal is to **simulate all of existence**. Bay 12 Games estimates they are **44% complete**.

**Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete: Your All-in-One Strategy Experience**

Dive into the complete world of Sid Meier's Civilization III with this ultimate package. Sid Meier's Civilization III: Complete brings together the beloved base game, known for its addictive exploration and empire-building, with its enhanced multiplayer expansion, Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World.

This comprehensive edition also includes all the exciting new content from Sid Meier's Civilization III: Conquests. You'll discover:

*   **New Civilizations:** Lead a variety of unique cultures to victory.
*   **Engaging Scenarios:** Experience diverse historical and fictional challenges.
*   **Innovative Features:** Explore fresh gameplay mechanics and strategic options.

Sid Meier's Civilization III: Complete offers expanded ways to play, more strategic depth, and diverse paths to achieve victory, all conveniently packaged together.

*Please note: Online multiplayer functionality was suspended on May 31st, 2014. Local Area Network (LAN) mode remains supported.*

Factorio is a captivating game centered on the intricate art of building and managing vast industrial complexes. Players embark on a journey of resource extraction, technological advancement, infrastructure development, production automation, and defense against hostile alien forces. Initially, you'll be manually harvesting trees, mining ores, and crafting essential components like mechanical arms and transport belts. However, your operations will rapidly evolve into an industrial behemoth, complete with expansive solar farms, sophisticated oil refining and cracking processes, and the deployment of construction and logistic robots to meet your ever-growing resource demands.

This intense exploitation of the planet's natural wealth inevitably draws the ire of the indigenous inhabitants, necessitating a robust defense strategy for your burgeoning machine empire. The game also offers a robust cooperative multiplayer experience, allowing players to join forces, construct colossal factories, and efficiently delegate tasks among friends. Furthermore, Factorio's comprehensive modding support empowers creators worldwide to introduce a wealth of innovative features, ranging from minor enhancements and helpful utilities to complete game overhauls.

While the primary gameplay unfolds in the freeplay scenario, a variety of engaging challenges are presented through distinct Scenarios. Should these not capture your interest, the intuitive in-game Map Editor provides the tools to craft your own unique environments, meticulously placing entities, enemies, and terrain, and even incorporating custom scripts for novel gameplay experiences.

Regarding pricing, the developers have stated, "We don't have any plans to take part in a sale or to reduce the price for the foreseeable future."

Here's what players and notable figures have to say about Factorio:

"No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly." - Reddit

"I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately." - Notch, Mojang

"Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens." - Zisteau, Youtube

Name: Rise of Nations: Extended Edition
Description:
Rise of Nations Rise of Nations is a real-time strategy game that spans all history. Start with a single city in the Ancient Age; gather resources; build an infrastructure; research technologies; construct Wonders of the World such as the Pyramids and the Eiffel Tower; and expand your military might across the world, conquering hostile nations with bombers, battleships, and tanks—all over your lunch hour! In Rise of Nations there are: 18 Nations—each with special abilities and unique military units. Over a hundred military units operating on the ground, sea, and air— from Hoplites to Frigates to Helicopters. Over two dozen buildings with upgrades and technologies that will take your nation from a small City to an Information Age society. 14 Wonders of the World—the Terra Cotta Army, the Taj Mahal, the Eiffel Tower. Each gives your nation special bonuses. More than a dozen map types, ranging from the Amazon Rainforest to the Himalayas to the Nile Delta. Conquer the World campaign—a linked series of dozens of scenarios. The Extended Edition includes: Rise of Nations Rise of Nations: Thrones and Patriots New in the Extended Edition: Improved Visuals Improved water Improved textures Full-screen anti-aliasing Full Steamworks Integration Multiplayer with ranked matches (ELO) Achievements Trading Cards Cloud saves

**Civilization VI** lets you **build your own empire** and **win in unique ways**. A major change is that **cities now spread out on the map**, letting you claim more land. As you **research new tech and ideas, more options appear**, helping your civilization grow. **Opposing leaders have their own aims based on history**, making the game challenging as you work toward **one of five ways to win**.

The game highlights **your empire growing across the map in new ways**. You can **build special areas** to improve and **customize what your city makes**. This lets you **fit each city to your plan** or use the land around it. To get ahead of others, you can **speed up your civilization's progress**. As one player said, "Being able to **explore, build, and discover with your units** is key to moving faster." Your **relationships with others will also change**. You'll start with tough meetings and move to forming alliances and making deals later on.

Here's how you can achieve victory:

*   **Domination Victory:** Conquer all other civilizations.
*   **Science Victory:** Be the first to launch a spaceship.
*   **Culture Victory:** Achieve a majority of tourists from other civilizations.
*   **Diplomacy Victory:** Earn the most Diplomatic Victory points.
*   **Score Victory:** Have the highest score when the game ends.

In **Mini Motorways**, the objective is to **design and construct efficient road networks** to manage traffic flow within a burgeoning urban environment. Developed by Dinosaur Polo Club, the studio behind the acclaimed Mini Metro, this simulation game tasks players with strategically placing road segments to foster city growth. As the city expands, **adapting your road designs becomes paramount** for maintaining smooth traffic movement.

Successfully managing upgrades, such as implementing **highways** and constructing **roundabouts**, is crucial for meeting the escalating demands of your developing road infrastructure. The game poses a compelling question: "**How long can you keep the cities of the world moving?**"

Mini Motorways provides a **distinctive gameplay experience** characterized by organically developing cities. The maps are visually engaging, drawing inspiration from real-world geographical layouts. Players are presented with numerous upgrade options to effectively manage increasingly complex road systems.

The game prioritizes player comfort and accessibility. Customization options include various color palettes, with special modes available for colorblind players and a dedicated night mode. The immersive soundtrack, composed by Disasterpeace, dynamically evolves alongside the city's growth.

Progression in Mini Motorways involves unlocking new maps and achievements. Players can also generate and share animated GIFs of their city layouts. For those seeking a competitive edge, Mini Motorways features **Daily and Weekly Challenges**, offering an opportunity to test your strategic abilities against a global player base.

RimWorld is a **science fiction colony simulation game** where an **intelligent AI storyteller** crafts your narrative. Inspired by classics, it challenges you to manage three shipwreck survivors on a **distant, uncharted world**. Your main goal is to **oversee every aspect of your colonists' lives**, from their moods and health to their relationships and struggles.

The game features **diverse environments** for your colony:
*   Lush forests
*   Arid deserts
*   Dense jungles
*   Frozen tundras

As your settlement grows, colonists develop **complex relationships**. They form bonds, but these connections are often **prone to volatility**.

Survival in RimWorld is a **constant challenge**. You must **defend your settlement** against threats like:
*   Cunning pirates
*   Hostile tribes
*   Aggressive wildlife
*   Colossal insects
*   Ancient mechanical guardians

To **thrive**, you'll need to **craft essential items**. This requires a broad spectrum of materials, from basic wood and metal to advanced futuristic components.

Beyond defense, RimWorld emphasizes **strategic resource management**. You can:
*   **Tame and train creatures**: from pets to farm animals and attack beasts.
*   **Engage in trade** with passing ships and caravans.
*   **Form your own caravans** for quests, trade, or attacking rivals.
*   **Relocate your entire colony**.

The world of RimWorld is **dynamic and reactive**. You'll face harsh weather, including blizzards and fires, needing **constant vigilance**. The game also presents **difficult moral dilemmas**, forcing you to decide the fate of refugees or prisoners.

Each playthrough generates a **unique, procedurally generated world**, ensuring a **fresh experience**. The game is also **highly customizable** with hundreds of mods available on Steam Workshop. For newcomers, an AI tutor is available.

At its core, RimWorld is a **powerful story generator**. It's designed to **co-create narratives filled with tragedy, triumph, and unexpected twists**. The AI Storyteller controls events that shape your colony's destiny. Different AI Storytellers offer distinct experiences:
*   **Randy Random**: Unpredictable chaos.
*   **Cassandra Classic**: Escalating challenges.
*   **Phoebe Chillax**: A more relaxed pace.

Your colonists are **crash-landed survivors**. You can acquire new colonists through:
*   **Capturing and recruiting them** in combat.
*   Purchasing them from slave traders.
*   Accepting refugees.

Each colonist's background impacts their abilities. A nobleman might excel at social tasks, while a farm oaf has agricultural knowledge but struggles with research.

Colonists' relationships **evolve dramatically**. They form opinions, leading to romance, marriage, infidelity, or conflict. The game generates a planet with varied landing zones. Your colony isn't confined; you can assemble **caravans** to explore or **migrate your entire colony**. Animal husbandry is key, with **lovable pets**, **farm animals**, and **trained attack beasts**.

Colonists react to their surroundings and internal states, influencing their emotions. They respond to hunger, fatigue, death, injuries, and cramped conditions, with stress leading to breakdowns. The game tracks wounds and conditions on each body part, impacting capabilities. Body parts can be repaired or enhanced with prosthetics. Organs can be extracted, sold, bought, and transplanted. RimWorld is also highly accessible for modding, boasting an active community.

## Startopia: Rebuild a Galactic Civilization

The galaxy is in ruins, a **vast expanse of empty relics** from a past apocalypse. But a new era of hope is dawning, and **you are called to lead the rebuilding effort**. Your mission: restore the network of space stations to meet the standards of **various alien races**. By attracting these diverse species, you'll harness their unique expertise and drive forward **new technological advancements**. This journey promises a **humorous and cunning struggle**, filled with daring adventures.

### A Living, Breathing Alien Society

Startopia features a **fully realized alien society** where you'll experience:

*   **Complex interspecies relationships**: From fierce rivalries and budding friendships to the realities of crime and punishment.
*   **Vital leisure and entertainment**: Keeping your citizens happy is key.
*   **A robust and functioning economy**: Essential for growth and prosperity.

### Innovative Gameplay Mechanics

Explore the unique 'Torus' play area, offering a **perspective never before seen in a game**. Each space station is divided into:

*   **16 habitable subsections**: Spread across three decks.
*   **A bio-deck**: Allowing for editable landscapes and manageable ecosystems, giving you **complete control over terraforming**.

### Multiplayer and Varied Challenges

Connect with up to three other stationmasters in multiplayer mode. Startopia offers a range of gameplay experiences:

*   **Simple sandbox mode**: For relaxed exploration.
*   **Detailed station micromanagement**: For those who crave intricate control.

Name: Cities: Skylines
Description:
Cities: Skylines is a modern take on the classic city simulation. The game introduces new game play elements to realize the thrill and hardships of creating and maintaining a real city whilst expanding on some well-established tropes of the city building experience. You’re only limited by your imagination, so take control and reach for the sky! Multi-tiered and challenging simulation Constructing your city from the ground up is easy to learn, but hard to master. Playing as the mayor of your city you’ll be faced with balancing essential requirements such as education, water electricity, police, fire fighting, healthcare and much more along with your citys real economy system. Citizens within your city react fluidly, with gravitas and with an air of authenticity to a multitude of game play scenarios. Extensive local traffic simulation Colossal Order's extensive experience developing the Cities in Motion series is fully utilized in a fully fleshed out and well-crafted local traffic simulation. Districts and Policies Be more than just an administrator from city hall. Designating parts of your city as a district results in the application of policies which results in you rising to the status of Mayor for your own city. Utilize the Day and Night Cycle The city changes during the hours of the day and affects citizen schedules. Traffic is visibly slower at night and some zoned areas do not work with full efficiency. Cities: Skylines will put you in control of managing the different aspects of the day and night cycles. Extensive modding support Build or improve on existing maps and structures. You can then import your creations into the game, share them as well as download the creations of other city builders on the Steam workshop.

**Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition** is a complete real-time strategy package. It celebrates the game's 20th anniversary with a **full remaster**. This version features a **beautiful visual and sound update**, including 4K Ultra HD graphics and a **newly recorded soundtrack**.

The Definitive Edition comes with the **"The Last Khans" expansion**. This adds three new campaigns and four new civilizations. Players can enjoy **over 200 hours of gameplay**. This covers 1,000 years of history across all original campaigns and popular expansions. This large amount of content has been **improved** for a better experience.

Here are some key features and updates that improve gameplay:
