*   **Ongoing Updates:** The game gets regular updates with new content, events, game modes, and fixes.
*   **Co-Op Mode:** Play with friends in cooperative matches.
*   **Many Civilizations:** Pick from **35 unique civilizations** for online games, offering great replay value.
*   **Extra DLCs:** More content, like "Lords of the West," can be bought.
*   **New Game Modes:** Try recent additions like **Battle Royale** and **Quick Play** for relaxed gaming.
*   **Scenario Editor:** The powerful Scenario Editor is still supported.
*   **Better Interface:** The game's interface has been greatly improved for a smoother experience.

Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition lets players **plan and win** in this classic game.

Name: Dead Cells
Description:
Roguelite? Metroidvania? Roguevania! You grew up with the roguelikes, witnessed the rise of the roguelites and even the birth of the roguelite-lites? We'd now like to present for your consideration our RogueVania , the illegitimate child of a modern Roguelite ( Rogue Legacy, Binding of Isaac, Enter the Gungeon, Spelunky, etc.) and an old-school MetroidVania ( Castlevania: SotN and its ilk). Features: RogueVania : The progressive exploration of an interconnected world, with the replayability of a rogue-lite and the adrenaline pumping threat of permadeath. 2D Souls-lite Action : Tough but fair combat, more than fifty weapons and spells with unique gameplay, and of course, the emergency panic roll to get you out of trouble. Nonlinear progression : Sewers, Ossuary or Ramparts? Once unlocked, special permanent abilities allow you to access new paths to reach your objective. Opt for the path that suits your current build, your play style or just your mood. Exploration : Secret rooms, hidden passages, charming landscapes. Take a moment to stroll the towers and breath in that fresh sea mist infused air... Interconnected levels and progressive unlocking of access to the island provides you with a real incentive to explore your surroundings. Add in a degree of evolution for your character and permanent weapon upgrades and you can see where Dead Cells borrows from the long line of MetroidVanias that precede it. At the end of the day though, it’s YOUR skills as a player that matter most! Roguelites are about constantly getting better, until what was an insurmountable obstacle becomes a walk in the park. Unforgiving combat wed to the absence of any kind of safety net makes for an adrenaline pumping ride each and every run and unrivaled replayability. Dead Cells left Early Access on August 7th 2018 and comes with: 13 Levels - Each one with its own atmosphere , foes and secrets to discover. 4 Bosses - Made by the most sadistic of the devs , raised on the salt of the testers. 90 or so weapons and skills - Spears, swords, bows, freeze blast, etc. 4 special powers, unlocking new areas and paths (metroidvania gear lock items). 1 epic responsive, fluid and fun to play combat system. 1 Daily Run Mode Complete with leaderboards for lording it over your mates. Hours of fun (depending on your skill, anything from 10 to 30 hours or more). A few rage-quits, Ok a lot of rage quits… But you’ll git gud… Eventually.

Name: Rogue Legacy 2
Description:
Rogue Legacy is back! But now it's got a 2 on the end of it! Rogue Legacy 2 is a genealogical rogue-LITE. That means it has all the trappings of a typical rogue-like (randomized runs, changing characters, and more), but with persistent upgrades, and persistent dead heirs. In this game, your legacy defines you. Spend your parents’ inheritance and grow the family manor to give your children a better fighting chance. Each child is unique, with their own traits and abilities. Your daughter could be a Ranger. She could also be vegan. It’s a new experience every time. Rogue Legacy 2 also lets you play how you want to. Go hard and fast, and dive deeper into the depths of a randomly-generated world. Or take it slow and steady and build your character up until you’re ready for greater challenges. Every Adventure is Unique New monsters, new traps, and new layouts await you every time you enter the Kingdom. This is a world where improvisation, and not memorization is the key to success. Wildly New Classes No two classes play the same. Hide atop Ivy Canopies as the Ranger, and rain poisoned arrows down onto your foes. Take to the skies as a Dragon Lancer and fly across the skies striking foes at massive speeds. Or sing and dance through your enemies, as the joyous bard, leaving only a trail of bodies behind you. Rogue Legacy 2 supports 15 new classes, with 15 distinct styles of play. Brand New Style We’re taking a whole new artistic approach to Rogue Legacy 2. The sequel features 2.5D stylings, with 3D characters against hand-drawn backdrops. The art uses heavy shading and all animations are done using stepping techniques to keep the familiar RL look and feel. Revamped Biome Generation We went all-out with biome generation to make each area in RL2 feel completely new. Each biome adopts different “build strategies” to create completely unique yet-still-randomly-generated regions. True Metroidvania To really push the metroidvania flair, RL2 introduces heirlooms: special items that permanently give your heroes new abilities that fully reveal the world’s secrets. These are not basic lock-in-key abilities, but powers that fundamentally change how you play. And heirlooms are not simply handed to you. You must prove your worth, provided you can find them. Traits 2.0 Though fun the first time, the traits in RL1 often wore their welcome later in the game. We’ve now added gold modifiers to entice players to take on new challenges. The more debilitating the trait is (in-game), the bigger the reward. This makes choosing your heirs a meaningful decision every time. Relics and Resolve One of the most exciting new features to Rogue Legacy 2 is the ability to pick up Relics, which are unique items that change how your run is played. Gain stat modifiers, complete special challenges, and even gain brand new abilities as you traverse the kingdom. But be careful, the more Relics you obtain the more your resolve is shaken, and all Relics are lost if your hero perishes. Improved Accessibility We’ve taken accessibility to the next level with the introduction of House Rules. Toggle contact damage, tweak global damage and health, and even give yourself flight for difficult platform sections. You have complete control over how you want to play the game. We’ve also introduced new mechanics such as Off-shore Banking to give struggling players more ways to succeed. A Rich Narrative Not only is the lore to the world of Rogue Legacy greatly expanded in the sequel, but it runs deep. New lore awaits you all the multiple NG’s in. Beating the game once is only the beginning. Learn about the inevitable collapse of a once thriving kingdom, and discover the dark secrets of the ones responsible. And connect and build relationships with the characters you meet along the way. New Game+ for Days Your journey has only begun after beating the final boss in RL2. There is a ton more to explore and discover on multiple playthroughs. You must choose how the game gets harder, from unique biome hazards, to special boss fights. The experience keeps changing for near infinite replayability. More of Everything Of course we’re also adding more of everything people loved from the original Rogue Legacy. More traits, more spells, more classes, more biomes, more enemies, more equipment, more rooms, more story. More secrets ... Just more everything. Clownanthropy. Holy smokes! Punching clowns! AND THERE'S A WHOLE LOT MORE. This only scratches the surface of what Rogue Legacy 2 has to offer. Scar Challenges, Fairy Rooms, the Curio Shoppe, the list goes on, but reading is for nerds. Go out and discover the world of Rogue Legacy 2 for yourself! /

**Rogue Legacy: A Generational Saga of Adaptation and Resilience**

**Rogue Legacy** presents a unique rogue-lite experience where heroism is a **generational endeavor**. When your character falls, their heir takes up the mantle, continuing the perilous journey. Each successor is distinct due to their **inherited traits**, which significantly impact gameplay. These can range from sensory challenges like colorblindness and vertigo to physical traits like dwarfism. This clever system emphasizes that **perfection isn't required for victory**, though **mastery of combat is crucial** given the game's difficulty.

The gold collected during each run is used to upgrade your ancestral manor. These upgrades grant your heirs **enhanced abilities**, better preparing them for the darkness within the game. While a short trailer might show the basics, a closer look reveals its captivating core features:

*   **Dynamic Dungeons:** A **newly generated castle** awaits with every adventure, ensuring each playthrough offers a fresh and unpredictable challenge.
*   **The Rogue-lite Cycle:** **Death fuels progress**, it's not the end. Each failure strengthens your lineage, setting up future successes.
*   **Unforeseen Quirks:** A wide array of **unique traits** introduce special challenges and twists to every game. For instance, playing as a dyslexic character adds a distinct strategic layer.
*   **Varied Archetypes:** With **over eight distinct character classes**, each with unique skills, you can **customize your combat style** to your preference.
*   **A Diverse Bestiary:** Confront **more than sixty enemy types**, many with their own variations, demanding constant tactical adaptation.
*   **Extensive Progression:** A **comprehensive, upgradeable skill tree** allows for significant character development. Treasures not only improve the manor but also give your heirs a vital advantage.
*   **Specialized Artisans:** Visit the Blacksmith and Enchantress to acquire **better weapons, armor, and new skills**, like the ability to fly or perform advanced aerial moves.
*   **Enigmatic Discoveries:** The game world is filled with **hidden secrets and fun references** waiting to be found, rewarding thorough exploration.
*   **Intuitive Control:** Rogue Legacy features **excellent controller support** and is Big Picture ready, ensuring a smooth and accessible gaming experience.

Name: ScourgeBringer
Description:
From the developers of NeuroVoider, ScourgeBringer is a fast-paced free-moving roguelite platformer. Set in a post-apocalyptic world where a mysterious entity wreaked havoc on all humanity, ScourgeBringer puts you in the shoes of the deadliest warrior of her clan: Kyhra. Help her to explore the unknown and slash her way through ancient machines guarding the seal of her past, and maybe the redemption of humanity. Dive into fast-paced rogue-platforming gameplay described by Eurogamer as 'Dead Cells meets Celeste' Slash and shoot your way smoothly with super fluid platforming controls Sharpen your skills with a frantic combat system focused on attacks only Dash forward to the otherworldly adaptive sounds of Joonas Turner (Nuclear Throne, Downwell, Broforce...) Defy hordes of unspeakable enemies and giant bosses holding the secrets of the Scourge Explore the infinite depths of an ever-changing dungeon Uncover mysteries and find mementos of previous explorers to unlock reality defining secrets ScourgeBringer is being made with the help of the community ! You can follow its development through our weekly newsletter, or join our Discord.

Embark on a **challenging journey** within the fallen temple of **Dark Devotion**, a game that **tests your Templar faith** against profound mysteries. This immersive narrative invites you to explore a world where devotion demands confronting the deepest darkness to uncover truths that question your very existence.

In **Dark Devotion**, your bravery and piety are measured by your willingness to make **significant sacrifices** in service to your God. The game unfolds a somber story of your Templar religion's compelling call, with each encounter challenging your fortitude and conviction as you navigate a cursed pilgrimage through **four distinct, intricately designed worlds**. Wield numerous weapons, uncover the Temple's secrets, and battle dark enemies and formidable bosses intent on your destruction.

As you explore, you'll discover a variety of weapons, armors, and relics to enhance your character. Each item possesses unique attributes and statistics, further amplified by mystical runes. The developers emphasize, "**It is essential to maximize your strengths and adapt your inventory to the enemy you’re facing.**" Your quest is a narrative of perseverance, dedication, and hidden truths, with every chest and item—be it a letter, weapon, or clue—revealing another fragment of the story. These secrets lie in the shadows or within the remains of fallen characters.

Within the Temple, **Faith is your primary resource** against the enemy hordes. Defeating foes grants Faith, which unlocks secret paths and special chests. However, this resource must be managed carefully, as "**nothing lasts forever.**" Survival hinges on using the right item at the right time to heal wounds or remove curses. Some items are found through looting, while others are hidden, demanding careful consideration. "**The eye of your God is ever-watchful,**" and acts of bravery may earn blessings. Conversely, the Temple harbors despair and sickness, preying on the unwary. Learn its ways quickly, or face the consequences. Salvation is temporary, and each world offers multiple interconnected paths that cannot be revisited. Completing your quest requires a keen understanding of the Temple's secrets; getting lost might even prove beneficial, depending on what you discover. The Temple may reveal a hidden altar for saving your progress if honored correctly, or it may not.

**Dark Devotion** features:
*   **Intense and dynamic combat**
*   Dozens of weapons, armor, and items for **varied combat approaches**
*   A complex system of **blessings, curses, and afflictions**
*   **Challenging boss encounters**
*   A **deep and intricate storyline**
*   **Atmospheric, dark environments**

**Abyss Odyssey: Master Procedural Combat and Enemy Possession**

Dive into **Abyss Odyssey**, a side-scrolling action-adventure game that redefines replayability with its **procedurally generated levels** and a **unique enemy possession mechanic**. Developed by ACE Team, this title offers a fresh and strategically deep combat experience, ensuring that each playthrough presents a new challenge.

The heart of **Abyss Odyssey** lies in its innovative gameplay. Players start with three distinct warriors, each possessing unique abilities. Mastering their special moves is **essential for executing powerful combos** and overcoming the abyss's formidable inhabitants. The game's most striking feature is the ability to **possess your enemies**, granting access to their **unique skills and fighting styles**. This mechanic dramatically expands your combat repertoire. ACE Team highlights that each enemy is designed with the same complexity as the main characters, demanding players utilize **all available tactics to survive**.

**Procedural generation** ensures that every descent into the abyss is a novel adventure, featuring **varied level layouts, enemy placements, and item discoveries**. This design guarantees endless replayability. The combat system draws heavily from fighting games, with each character offering a wide array of attacks and advanced techniques. A dedicated Training room allows players to **practice and develop new combos**, selecting any unlocked character, including enemies, to refine their strategies. You can unlock and level up to three heroes, acquiring new skills and equipment to **customize your play style**. Skill points enhance each hero's unique abilities, while various weapons and accessories introduce new powers. A key feature is the ability to **play as any character encountered, including bosses**, by using an "ultra attack" to steal their souls and transform. ACE Team reports over **30 unique enemies to capture**, each providing entirely new move sets.

The game also fosters community engagement. Players can collaborate to defeat the final boss, unlocking new in-game content, such as additional enemies, through shared achievements. **Abyss Odyssey** showcases stunning Art Nouveau-inspired graphics and a narrative rich with Chilean culture and folklore, set in late 19th-century Santiago. You can enjoy the game solo or team up with a friend via online or local co-op, with the flexibility to join or leave sessions easily. A bonus versus mode supports up to four players in free-for-all or team battles, utilizing any unlocked character for a roster of dozens of fighters.

**A Valley Without Wind: A Genre-Bending Adventure**

Prepare for **A Valley Without Wind**, a game that defies genre expectations. This 2D sidescroller offers a **non-linear path**, blending **action with tactical combat** and **city-building** within a **vast, procedurally-generated world**. **Free-roam exploration** is central to the experience.

Unlike many procedurally generated titles, A Valley Without Wind features a **logical progression in difficulty**, complete with helpful tips and checklists. You can choose how to prepare for the formidable Overlord, earning new spells through missions or discovering **secret missions and hidden stashes of magical crafting loot** in the wilds.

**Character customization** is key. Combine unique enchants and spells to alter your movement, jumping, and combat abilities. You can also **rescue and recruit NPCs** to your settlement, empowering them to undertake dispatch missions and help manage your growing civilization. The world dynamically adapts to your choices, offering a personalized gameplay experience.

The game features an **ever-expanding world** where you can journey alone or with friends through a landscape filled with dangerous creatures, potent magic, advanced technology, and intriguing mysteries. You have **unparalleled freedom** to explore the procedurally generated sandbox of Environ, even confronting the Overlord directly, though success is not guaranteed.

Upon saving one continent, a larger and more intricate one emerges, offering **endless progression**. The game intelligently scales with your proficiency, upgrading monsters and missions. For example, after defeating 100 bats, expect to face **"bats on fire!"**

**Deep character customization** allows you to create specialized builds by combining spells, enchants, and equipment. Embrace **permadeath with persistent progress**; while characters are lost, your inventory, enchants, and overall game progress are retained. Become a **community leader** by rescuing NPCs, constructing buildings, improving their skills and mood, and dispatching them to aid you. **Clever problem-solving** is encouraged, as challenges offer multiple solutions with distinct advantages and disadvantages. You can also enjoy **customizable difficulty** settings for platforming, combat, and city-building.

All owners of Valley 1 receive the improved sequel, **Valley 2**, for free. Valley 2 offers a more focused, non-sandbox gameplay style, and you gain access to both games for the price of one.

Aura of Worlds is a **creative tactics rogue-lite platformer** that challenges players to explore diverse worlds and overcome obstacles with ingenuity. Success demands careful planning, sharp wits, and quick reflexes to navigate ever-changing, perilous labyrinths filled with dynamic hazards like flooding passages and toxic pollen. Players will also confront **massive bosses that inhabit entire mazes**.

The game offers a variety of combat and exploration approaches, allowing for diverse playstyles. Players can choose a defensive strategy with a spear and energy shield, or an aggressive approach using a boomerang and grapple hook. Resource management is also key; you'll need to decide whether to meticulously search levels for potions and runes or plunge directly into the action.

**Key Features of Aura of Worlds:**

*   **Diverse Challenges:** Encounter over 80 unique enemies and traps across more than 12 randomized level themes, including mine-filled tidal corridors, rising lava, and caverns with toxic and carnivorous plants. Explore four primary world types—grotto, gardens, temple, and cold crust caverns—each with distinct layouts, enemies, and bosses.
*   **Creative Problem Solving:** Aura of Worlds emphasizes player agency by offering **multiple solutions for every challenge**. For instance, to reach a chest across a lava pit, players can use the grapple hook, manipulate time to bounce off enemies, employ a boomerang, or even use a grenade to detonate the pit.
*   **Versatile Abilities and Objects:** Utilize a wide array of creative abilities, from advanced parkour and cloaking to time manipulation. Furthermore, **every object possesses multiple uses**. A ceiling-mounted lantern, for example, can be detached and used as a portable light source or an improvised incendiary weapon.
*   **Engaging Presentation:** Experience hand-crafted pixel art and animations, complemented by a unique musical score.
*   **Ongoing Development:** The game is functionally complete but remains under active development with regular content updates. Aura of Worlds was community-approved via Greenlight in 2016.

**Frequently Asked Questions:**

*   **Gamepad Compatibility:** Xbox and Xbox 360 controllers are currently compatible, as are other Xinput controllers. PlayStation controllers are not natively supported. Keyboard and mouse controls are fully supported.
*   **Storyline:** While the current build features minimal story exposition, a loose narrative is planned for integration as development progresses.
*   **Performance and Support:** For players experiencing performance issues on older computers, optimization tips are available on a dedicated forum thread. Players are encouraged to visit the forums to report bugs, issues, or provide suggestions, as the development team actively monitors these forums daily.
*   **Gameplay Mechanics:** Default gamepad controls differ slightly from common conventions due to optional 360-degree aiming, but button remapping is available. The game is designed to be challenging, with frequent deaths expected during initial playthroughs. Importantly, players are not subject to stunlocking or one-hit eliminations. Mastering the ability to multitask between different skills will significantly enhance survivability. The game presents a steeper learning curve than typical platformers, especially within the first 25 minutes.

**GetsuFumaDen: Undying Moon: A Roguelike Hack-and-Slash Masterpiece**

**GetsuFumaDen: Undying Moon** offers a compelling blend of **intense roguelike hack-and-slash action** set within a **stunning dark fantasy world**. This unique experience is brought to life through the **traditional artistry of Japanese ukiyo-e**, creating a visual spectacle that is as beautiful as it is deadly. As the **chosen leader and guardian of the land of the living**, you must wield the **otherworldly arsenal and powers of the Getsu clan**. Your mission is to overcome multiple 'Deaths' and descend deeper into the **treacherous depths of Hell** to eradicate the source of a cataclysmic event.

The game's world is a breathtaking canvas, drawing inspiration from the **iconic Japanese ukiyo-e art style**, featuring **vibrant, dynamic 2D animations**. Prepare to face **massive and fearsome monsters and yokai**, including a reanimated demon lord, a colossal centipede, and a terrifying five-headed hydra. Master the **rhythm of intense sword fighting action**, where pacing and timing are deeply inspired by **Japanese martial arts**. Utilize the **unique special moves** of a diverse array of weapon types, such as katanas, battle umbrellas, and spears, to outsmart and defeat your enemies.

In **GetsuFumaDen**, **death is not the end**. The world of Hell is a living entity, presenting **new map layouts and challenges with each attempt**. Benefit from **permanent upgrades, customizable weapons, and variable level progression**, ensuring that every run offers fresh opportunities. Take **complete control over your arsenal** through a robust crafting process, where you can **collect, enhance, and unlock abilities** for both your main and sub weapons. Discover new enhancements for your favorite weapons with each descent, and get back into the action stronger than before. As you delve deeper, **collect souls to power up in real time**, allowing you to **dynamically and strategically select enhancements**.

The **Digital Deluxe Edition** includes the **Bonus Game - 1987 FC version 'GetsuFumaDen'**, featuring an added English Menu, the original Japanese guidebook, and Quick Save features. It also includes a **Digital Artbook** with 29 pages of **key art, stage art, character designs, and lore**, and a **Mini-OST** with **15 tracks** from the game's atmospheric soundtrack. As one reviewer noted, the game "masterfully blends intense roguelike hack-and-slash action with a stunning dark fantasy world."

**Dungeon Warriors: A Roguelike Shooter with Evolving Gameplay**

Prepare for **Dungeon Warriors**, a dynamic barrage shooter where your character evolves as you navigate its **randomly generated levels**. Your journey involves collecting **valuable loot**, uncovering **hidden secrets**, and confronting a **diverse array of enemies**. Engaging with characters like businessmen and shopkeepers can also provide **powerful items** to assist you. The core goal is simple: **grow stronger and survive**.

We must unfortunately announce a delay for "Dungeon Warriors." This decision is made to allow for **further enhancements and improvements** to the game. We are now targeting a **September launch** and deeply appreciate your continued enthusiasm and support.

The game remains in active development. Here's a glimpse of what awaits you:

**Enemies You'll Face:**

*   **Red Zombie:** Exhibits erratic movement, increasing its speed when it detects you.
*   **Green Zombie:** Moves unpredictably and accelerates when you are near, with varying attack power.
*   **Skeletons with Guns:** Periodically unleash a volley of 1-3 bullets.
*   **Skeletons Holding Swords:** Randomly hurl 1-3 swords.
*   **Skeleton Bomb Monster:** Capable of throwing 1-3 bombs.
*   **Blue Standing Pile:** Unleashes a widespread barrage of bullets.
*   **Golden Bird:** Fires bullets that spin in reaction to your movements.
*   **King Kong Robot:** Its specific actions and role will be revealed during gameplay.

**Key Features of the Game:**

*   **Dynamic Weather System:** Creates a unique environment for every playthrough.
*   **Atmospheric Lighting:** Enhances the game's visual appeal and mood.
*   **Random Weapon Drops:** Ensures each combat encounter feels fresh.
*   **Procedurally Generated Maps:** Offers **endless exploration** in newly created areas.
*   **Varied Enemy Encounters:** Keeps the gameplay consistently engaging.
*   **Random Power-Ups:** Provides temporary advantages to **turn the tide of battle**.
*   **Persistent Progression:** **Retain earned upgrades** for lasting achievement.
*   **Advanced Enemy AI:** Monsters demonstrate intelligent movement and pursuit tactics.

**Trials Evolution: Gold Edition Revives Motorcycle Stunt Thrills on PC**

PC gamers can now experience the intense motorcycle stunt challenges of the **Trials series** once more with the release of **Trials Evolution: Gold Edition**. This complete package brings back the popular franchise, which first appeared on PC with **Trials 2 SE** in 2008. Developer RedLynx, responding to fan requests, has released a full collection that includes two Trials games previously unavailable on PC.

The **Gold Edition** offers a significant amount of content:

*   The complete **Trials Evolution** game, highly praised on XBLA.
*   All single-player tracks and skill games from the original **Trials HD**.

Together, these provide **many challenging courses** and engaging, physics-driven motorcycle action.

**Trials Evolution: Gold Edition** has been **carefully updated and optimized for PC**. The core elements that made the series a hit are kept and improved. A key feature is the **powerful in-game editor**, which allows players to:

*   **Design and build their own custom tracks**.
*   **Share their creations with players everywhere**.

As one commentator observed, "Player-created content is vital to the Trials experience, building a lively and lasting community." Player-made tracks can be easily shared worldwide through the built-in **sharing system**. For those looking to compete, **global leaderboards** let players compare their best times. The game also includes:

*   Engaging **multiplayer modes**.
*   A variety of **indoor and outdoor environments**.
*   Extensive **bike and rider customization options**.
*   Exciting **global challenges**.

Name: Lonely Mountains: Downhill
Description:
Just you and your bike - take it on a thrilling ride down an unspoiled mountain landscape. Make your way through thick forests, narrow trails and wild rivers. Race, jump, slide and try not to crash - all the way from the peak to the valley! Explore the rich mountain worlds at your own pace or face the ticking clock. Each mountain features several trails - ride along quiet mountain lakes, majestic forests and steep canyons. A custom physics system lets you carefully drop from boulder to boulder, sprint over abysses or slide through muddy grounds. It’s all up to you! Take the relaxing scenic route or go off-road to find the fastest way to the finish line! Master the tight and responsive controls to make your way to hidden resting places and secret shortcuts. No audience, no barrier tapes - experience a beautiful nature unspoiled by men. Unlock new difficulty modes and prove your speed-running talents on the leaderboards! Train your skills day and night to ultimately compete with the best riders in the world in the risky Free Ride mode! Each bike handles differently, so find the perfect one for your playstyle and make your way down the mountain to unlock dozens of paint jobs and outfits! JOIN HERE!

Descenders is an exhilarating downhill biking game that reinvents the genre. Developed by the creators of Action Henk, it offers an experience that is **easy to pick up but difficult to perfect**. The game's main draw is its **ever-changing environments**, with each downhill run presenting a fresh challenge. To perform impressive tricks and maintain control, you'll need to master the **realistic physics engine**.

Descenders also features a "Rogue-Bike Mode" where you can unlock **useful abilities** and upgrades. Your achievements are tracked on an **online leaderboard**, allowing you to showcase your skills and earn new bikes and gear. Adding to the excitement is a **lively soundtrack** from the drum & bass label Liquicity. The ultimate objective is to reach **legendary status** by finishing the game in one continuous run.

Your path is connected to the team you join. Select from three unique factions: **Team Enemy** (bold tricks), **Team Arboreal** (natural landscapes), or **Team Kinetic** (maximum speed). Joining a team allows you to connect with like-minded players. Wearing your team's colors and equipment can unlock **special rewards**. The team that earns the most Reputation receives special prizes and claims a top spot on the Descenders Discord. As a developer mentioned, "We truly value our community, encouraging a feeling of connection and good-natured rivalry."

Experience the **thrill of MotoGP™** with MotoGP™14, the official video game that immersizes you in the world of motorcycle racing. This highly anticipated title features:

*   **Complete rider rosters** from both the 2013 and 2014 seasons.
*   **Iconic riders** from MotoGP™'s storied past.

Race on all official circuits, including the thrilling new **Argentina track**. Compete against rivals in a variety of engaging game modes.

MotoGP™14 introduces **enhanced gameplay mechanics** for a superior racing experience. Challenge yourself in the online Split Battle mode or revisit pivotal historical races in the offline Real Events 2013 mode. For players seeking a **greater challenge**, the in-depth career mode provides ample opportunities for development and competition.

A **significant advancement** drives MotoGP™14, powered by a **completely new graphics engine**. Developers Milestone emphasized that this enhancement contributes to a more **authentic and captivating** portrayal of the sport. You will truly sense the **velocity and exhilaration** of being a professional MotoGP™ rider in this **premium simulation**, which masterfully encapsulates the essence of motorcycle racing. Milestone's dedication to **precision** provides the most **captivating MotoGP™ journey** to date. As Milestone stated, the new engine makes the sport feel more "realistic and intense." This dedication to **authenticity** ensures an **unforgettable MotoGP™ adventure**.

Name: RIDE 3
Description:
Feel the adrenaline and experience the most complete racing ever with RIDE 3! Immerse yourself in a modern 3D environment where you will live side by side with your bike, modifying it mechanically and aesthetically thanks to the new Livery Editor, which will let your dreams run wild. Before starting, don't forget to customise your rider with the right outfit. THE BIKES More than 230 bike models available from the very first day, with more than 70 new models never seen before in a RIDE game. 30 different brands, both historic and contemporary, of which 9 are completely new. 7 different categories to satisfy every taste and riding style. THE TRACKS RIDE 3 will be a journey around the globe thanks to its 30 different tracks created from zero and faithfully reproduced via photogrammetry and drone scanning. Hurtle down breathtaking roads all around the world, including GP tracks, Road and Supermoto tracks, enjoy the panoramas of street and country tracks and compete in street and acceleration races. LIVERY EDITOR Choose your favourite bike and make it unique, just like your style. Create your livery from scratch, choose a background colour and an endless amount of 2D shapes, designs and effects. Work on various levels to create infinite compositions and find the aesthetic which works for you. Riding a bike is great. Riding a bike which you've created yourself is fantastic. Seeing other riders and players from all over the world racing in your livery is simply the best! CAREER The new career will be a Single Player experience which has never been seen before. Forget the old linear progression: the new Volumes-based system will allow you to collect, read and participate in races and competitions through more than 50 magazines. Each one will catapult you into a unique game experience, made up of competitions and anecdotes about the motorcycling world, which will improve your experience in RIDE 3. What are you waiting for? Start your adventure with RIDE 3.

**RIDE: Experience Realistic Motorcycle Racing**

**RIDE** offers a **realistic motorcycle racing simulation**, aiming to capture the true feeling of riding. Get ready for an **exciting journey** on various tracks worldwide.

The core of **RIDE** is its **World Tour mode**. Here, you'll find Motorcycle Festivals with three race types: fast-paced **GP Tracks**, scenic **Country Tracks**, and challenging **City Tracks**. The game features over 100 licensed motorcycles. A **new physics system** is key, giving each bike unique handling. You can **upgrade and customize your bikes**, affecting how they perform and look. The main goal is to **reach the top of the global leaderboards**.

Beyond the World Tour, **RIDE** includes other modes:

*   Quick Race
*   Time Trial
*   Split Screen
*   Online races for up to 12 players

You can also personalize your rider with different outfits and modify your bikes with various parts. The game has 15 unique race tracks. An "Evolving Track System" changes track conditions during races, requiring **quick reactions and smart strategy**. As a developer noted, "We wanted to create a truly authentic racing experience, from the bike physics to the immersive environments."

**RIDE 2: Your Ultimate Motorcycle Digital Garage**

RIDE 2 offers an unparalleled motorcycle experience, letting you discover, customize, and test the world's fastest and most iconic bikes. Compete with renowned brands and showcase their full potential in this unique video game.

**Explore a Vast Collection of Bikes and Tracks**

The game features **over 170 bikes** from various categories, including Nakeds and Supersports. Feel the thrill of racing on **over 30 diverse tracks**, including legendary circuits like the Nürburgring Nordschleife. You'll also find new categories such as Sport Bike 2 Strokes, Supermotos, and Naked Café Racers.

**Customize Your Ride and Rider**

Personalize your bikes with **over 1200 customizable parts** and **600+ liveries**. Modify five key areas: Engine, Brakes and Suspension, Wheels, Transmission, and Aesthetics. Tailor your rider's profile, clothing (Street/Race/Supermoto), and riding style with an advanced pose editor.

**Experience Diverse Game Modes**

RIDE 2 offers **12 distinct game modes** for a long-lasting and fun experience. Master challenging tracks, compete in special slaloms, and outmaneuver opponents. The game also includes new social features and friends integration for an enhanced experience.

**Urban Trial Freestyle: Master the City Streets on Your Bike**

**Urban Trial Freestyle** turns the urban landscape into your personal extreme sports arena. This game lets you execute **impressive stunts** such as backflips, 360s, wallrides, and ollies on a customized trials bike, offering unparalleled freedom.

You have the ability to adjust your bike for peak performance in either **Time Attack** or **Stunt mode**. Strategic decisions are vital, as you must carefully balance **speed and style** to develop your own distinctive riding approach.

Test your skills against the best in **Ghost Mode**, where you race against recorded performances of skilled riders. The game presents **numerous distinct and complex levels** crafted for lasting engagement, motivating you to achieve **flawless performances** and aim to **surpass top global competitors**.

One developer highlighted the game's objective: to deliver an "authentic experience" through "sophisticated physics and fluid animations."

**Key Features:**

*   **Engaging Environments:** Discover 5 unique and captivating settings.
*   **Varied Gameplay:** Conquer Stunt, Time Attack, and special Challenges.
*   **Customization:** Personalize both your bike and your rider.
*   **Authentic Simulation:** Enjoy advanced physics and seamless animations.
*   **Global Competition:** Vie for top rankings on over 140 online leaderboards and utilize Ghost mode.

**Ducati World Championship: Conquer the Motorcycle Racing Circuit**

Experience the adrenaline of professional motorcycle racing with **Ducati World Championship**. This engaging simulation game places you directly in the rider's seat, featuring **legendary Ducati motorcycles**. You gain access to over 70 **genuine Ducati models**, each meticulously crafted to mirror its real-world performance. The game offers a comprehensive exploration of Ducati's storied racing legacy.

**Ducati World Championship** provides a **true-to-life simulation** of elite motorcycle racing. Begin your journey as an amateur and advance through semi-professional and professional levels. Your ultimate ambition is to secure victory in the esteemed **Superbike and Grand World Championships**.

Prove your abilities on more than 34 **demanding circuits**, each engineered to offer a distinct racing atmosphere. Challenge friends in **split-screen multiplayer** or participate in 60 tournaments across five varied game modes. Feel the raw power of Ducati superbikes, capable of speeds surpassing **210 MPH**, as seen in models like the Ducati Desmosedici.

The game showcases a wide array of motorcycles, including:

*   **Classic models**
*   **Potent Sports and Road bikes**
*   **Cutting-edge Grand Prix machines**

Immerse yourself in dynamic races affected by **changing weather and track conditions**, all enhanced by realistic lighting.

Refine your riding prowess with "Loris' Riding Lessons" to master **advanced racing techniques**. Navigate the challenging Career Mode, facing increasingly skilled AI competitors. With three distinct play styles—arcade, normal, and simulation—**Ducati World Championship** guarantees **extended periods of thrilling racing excitement**.

**Urban Trial Tricky™ Deluxe Edition** is a thrilling motorbike stunt game that lets you **master the urban landscape**. This edition provides a full range of tricks, stylish moves, and tough levels for an engaging experience. 🏍️

The game combines tricks, platforming, and racing for **fun gameplay**. Players can master and link killer tricks into endless combos for smooth performance. With over 30 levels, side challenges, and three single-player modes, there's a lot to explore. You can also **personalize your rider and bike** with many customization options.

Key features include:

*   **Extensive Customization:**
    *   New rider skins
    *   Special tricks
    *   Matching motorbike paint jobs
*   **Engaging Gameplay:**
    *   Over 30 levels
    *   Side challenges
    *   Three single-player modes
*   **Competitive Play:**
    *   Aim to **top the competitive leaderboards**
    *   Enjoy replayability with the freedom to ride in both directions

Defy gravity with **crazy tricks** and become a trickster! Jump on your bike to perform incredible tricks and combos. Ride with freedom, spin through the air, and switch directions easily. Get lost in the fun, fast-paced gameplay, vibrant visuals, and smooth controls. As one reviewer noted, the game offers a "**truly exhilarating ride**" with its dynamic trick system.

Develop your personal style by learning new moves:

*   Freestyle moves
*   Breakdance moves
*   FMX moves

Unlock wild costumes and customize your motorbike. Conquer challenges and master outstanding maneuvers to dominate the leaderboards. The game encourages players to "**push the boundaries of what's possible on two wheels**."

Name: BioShock™
Description:
BioShock is a shooter unlike any you've ever played, loaded with weapons and tactics never seen. You'll have a complete arsenal at your disposal from simple revolvers to grenade launchers and chemical throwers, but you'll also be forced to genetically modify your DNA to create an even more deadly weapon: you. Injectable plasmids give you super human powers: blast electrical currents into water to electrocute multiple enemies, or freeze them solid and obliterate them with the swing of a wrench. No encounter ever plays out the same, and no two gamers will play the game the same way. Biologically modify your body: send fire storming from your fingertips and unleash a swarm of killer hornets hatched from the veins in your arms. Hack devices and systems, upgrade your weapons and craft new ammo variants. Turn everything into a weapon: the environment, your body, fire and water, and even your worst enemies. Explore an incredible and unique art deco world hidden deep under the ocean. BioShock: Breaking the Mold A free download that takes an inside look at the art of BioShock. Download it now (75MB .PDF)

**BioShock Infinite: Unraveling the Mysteries of Columbia's Sky-City**

**BioShock Infinite** plunges players into the role of Booker DeWitt, a former U.S. Cavalry veteran burdened by debt. His quest for redemption centers on a dangerous mission: to rescue Elizabeth, a young woman held captive since childhood within the **awe-inspiring yet deeply unsettling flying city of Columbia**. As Booker and Elizabeth are forced to depend on one another, a **profound connection develops amidst their desperate flight**. Together, they must wield **potent weaponry and remarkable powers**, confronting adversaries across the clouds. Their adventure requires them to navigate the airborne metropolis's perils and expose its **hidden, disturbing truths**.

The game's story unfolds in 1912, a period where the **"City in the Sky," Columbia, stands as a testament to technological advancement**, masking a sinister reality. Booker, a hired operative, is assigned this rescue, with his survival contingent on its success.

Players can engage in combat by **"Whipping, Zipping, and Killing"** through Columbia's Sky-Lines, transforming them into weaponized pathways for rapid close-quarters engagements. A central gameplay element is the capacity to **"Tear Through Time,"** altering reality by opening rifts that reshape the combat arena and conjure vital supplies. Moreover, players can unleash **"Vigorous Powers,"** destructive supernatural abilities such as conjuring fire or commanding lightning. This facilitates a **"Custom Combat Experience,"** empowering players to forge their unique approach to navigating the floating city.

Upon finishing the game, players gain access to **"1999 Mode,"** a demanding challenge tailored for dedicated gamers, presenting a unique and rigorous gameplay style. As one reviewer observed, "The game expertly merges narrative richness with groundbreaking gameplay systems, resulting in a truly memorable journey."

Name: Thief™ Gold
Description:
Stalk your prey on the quest for stolen goods with your blackjack, sword, and an assortment of unique arrows. Steal for money and uncover the hidden agendas of your allies and enemies as you play through an unravelling story of deception and revenge. Survive in a world where shadows are your only ally, trust is not an option, and confrontation results in death! Key Features: Pioneering stealth based gameplay brings a new dimension to first person action. Thief™ Gold includes Thief™ The Dark Project (12 huge missions with multiple environments) and the Gold update (3 new campaign missions which deepen the plot and add five new types of enemies) Advanced enemies can see, hear, speak, and sound alarms. Your arsenal includes: blackjack, sword, fire arrows, water arrows, rope arrows and more

## Dishonored: A Supernatural Assassin's Revenge

Dishonored is a deeply immersive first-person action game that places you in the role of a supernatural assassin fueled by a burning desire for revenge. The game's exceptionally flexible combat system empowers you to creatively eliminate your targets by seamlessly blending supernatural abilities, a diverse arsenal of weapons, and an array of unusual gadgets. You can choose to pursue your enemies under the cloak of darkness, moving like a phantom, or to launch a direct, ruthless assault with weapons drawn. Crucially, the outcome of each mission is directly shaped by the critical choices you make throughout your journey.

### The City of Dunwall: A World of Shadows and Intrigue

The narrative of Dishonored unfolds in Dunwall, a sprawling industrial whaling city where peculiar steampunk-inspired technology and unsettling otherworldly forces exist in a precarious balance within the shadows. You begin as the once-trusted bodyguard of the beloved Empress. However, you are unjustly framed for her murder, transforming you into an infamous assassin, recognized solely by the disturbing mask that has become your chilling calling card. This is a period of profound uncertainty; the city is not only besieged by a devastating plague but also governed by a corrupt regime wielding advanced industrial technologies. Amidst this turmoil, dark forces conspire to bestow upon you extraordinary abilities, far surpassing those of any ordinary man, but this power comes at a significant cost. The truth behind your betrayal remains as obscure as the murky waters surrounding the city, and the life you once knew is irrevocably lost.

### Key Features: Unlocking Your Assassin's Potential

#### Improvise and Innovate Your Playstyle

Approach each assassination with a unique style tailored to your preferences. You can leverage the advantages of shadow and sound to navigate levels silently, remaining unseen by your adversaries, or opt for a head-on confrontation, engaging enemies as they react to your aggressive presence. The game's remarkably flexible combat system encourages you to creatively combine your innate abilities, potent supernatural powers, and ingenious gadgets as you progress through the levels and dispatch your objectives. The freedom to improvise and innovate is paramount in defining your personal play style.

#### Action with Meaningful Consequences

The world of Dishonored dynamically reacts to your actions and the way you choose to play. You can move through the environment like a ghost, actively resisting the city's corruption, or you can show no mercy, leaving a devastating path of destruction in your wake. Your decision regarding the approach for each mission directly influences the subsequent outcomes, ensuring that your choices have tangible and lasting effects.

#### Master Supernatural Abilities

The game offers a suite of potent supernatural abilities that dramatically expand your tactical options. You can utilize teleportation for stealthy infiltrations, possess any living creature to manipulate your surroundings, or even stop time itself to orchestrate unearthly and precise executions. Combining these extraordinary supernatural abilities with your arsenal of weapons unlocks even more inventive ways to overcome obstacles and efficiently eliminate your targets. Furthermore, the game's comprehensive upgrade system allows for the mastery of deadly new abilities and the development of devious gadgets, further enhancing your assassin's toolkit.

#### A City Unlike Any Other

Dishonored invites you to explore an original world meticulously envisioned by Viktor Antonov, the art director behind the acclaimed Half-Life 2. Arkane Studios and Bethesda Softworks present a captivating steampunk city where the forces of industry and the supernatural collide, forging an atmosphere thick with intrigue and mystery. This richly detailed world is yours to discover and explore at your own pace.

**Opus Magnum**, a celebrated puzzle game from Zachtronics, invites players into a world where mastering the **transmutation engine** is paramount. This core mechanic allows for the creation of diverse items, from essential medicines to valuable gems and powerful weaponry, underscoring the game's focus on alchemical engineering.

The game vividly illustrates the vital role of alchemy in sustaining society. As **Anataeus Vaya**, a prominent alchemist from **House Van Tassen**, states, "Alchemists are highly coveted—and exceptionally perilous." This sentiment encapsulates the dual nature of alchemical pursuits: their immense value to civilization is matched by inherent risks, a theme echoed by the considerable wealth of House Van Tassen.

**Opus Magnum** delivers a rich and compelling experience through several key features:

*   **Intricate Machine Design:** Players are tasked with designing and building complex alchemical apparatuses. This involves the strategic use of programmable arms, tracks, and unique components such as **Van Berlo's wheel** and the **Glyph of Animismus** to achieve desired alchemical outcomes.
*   **Challenging Problem-Solving:** The game presents intricate puzzles that encourage players to devise the most efficient and elegant solutions. Successful contraptions can be shared as animated GIFs.
*   **Vibrant Community and Shared Content:** The **Steam Workshop** serves as a hub for players to create and distribute their own puzzles. Additionally, players can explore puzzles featured in the **Journal of Alchemical Engineering**, another Zachtronics title.
*   **Compelling Narrative:** The game weaves a story of intrigue and hidden truths among the city's established families. Alchemists, with their ability to fabricate nearly anything, are highly prized yet also represent a significant potential danger.
*   **A Moment of Respite:** For those seeking a diversion from complex alchemical challenges, **Sigmar's Garden** provides a simple solitaire game.

Torchlight II delivers an **expanded and enhanced Action RPG experience**, building upon the beloved charm of its predecessor. This installment significantly broadens the game world and introduces key features like **online and LAN multiplayer**, promising a thrilling adventure with **randomized levels, enemies, and loot** for endless replayability. The fate of the world once again rests in your hands.

Players can dive into a world with diverse **character classes**, each boasting unique play styles. You can select between male or female heroes and **customize their appearances** to craft a truly personal avatar. The game features robust **multiplayer options** for free cooperative play, whether through LAN or the internet, with a sophisticated matchmaking system to connect you with players worldwide.

Journey through Vilderan's **open world**, traversing its vast overworld and numerous towns. The game boasts dynamic environments with **rain, snow, and day/night cycles**. As one developer noted, "**Level randomization** guarantees fresh layouts, unique paths, varied loot, and challenging monsters with every playthrough." This commitment to replayability is a cornerstone of the Torchlight II experience.

Further personalize your adventure with extensive **mod support** available through the Steam Workshop. Access over a thousand community-created modifications, or utilize the powerful **GUTS editor** to create and share your own content. The challenge intensifies with **New Game Plus**, enabling you to replay with your existing character for a **significantly greater challenge**. You'll keep your skills, gold, and gear, leading to more rewarding playthroughs. Fan-favorite features such as **pets and fishing** make a comeback, enhanced with more options and improved visuals. Your pet will continue to assist by selling loot, allowing you to remain focused on the action.

**Return to Rapture: BioShock 2 Delves Deeper into the Underwater Metropolis**

**BioShock 2** plunges players back into the atmospheric depths of Rapture, a decade after the original game's harrowing events. This time, you step into the heavy boots of a **Big Daddy**, a formidable protector tasked with navigating the city's decaying grandeur. Your mission is to confront a chilling new threat: the abduction of young girls. You must **unravel the mysteries behind this resurgence of past evils** and fight for survival within this once-utopian, now-ruined world. As one critic noted, the game allows players to "truly **feel the raw power of Rapture's most feared resident**," battling a host of new adversaries with an **improved combat system**. This enhanced gameplay allows for innovative strategies through the dual-wielding of weapons and Plasmids, enabling exciting and dynamic combat combinations that advance one of gaming's most captivating and terrifying storylines.

Beyond the gripping single-player narrative, **BioShock 2** offers a wealth of engaging content. The **Protector Trials** provide intense combat challenges designed to test your mastery of weapons and Plasmids. In these trials, you must defend your Little Sister as she gathers ADAM from fallen foes, facing escalating opposition with unique weapon and Plasmid load-outs. Successful completion unlocks an additional bonus load-out, rewarding your skill.

Adding another dimension to the BioShock universe, the multiplayer mode serves as a rich prequel, exploring the origins of Rapture and its inhabitants during the city's catastrophic fall. Playing as a Plasmid test subject for Sinclair Solutions, you'll need to **master the full BioShock arsenal**. This genetically enhanced multiplayer allows you to earn experience points to unlock new Weapons, Plasmids, and Tonics, creating hundreds of unique character builds suited to your playstyle. You will **witness Rapture's civil war firsthand**, fighting as its citizens in the conflict that tore the city apart. Furthermore, you can **explore Rapture before its collapse**, engaging in combat within iconic locations like the Kashmir Restaurant and Mercury Suites, meticulously recreated for the multiplayer arenas. This robust multiplayer experience was developed by Digital Extremes.

**BioShock 2** also boasts substantial downloadable content. The **Sinclair Solutions Test Pack** allows players to reach rank 50, offers new weapon upgrades, includes 20 additional Trials, and adds two new playable characters with five new Masks. The **Rapture Metro Map Pack** introduces six new maps within the Rapture Metro system, while the **"Golf" Melee Mode** offers a unique combat experience transforming blunt objects into golf clubs. Players can also embody distinct multiplayer characters Zigo & Blanche. All downloadable content requires the full game to play.

**Thief II: The Metal Age** invites you back into the shadows as Garrett, the master thief, for a **captivating stealth-action experience**. This sequel immerses you in a world grappling with **emerging technologies, powerful religious factions, and pervasive corruption**. Your ability to succeed relies entirely on your **strategic thinking and precise execution**.

The game features **fifteen expansive, non-linear environments**. These vast maps provide ample opportunity for **acquiring hidden treasures and silently evading vigilant adversaries**. Reviewers lauded the **significantly improved enemy artificial intelligence**, which elevates the challenge and compels players to continuously adapt their tactics. Garrett is equipped with **innovative gadgets and sophisticated thieving gear** to aid his endeavors. The **compelling narrative** progresses across these fifteen missions, enriched by intricate subplots that enhance its complexity. The game's enduring legacy is underscored by its inclusion on **Gamespy's Greatest Games of All Time** list and its recognition with the **Outstanding Achievement in Character or Story Development** award at the 2000 Academy of Interactive Arts and Sciences Awards.

Embark on a **unique Victorian space adventure** with ***Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition***. This definitive version places you in command of a **steam locomotive** as a burgeoning empire boldly explores the cosmos. The **comprehensive package** includes all post-launch updates, featuring:

*   **New officers, enemies, engines, stories, and even mascots.**
*   A **reimagined region**.
*   The new "**Full Steam**" mode for extended voyages.
*   **Horn functionality**.
*   Numerous **quality-of-life improvements**.

Your journey begins by defining your captain's past, choosing from a streetwise urchin to a devout priest or fiery revolutionary. You'll uncover their **deepest motivations and secrets**. As your character evolves, you'll select another defining history aspect, such as being the **Black Sheep** or having a **Lost Love**. The unforgiving skies mean most captains perish, but their **legacy endures** through crucial inheritances passed to their successors.

Explore the rich, dark, and wondrous Fallen London Universe, a setting familiar to *Sunless Sea* players, though no prior experience is necessary for this new story. The High Wilderness presents a **breathtaking yet terrifying vision of space** where normal rules are suspended. Encounter howling winds through celestial ruins, fogs in stellar jungles, and industrial smog. The Judgements, vast intelligences governing existence, are mysteriously fading. Your captain must navigate this impossible world through a combination of:

*   **Trade**
*   **Exploration**
*   **Combat**
*   **Survival**

Your locomotive is your **sole defense**. Maintain and upgrade it with **exotic weapons and equipment**, such as a Pneumatic Mining Array or the Brassraven. Craft powerful weapons from defeated foes and acquire new locomotives, like the Pellinore-class Trader or Medea-class Destroyer. Battle a variety of threats, including:

*   Rival locomotives
*   Pirates
*   Imperial warships
*   Monstrous entities like the Undeparted
*   Swarms of Chorister-bees

**Play factions against each other** and learn enemy combat styles. Utilize Full Steam mode for **strategic escapes or pursuits**. Manage crew morale and your captain's nightmares, balancing fuel and supplies with your drive for exploration, knowledge, or riches. The darkness profoundly transforms those who venture into it. Populate your vessel with **upgradeable officers**, each with unique quests, from a repentant devil to an incognito princess, a brigade of rats, or even your own Aunt.

The Victorian Empire, now free from gravity, has expanded into space, even creating a new sun. The Empress, controlling time from her Throne of Hours, rules an ambitious but merciless empire. Your captain must carve out an existence, making **choices that shift power**. Will you align with the empire, support rebels, or forge your own independent path? Your fate hinges on your actions: **retire in triumph or be lost to the darkness**.

***Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition*** delivers over **800,000 words of interconnected stories**, drawing inspiration from literary giants like C.S. Lewis, Jules Verne, H.P. Lovecraft, and H.G. Wells. Experience a beautifully drawn 2D world across **four distinct regions**:

*   The celestial wilderness
*   An industrial empire
*   A pagan midnight expanse
*   The domain of the dead

Engage in **real-time battles** against celestial foes and pirates. Equip your engine with bizarre gear and weaponry, and fight against starvation, mutiny, terror, and nightmares. Build a lineage of captains, passing on inheritances, or reload your last save. Uncover your captain's past and develop their unique story. Earn fortunes through story-driven trading or smuggling. Gather unique pets like the Inadvisably Big Dog. Enjoy seamless gameplay with remappable controls and controller support. This immersive narrative was created by Failbetter Games, an independent British studio, who stated, "**We wanted to create a world that felt both familiar and utterly alien.**"

**Dishonored 2: A Masterpiece of Choice and Consequence in a World of Intrigue**

Step back into the shadows as a **supernatural assassin** in Dishonored 2. This highly anticipated sequel to Arkane Studio's acclaimed first-person action game, Dishonored, has earned widespread praise for its **innovative gameplay and compelling narrative**. Critics lauded it as "brilliant" (PC Gamer), "amazing" and "a superb sequel" (IGN), a "masterpiece" (Eurogamer), and "a must-play revenge tale among the best in its class" (Game Informer). Dishonored 2 invites you to **forge your own path** in a world where magic and industry clash, offering unparalleled player agency.

Will you embody Empress Emily Kaldwin or her loyal protector, Corvo Attano? The choice is yours, and it **profoundly impacts your journey**. You can navigate the game unseen, unleash brutal combat, or master a blend of both. Discover how to combine your chosen character's **unique powers, weapons, and gadgets** to outwit and eliminate your foes. Your decisions shape the narrative, leading to **intriguing and distinct outcomes** across meticulously crafted missions.

**A World in Turmoil: The Throne Stolen**

Fifteen years have passed since the tyrannical Lord Regent was overthrown and the devastating Rat Plague became a distant memory. Now, an **otherworldly usurper** has stolen Empress Emily Kaldwin's throne, plunging the Isles into uncertainty. As either Emily or Corvo, you must journey from the familiar, grimy streets of Dunwall to Karnaca, a once-vibrant coastal city that holds the key to reclaiming the throne. Empowered by the Mark of the Outsider and **new supernatural abilities**, you will hunt down your enemies and reclaim what is rightfully yours.

**Key Features: Unlocking Your Potential**

*   **The Dual Protagonists:** Both Emily Kaldwin and Corvo Attano are **fully voiced characters**, offering distinct perspectives and emotional depth. Utilize their **unique powers, gadgets, and weapons creatively**. Whether you fight openly or move like a ghost, your approach to eliminating or sparing enemies is **entirely up to you**, leading to vastly different mission resolutions.

*   **Supernatural Powers Unleashed:** Advanced bonecharm crafting and **new upgrade trees** allow for deep customization of your abilities. Become a living shadow to stalk your targets, link enemies to share their fate, or mesmerize foes to control their minds. The game offers **near-infinite combinations** of combat styles, powers, and weapons to achieve your objectives, encouraging **experimental play**.

*   **Imaginative and Living World:** From the grimy, rat-infested alleys of Dunwall to the exotic, decaying shores of Karnaca, immerse yourself in **stunning environments** crafted by Arkane's art and narrative teams. The world itself is a character, brimming with lore, unique architecture, and memorable individuals. Signature mission locations, like the dust-choked Dust District and a madman's mansion with **shifting walls and clockwork soldiers**, offer unforgettable and **highly replayable experiences**.

*   **The Revolutionary Void Engine:** Dishonored 2 is brought to life by the **new Void Engine**, a significant advancement in rendering technology. Built on id Tech and heavily customized by Arkane Studios, it supports **world-class art direction** and leverages modern hardware. This engine enables substantial improvements in AI for stealth and combat, lighting, graphical fidelity, densely populated urban environments, and **dynamic narrative presentation**, creating a truly immersive and responsive world.

**Leisure Suit Larry Navigates the Digital Dating World in *Wet Dreams Don't Dry***

Prepare for **Leisure Suit Larry** to plunge into the **modern dating landscape** in *Leisure Suit Larry: Wet Dreams Don't Dry*. This classic point-and-click adventure game transports our **familiar '80s hero** into the present day. Here, his **outdated perspectives on romance** clash with contemporary society. Despite **significant shifts in technology and social norms**, Larry remains committed to **finding a connection** and mastering **today's dating customs**.

Larry's adventure includes several key elements:

*   **"Timber" Dating App:** This digital platform is central to Larry's quest, mirroring our interconnected reality. Players will guide Larry as he uses "Timber" to impress potential matches, meet their expectations, and **improve his Timber score**.
*   **Faith:** Larry's primary goal is to win over Faith, an employee of the CEO at **Prune**, a prominent technology firm.
*   **Vast Game Environment:** The game features **over 30 intricately designed locations** and **more than 30 distinct characters**. Each individual and setting presents unique puzzles and obstacles.
*   **"Instacrap" Social Media:** Larry will also engage with this **witty parody of social media**, offering a sharp commentary on online culture.

This new chapter skillfully blends **traditional adventure gameplay with contemporary topics**, injecting **fresh energy** into the cherished *Leisure Suit Larry* franchise. The developers noted their intention: "We aimed to explore how Larry would adapt to the dating scene of 2018, and the outcome is both humorous and remarkably perceptive."

**Dream Daddy: A Dad Dating Simulator** invites players into the charming town of Maple Bay, where you step into the shoes of a dad seeking romance. Upon arriving with your daughter, you discover that your new neighbors are all eligible, single Dads, setting the stage for a truly unique dating experience. The game allows you to explore relationships with a diverse cast of characters, such as Teacher Dad, Goth Dad, and Bad Dad.

This highly anticipated game offers a rich experience with:

*   **Seven distinct Dads** to pursue romantically.
*   A **customizable Dad character creator** to craft your own "Dadsona."
*   **Multiple endings for each Dad**, enhancing replayability.
*   Voice acting by the popular **Game Grumps and their collaborators**.
*   A story developed by **Leighton Gray and Vernon Shaw**.
*   Direction from **Tyler J. Hutchison**.
*   Stunning **artwork and pin-up illustrations** by talented artists.
*   An **original soundtrack** by Jesse Cale.
*   Engaging **dad-themed mini and micro games** woven into each dating path.
*   A generous helping of **Dad puns**, some delightfully cringeworthy.
*   **Hidden secrets** to uncover throughout Maple Bay.

The creators, Leighton Gray and Vernon Shaw, aimed to craft an enjoyable and engaging simulation. Director Tyler J. Hutchison oversaw a project with a memorable concept and a varied cast. The game's appealing visual style, brought to life by numerous artists, creates an attractive world. Jesse Cale's original music further enhances the game's atmosphere, contributing to a memorable dating simulation.

Name: Genital Jousting
Description:
Genital Jousting is an online and local multiplayer party game about flaccid penises and wiggly anuses for up to eight players at once. Players control a detached penis complete with testicles and an anus. Multiple game modes provide a stimulating orgy of objectives: penetrate and be penetrated as fast as possible or compete in absurd, silly and sexually suggestive games and challenges. New Story Mode Play as John, a dick who wants to find a date for his high school reunion. He'll need some help along the way. He's wobbly, he's soft. But he wants to be hard. So very hard. He wants to show everyone his astounding rigidity. And with your help, that's exactly what he'll do. Features If this is something that makes you uncomfortable or sounds unappealing, please do not purchase or play Genital Jousting, or even continue reading. Online and Local Multiplayer for Eight: Genital Jousting is more fun with friends and can satisfy up to eight players at once! Find a few willing partners, cuddle up on the couch, and share controllers or go online to joust with anonymous players from all over the world. Traditional and Party Modes: Dabble in the throbbingly fast-paced Traditional Mode or jostle your way through some stiff competition in Party Mode including challenges like Double Delight, Obstacle Intercourse, and Weiner Round Up. Customize Your Member: Genitals come in all shapes and sizes so pick your favorite color and decorate it with the most appealing outfit to customize a penis you can really get behind!

**Lust for Darkness: Explore Eldritch Horrors and Forbidden Pleasures**

**Lust for Darkness** invites players into a chilling narrative blending **eroticism and occult themes**. The story centers on Jonathan Moon, who receives a mysterious letter from his wife, missing for a year. Following the letter's cryptic hints, he travels to a remote mansion. There, he inadvertently triggers an **eldritch occult ceremony**, opening a gateway to the perverse dimension of Lusst’ghaa.

The game masterfully guides players through two contrasting realities. You will explore the secrets hidden within a **Victorian mansion** and then venture into **Lusst’ghaa**, a bizarre realm inhabited by **otherworldly beings**. These entities once lived lives similar to ours but chose a path of **total degeneration**. Through extreme experimentation, they altered their bodies in a quest for endless carnal pleasure. Today, Lusst’ghaa is a surreal landscape, overgrown with strange plants and filled with **monsters locked in perpetual ecstasy**.

Key elements of **Lust for Darkness** include **dual reality exploration**, enabling seamless movement between the Victorian mansion and Lusst’ghaa. The game's unique visual style is heavily influenced by the art of **H.P. Lovecraft, H.R. Giger, and Zdzisław Beksiński**, creating a distinct and disturbing atmosphere. Players will use **portal mechanics** to navigate between these worlds and **discover hidden items** that reveal side narratives and the game's deeper lore. As the developers stated, "players should **be prepared for survival horror elements** as you **escape the grotesque creatures** of Lusst’ghaa." An **original soundtrack** by **Draco Nared** further enhances the unsettling experience.

Name: The Tower of Five Hearts
Description:
Story There are five continents of roughly-equal size, side-by-side, and all of them meet to an approximate point in the middle. At this meeting of borders, there is a tower: The Tower of Five Hearts. One Royal Family is in charge of upholding the peace for every continent, by marrying off their child to a prospective girl from one of the continents. It’s more of a contest-five girls trying to be Maids, in the hope that their master (the Prince) will fall in love with them... However this time, it’s a Princess . Features A cute and adorable yuri visual novel featuring kemonomimi (animal ears)! Play the role of a princess to find the girl meant for you! Over 10 Hscenes to explore! Multi-platform Support! (Windows, Mac, and Linux) Maids! --- Any future content for the game will be free dlc.

Embark on a cosmic adventure in **Deep Space Waifu: FLAT JUSTICE**, a unique shmup where you play as **dedicated police women** delivering **FLAT JUSTICE**. As part of the **F.A.T. (Fabulous Law Application Taskforce)**, your mission is to rescue citizens from an alien police force. Guided by King Bear, you'll restore order and **find your ideal waifu** while defeating alien foes.

The game is designed for **accessible, casual play** with **one-hand control**, making it enjoyable for everyone. **Deep Space Waifu: FLAT JUSTICE** features **a captivating narrative** that unfolds as you progress. A **new gallery mode** lets you admire your accomplishments and the game's art style, including the notable **OPPAIS**. Prepare for a variety of engaging features:

*   **60 pieces of clothing** to destroy.
*   **40 milestones** to achieve for high scores.
*   **15 new corrupted cop enemies** to face.
*   **15 collectible cards** to find.
*   **12 women with unique poses** to discover.
*   **12 challenging stages** to master.
*   **10 distinct boss fights** to overcome.
*   **6 power-ups** to enhance your abilities.
*   **5 new music tracks** to energize the experience.
*   **3 motorcycles** for stylish movement.
*   **1 elusive bear** for surprise encounters.

The developers aimed to create a shmup that is both engaging and accessible, allowing players to enjoy the action and story at their own pace. Embrace your role, OFFICER, and fulfill your mission!

## Kara no Shojo: A Detective's Descent into a Chilling Murder Mystery

**Kara no Shojo** immerses players in a disturbing murder mystery, tasking them with solving a series of gruesome crimes. As a private investigator, your choices are **crucial** in shaping the narrative and its outcome. The investigation delves into unsettling diary entries, challenging your perception of reality and uncovering hidden secrets.

The year is **March 1956**. Tokyo, still recovering from war, is gripped by a wave of brutal murders. Young women are vanishing, only to be found dismembered with their wombs violently removed. Detective Uozumi Kyoko, facing this grim reality, enlists the help of her old friend, private investigator Tokisaka Reiji.

Reiji's investigation begins with a cryptic request in Inokashira Park: "Look for something. Me. My true self." This leads him to Ouba Girls Academy, where his sister is enrolled. The disappearance of two students prompts the vice principal to seek Reiji's assistance. Posing as a substitute teacher, he encounters his initial client, Kuchiki Toko, who greets him with a boyish, "Heya - so we meet again, Mr. Detective."

As the body count rises, the search for missing students becomes a far more complex and perilous situation. The alarming discrepancy between missing persons and unidentified bodies raises critical questions:

*   **Who will be the next victim?**
*   **How do these new cases connect to similar murders six years prior?**

Innocent Grey presents an original, psychologically charged murder mystery where **your deductive reasoning is key** to unraveling the truth. Effectively utilizing clues meticulously documented in your notebook is paramount to piecing together this pulse-pounding mystery.

The game features:

*   A **rich cast of over thirty meticulously designed characters**, each with unique visuals and distinct personalities.
*   These characters embody diverse ideas and hold their own deeply ingrained thoughts and beliefs, weaving a narrative filled with intricate relationships, dramatic conflicts, and perplexing riddles.

You may find yourself stifling a scream or narrowly missing the perpetrator, but one thing is certain: this remarkable work of interactive storytelling should not be overlooked. Beneath the layers of tragedy, perhaps a single girl's smile awaits discovery.

Key features include:

*   A **player-driven narrative**
*   An **extensive character roster**
*   An **intricate plot**
*   **Investigative gameplay**
*   **Psychological thriller elements** promising unexpected twists and turns.

**King of Phoenix**: An Adult Harem Dating Sim Set in Sunny Phoenix, Arizona.

Get ready for a **funny and steamy journey** in **King of Phoenix**, an adult harem dating sim. You play as Dan Miller, a British journalist whose unexpected stopover in **Phoenix, Arizona**, turns into an **unforgettable adventure**. This comedic game lets you explore the lively city and discover the **exciting secrets** waiting for Dan. The main question is: will he find **riches, true friends, deep love, or maybe even his perfect waifus**?

Dive into what's called the **"sexiest layover ever"** during a few luxurious days at a **fancy resort**. Watch Dan's story unfold, filled with **laughs and romance**. The game features a **funny and sexy plot**, brought to life by **appealing anime characters**. With **four different endings**, the creators promise **plenty of reasons to play again and varied story paths**.

Here's what players can expect:

*   **Plenty of "entertaining" CGs** to enjoy.
*   The **chance to win over a cast of charming waifus**.
*   A **"sexy and very funky soundtrack"** that perfectly fits the game's mood.

Embark on an **epic adventure** in "The Spirit Master of Retarnia - Conqueror of the Labyrinth," a classic 3D dungeon RPG. This game blends **charming anime aesthetics** with **deep gameplay mechanics**, offering a journey through vast dungeons filled with **thrilling monster battles** and **abundant loot**. Discover **powerful Artifacts** to enhance your heroines and prepare for the challenges ahead.

The Kingdom of Retarnia, once a land of **five centuries of tranquility**, now faces a dire threat. Portals to the Demon World have opened, unleashing **malevolent creatures bent on conquest**. To defend his homeland, Leonard, a descendant of the legendary "Spirit Master of Retarnia," must venture into the Demon World. Five hundred years prior, this hero, aided by five powerful spirits—Norn (White), Vesta (Red), Rusalka (Blue), Melissa (Green), and Iris (Black)—**successfully repelled a similar demonic invasion** and sealed the portals. Now, Queen Sylvia tasks Leonard with a similar mission to **protect Retarnia**.

"The Spirit Master of Retarnia" delivers a **rich RPG experience**. Explore numerous dungeons, battling a **variety of monsters** and collecting **valuable gear**, including **rare Artifacts**, to strengthen your heroines.
