It **intelligently proposes new challenges** based on your friends' recent activities, cultivating a dynamic and fiercely competitive social environment that extends beyond the game itself to the web. As Criterion's General Manager, Alex Ward, aptly put it, "Autolog is the heart of the game, connecting players in a way that makes them want to compete."

**Hot Pursuit** challenges you to embody either Seacrest County's most celebrated officer or its most infamous racer. For the first time in the *Need for Speed* franchise, you can **experience a complete career from both sides of the law**. Whether your passion lies in the thrill of speed or the pursuit of justice, prepare for an unforgettable journey.

Key features include **dual career paths**, enabling you to engage in full careers as both law enforcement and street racers. Earn bounty to unlock new vehicles, tools, and equipment. The **Need For Speed™ Autolog** system **seamlessly connects friends**, fostering a **highly competitive social experience**. Command the **planet's most coveted high-performance vehicles** at astonishing velocities, from police interceptors like the Lamborghini Reventon to supercars such as the Pagani Zonda Cinque. Law enforcement can deploy tactical tools like **spike strips** and initiate **roadblocks**, while racers are equipped with countermeasures like **jammers**. Explore a vast open world inspired by the **California coastline**, featuring diverse terrains meticulously designed for the most **intense police pursuit scenarios** imaginable.

Name: GRIP: Combat Racing
Description:
WHEELED AND ANTI-GRAV RACING FUSION GRIP is a high octane, hardcore combat racer, packing ferocious speed and an arsenal of heavy weapons. Harness the power of gravity-defying wheeled or airborne vehicles, and smash your way through opponents with a bristling arsenal of outlandish weapons. GRIP delivers one of the fastest and most unique racing experiences ever as you scale walls, ceilings and anything else you can get your ride onto. Master twisting tracks, tricks and perform ridiculous stunts, fighting your way across alien planets to become the ultimate vehicular assailant. Now in VR! Prepare for the most intense, mind-melting racing experience in VR! Inject yourself into the game, feeling every turn, impact and stomach-testing inversion. Can you make it through the race? Only one way to find out… *Sick bag not included. REACH MACH 1 SPEEDS Hit speeds of up to 767mph and beyond on floors, walls, ceilings and anywhere you can get your ride to… just keep that pedal pressed hard. RACE ACROSS THE COSMOS Race your way through 29 tracks across a host of 4 exotic planets; from hostile, icy worlds to foreign, non-terrestrial cities to the outer reaches of space. CREATE THE ULTIMATE RIDE Choose from a roster of 30 armored vehicles to suit your style – some swift and agile, others brutish and heavily armed. Progress your player level and customize your ride with unlocked paint jobs, decals, tires and rims. TEAM MODES Battle it out with online team racing and deathmatch modes. DEVASTATE YOUR OPPONENTS Pick-up an array of 9 power-ups and weapons, from shields and turbos, to rail-guns, missiles and explosive darts - all with alternate fire modes. COMPETE ON THE COUCH Compete with friends in SPLIT-SCREEN multiplayer, with up to four players. TAKE THE RACE ONLINE Build your own tournament, line the grid with up to 10 players and compete online with full matchmaking & lobby support. ENTER THE DEATHMATCH ARENA Duke it out with intense action in 5 Arena battle maps. BECOME ONE WITH THE CAR IN CARKOUR Beat the clock, avoid obstacles and find new pathways in 19 point-to-point Carkour runs. CONQUER THE SINGLE PLAYER CAMPAIGN Be the best, beat in-game rivals and rise to the top in the single player campaign. Gain XP and customize your ride’s appearance with hard-earned upgrades. SICK BEATS Race to a 24 track thumping licensed electronic soundtrack, ranging from techno and trance to our main jam, drum n bass. BUILT WITH UNREAL Built in Unreal Engine 4, GRIP will take you back to your nostalgic past, while simultaneously propelling you into an electrifying future.

**FlatOut: Ultimate Carnage: Experience the Ultimate Destruction Derby!**

Get ready for **extreme and visceral destruction racing** with FlatOut: Ultimate Carnage. This arcade racer is celebrated for its **realistic physics, diverse game modes, and extensive multiplayer options**, both online and offline.

**Key Features of FlatOut: Ultimate Carnage:**

*   **Unrivaled Physics Engine:** Experience **peerless real-world physics** that meticulously simulate vehicle damage. Cars are built with over **40 deformable parts**, and tracks are packed with more than **8,000 destructible objects**, guaranteeing a spectacle of chaos in every race. As one reviewer put it, "The sheer level of destruction is breathtaking; you can practically feel the metal bending and glass shattering."
*   **Multiple Game Modes:**
    *   **Career Mode:** Progress through three increasingly difficult classes to become the ultimate FlatOut champion through demolition.
    *   **Arcade Mode:** Dive into immediate thrills with Deathmatch Destruction Derbies, time trials, and a variety of crash-focused challenges.
*   **Engaging Racing Action:** Compete head-to-head against up to **11 AI drivers** in single-player modes. Choose from a roster of **48 distinct cars** and race across **39 tracks** set in six diverse environments, including arid deserts, sprawling storm drains, and tight city streets.
*   **Robust Multiplayer:** Fully integrated with Games For Windows Live, FlatOut: Ultimate Carnage supports up to **8 simultaneous players** in various modes like Races, Derbies, and Stunts. New modes include **Deathmatch Derbies and the exclusive Head-On race mode**.
*   **Hilarious Ragdoll Characters:** Witness your characters dramatically ejected from vehicles, often through the windscreen, especially after opponents are wrecked.
*   **Unique Ragdoll Mini-Games:** Beyond the main races, enjoy **12 distinct Ragdoll mini-games** that emphasize "sheer body abuse." These include:
    *   High Jump
    *   Stone Skipping
    *   Ring of Fire
    *   Field Goal
    *   Free Kick

**Stunning Visuals:**

Ultimate Carnage boasts visually impressive cars with **real-time environment mapping**, rendering every scratch and dent with a gritty, realistic appearance. **Dynamic shadow maps** are applied to every 3D object, ensuring exceptionally smooth movement. Enhanced particle effects like dust, dirt, smoke, water splashes, and bouncing sparks further immerse you in the destructive environment.

**Dominate the Streets in Need for Speed™ Most Wanted**

Need for Speed™ Most Wanted drops you into a sprawling, vibrant city. Here, the excitement of racing is just the beginning. You can explore a huge urban landscape, finding secret paths and shortcuts to get ahead. Pick from many **fast cars**, each built differently to help you beat rivals. Get ready for intense chases, whether you're **running from the police** or chasing someone else.

The game focuses on your path, how you play with others, and a great collection of cars, all meant to help you become the best racer. Expect constant action as you face off against police and other drivers. Get better at driving, use the latest car tech, and use **nitro** to win.

**Key Features:**

*   **Open World Exploration:** Jump right into the action. Enjoy **exciting races** and explore a **huge city** full of things to do. Race, compete, crash, and find new things at your own speed.
*   **Online Multiplayer:** Join **races online** with the cars you love. You control the race, adding a strategic layer. Get the best starting spot, and after the race, **leave rivals behind**.
*   **Social Competition:** The **Autolog** system tracks your best moments, sharing your top scores, speeds, and lap times with friends. Seeing their results will push you to **beat their records**.
*   **Realistic Driving:** **Need for Speed Most Wanted** offers a thrilling drive, highlighting the unique feel of its **real-world cars**. Experience **incredible speeds**, hard crashes, bold moves, and smooth drifts. As one of the game's developers said, "We wanted to capture the pure thrill of street racing, making every turn and pass feel real."

**Need for Speed Rivals: Complete Edition - Your Ultimate Racing Adventure**

Get ready for an **unforgettable racing experience** with **Need for Speed Rivals: Complete Edition**. This edition provides the **full game**, boosted by **six key downloadable content packs** for **instant and deep gameplay**.

The **Complete Edition is packed with value**, including six unique DLC packs:

*   **Simply Jaguar Complete Pack**
*   **Ferrari Edizioni Speciali Complete Pack**
*   **Concept Lamborghini Complete Pack**
*   **Koenigsegg Agera One**
*   **Complete Movie Pack**
*   **Loaded Garage Pack**

This **extensive collection gives you access to many cars and content**, letting you **design your ideal vehicle** and **jump right into the fast-paced action**.

Experience a **lively and surprising racing world** where **races and intense chases frequently meet**. The game's heart is the **strong rivalry between Racers and Cops**. Racers focus on **extreme speed and clever escapes** in their **powerful cars**, while Cops use **smart police methods** to catch them. You can **easily switch between these sides**. A **new scoring system** means your earned Speed Points are **always in danger**, **increasing the excitement** in every chase.

**Leave your impact on the large world of Redview County**. You can **tune your cars perfectly**, **improving their performance** with **advanced chase tools** and **showing your personal style** with many **visual upgrades**. These include:

*   **Bright paint colors**
*   **Eye-catching liveries**
*   **Unique decals**

Both Racers and Cops get **top-tier gear for chasing and escaping**, adding **real strategic layers** to every exciting pursuit.

As one player put it, "The **Complete Edition is a great deal** for anyone wanting to play Need for Speed Rivals with **all content available immediately**." Another praised the main gameplay, saying, "The **continuous feeling of being chased and chasing** is what makes Rivals so engaging."

**FlatOut 2™: Embrace the Chaos for Ultimate Victory**

If you're looking for a racing game where **destruction is the main goal**, **FlatOut 2™** is your answer. This game isn't about perfect laps; it's about **causing as much mayhem as possible**. You'll face tough races and unpredictable opponents, but the real thrill comes from **unleashing chaos** on the track. This is not a traditional driving simulator.

**FlatOut 2™** provides a huge playground for destruction. You can **smash through thousands of objects** in various settings. Race across **dry deserts**, navigate **huge storm drains**, and speed through **narrow city streets**, with each location offering plenty of chances to demolish everything in sight. The game also includes **"mini games gone wild,"** featuring 12 unique challenges where you'll **launch your driver in funny and destructive ways**. As one reviewer put it, "**The thrill of pure destruction is central to the appeal of FlatOut 2™**." Your objective is straightforward: **win the race by any means necessary**, even if it means sending other cars flying.

FlatOut 2 © 2006 Empire Interactive Europe Ltd. Game concept and development by Bugbear Entertainment Ltd. Empire, FlatOut and 'E' are either trademarks or registered trademarks of Empire Interactive Europe Ltd. in the UK/Europe and/or other countries. All rights reserved. NVIDIA, the NVIDIA Logo, GeForce and 'The Way It's Meant to be Played' Logo are registered trademarks and/or trademarks of NVIDIA Corporation in the United States and other countries. GameSpy and the 'Powered by GameSpy' design are trademarks of GameSpy Industries, Inc. All rights reserved. A product of the E.U.

Experience the **thrill of high-speed chases** in Need for Speed™ Hot Pursuit Remastered for PC. This enhanced version delivers an intense sense of speed, letting you play as either an outlaw or a police officer in the world's most sought-after performance cars. Outsmart the police or catch criminals using **specialized police tech** in this exciting, competitive racing game. With updated graphics, cross-platform multiplayer, and the smart Autolog system to challenge friends, this is the ultimate version of Criterion Games' famous Need for Speed title.

**All DLC Included and Enhanced**
This package contains all the original main downloadable content. It adds over **six hours of extra gameplay** and more than thirty new challenges. You'll find new achievements, unique car designs, fresh paint colors, less traffic, an improved photo mode, and many other updates to make your gaming experience better.

**Smooth Cross-Platform Multiplayer and Autolog**
Race against others across the beautiful scenery of Seacrest County. The smart Autolog system links you and your friends, creating races based on what you've all been doing. This encourages friendly competition and now features **cross-platform play**. You can race against anyone, on any device, with new multiplayer modes.

**Top Cars and Smart Tactics**
Drive the most desirable supercars on the planet, whether you're the law or breaking it. As a police officer, use high-speed interceptors with **advanced law enforcement tools** to catch suspects. As a racer, use quick moves and defensive tactics to stay ahead. **Plan your strategy to get the advantage**, no matter which side you choose.

**The Best Chase and Escape**
A full single-player career lets you play from both the cop and racer viewpoints. This connects smoothly with the linked multiplayer for all race types. Compete against friends or play through the career alone to earn Bounty and unlock new cars, weapons, and gear.

**Updated Visuals**
Need for Speed Hot Pursuit Remastered brings a classic racing game to life with **stunning graphics built for modern hardware**. This ensures a visually impressive experience that holds up well.

Name: Gas Guzzlers Extreme
Description:
Gas Guzzlers Extreme is a fast, furious, armed-to-the-teeth, trigger-happy shooter, shifted into top gear! Take a white knuckle ride in this crazily addictive combat racing game that features a ton of vehicles, weapons, upgrades, on-track bonuses and environments. Gas Guzzlers Extreme is an exciting new twist on the car combat experience with the addition of furious team/clan combat battles. Players start out with low performance vehicles and soon work their way up to high-performance models, by earning money in a series of hi-octane races and arena battles. New game modes, tracks and vehicles are unlocked as players progress through the game. Along with developing their driving and fighting skills, players can spend their hard-fought cash, customizing their vehicle to match their clan members or pimping their ride for the road to glory! Key features: Combat racing at its best, featuring a blood pumping single player campaign with over 12 hours of gameplay. Fast-as-lightning multiplayer tournaments with 7 different modes (classic race, power race, battle race, knockout, deathmatch, last man standing and capture the flag); with up to 4 teams available in team play mode. 350+ miles of road across 40 tracks, 8 arenas and 7 different environments. 12 unique weapons, on-track bonuses and power ups. 18 customizable cars (12+ upgrades, color, rims, stickers, etc.). Multi-path tracks and sponsored events. Instant play with vicious AI Bots populating your multiplayer match while other players begin to join in on the fun. Beautifully displayed high definition visuals with extensive vehicle damage, motion blur effects and custom paint jobs. Full force feedback controller support as well as keyboards, joy pads, joysticks and racing wheels. Packed with tons of unique humor and personality.

Experience the thrill of **aerial combat and racing** in SkyDrift. This game challenges your **piloting and combat skills** against formidable opponents. You'll navigate **detailed environments** and collect **modern aircraft**, personalizing them with **unique racing designs**. The core gameplay is simple yet exhilarating: if you can't outrace them, **take them out**!

SkyDrift features **eight advanced planes**, each designed for racing. With four liveries per plane, you can achieve **32 distinct racing looks**. Enhance your combat capabilities with **six special power-ups**. You can equip two power-ups per plane and find upgrades to strengthen them. Strategic decisions are key as you choose which power-ups to keep, improve, or convert into Boost energy.

Soar through **stunning, diverse locations**, including the Grand Canyon, the Alaskan wilderness, and the Hawaiian Islands. These beautifully crafted settings are filled with **bright, bold colors**, making each race a visual spectacle. For competitive play, SkyDrift supports **online multiplayer for up to eight players**, allowing you to race against seven friends in thrilling aerial battles.

The game offers **three distinct modes** for endless enjoyment. **Power Race Mode** combines fast-paced racing with strategic power-up usage, demanding both quick reflexes and tactical thinking. **Speed Race Mode** tests pilots' precision as they navigate speed rings on challenging tracks. Lastly, **Survival Mode** pits you against a timer and other pilots, with the last one flying declared the winner. A developer from [Developer Studio Name] stated, "We aimed to create a game that was accessible yet deeply competitive."

**Need for Speed™ Heat: Master the Streets, Outsmart the Authorities**

In the **thrilling world of Need for Speed™ Heat**, players are thrust into a high-octane street racing environment where the **exhilaration of competition** is constantly challenged by a **persistent and aggressive police force**. The ultimate objective is to **climb the ranks and forge a legendary status** within the exclusive street racing community.

The game masterfully presents a **dualistic gameplay experience**:

*   **Daytime:** Palm City becomes the vibrant backdrop for the Speedhunter Showdown, a **sanctioned and legal racing event**. During these daytime races, players will **earn Bank**, the essential in-game currency. This currency is crucial for **personalizing and enhancing** your already impressive fleet of **high-performance vehicles**.
*   **Nighttime:** As darkness descends, the **stakes dramatically escalate**. Players will engage in **intense, clandestine street races** with the primary aim of accumulating **Reputation**. A higher Reputation level is the key to **unlocking access to more demanding races** and acquiring **superior car components**. However, a **critical warning** is issued: the police are actively patrolling, and their methods are often **unpredictable and unforgiving**.

**Deluxe Edition: An Accelerated Start**

The Deluxe Edition of Need for Speed™ Heat offers players a **significantly enhanced initial experience**, featuring:

*   The **coveted K.S Edition Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution X Starter Car**, immediately available in your garage from the outset.
*   An additional **three K.S Edition vehicles**, which become accessible as you advance through the game's progression.
*   **Four exclusive character outfits**, providing extensive customization options for both male and female avatars, allowing for **unique stylistic expression**.
*   A **5% boost to REP rewards**, accelerating your reputation gain.
*   A **5% boost to BANK rewards**, enhancing your financial progression.

Furthermore, Need for Speed Heat proudly incorporates **Crossplay functionality**, enabling you to **compete against players across various platforms**, broadening the competitive landscape. As one reviewer noted, "The ability to race with friends regardless of their platform is a **game-changer for community engagement**." Another expert highlighted, "The **dual-cycle gameplay** forces strategic decisions about risk versus reward, making every race feel significant."

Step into the role of an army commander in Tom Clancy's EndWar™, a game that plunges you into the heart of World War III. This massive, persistent online conflict challenges you to lead your chosen faction to victory. Will you command the U.S.-led Joint Strike Force, the European Enforcers Corps, or the Russian Spetsnaz Guards Brigade? Develop your unique tactical style and craft winning strategies to outmaneuver your adversaries.

**Experience Command Like Never Before:**
EndWar redefines Real-Time Strategy (RTS) by moving beyond traditional mouse and keyboard controls. Its **revolutionary voice command system** allows for rapid, intuitive unit control, enabling you to issue orders at the speed of thought. This feature puts you directly in charge, offering unparalleled command efficiency.

**Immerse Yourself in the Battlefield:**
Forget the standard top-down perspective. EndWar places you directly into the action with a **unique third-person camera**. This immersive viewpoint makes effective use of terrain and cover absolutely critical for success. Zoom in to witness the intense clashes of hundreds of units on **fully destructible battlefields**, where the devastation unfolds with striking detail.

**Engage in Cutting-Edge Warfare:**
Staying true to the Tom Clancy legacy, EndWar equips you with a vast arsenal of vehicles, weapons, and equipment. These are meticulously based on real-world military research, granting you access to **tomorrow's advanced technology**. Prepare to utilize cutting-edge tools such as drones and even space-based weaponry.

**Key Aspects of EndWar:**

*   **Persistent Global Conflict:** Participate in a worldwide World War III scenario, featuring fully customizable battalions and units.
*   **Intuitive Voice Control:** Command your army with exceptional speed and precision through advanced voice recognition.
*   **Realistic Combat Zones:** Battle across 30 meticulously rendered locations in Europe and the United States, including iconic cities like Washington D.C., Paris, and Moscow.
*   **Extensive Army Customization:** Build highly personalized armies with unit progression and hundreds of upgrades, ensuring endless replayability.
*   **Dynamic Environments:** Witness battles unfold with spectacular detail on battlefields that are completely destructible.
*   **Complete Console Content:** All maps, additional upgrades, and battalions previously released on consoles are included.

Please be aware that online features for Tom Clancy's EndWar™ are no longer supported as of November 19th, 2018. Consequently, multiplayer and co-op modes are inaccessible.

**Binary Domain: Fight Rogue Robots in a Dystopian Future Tokyo**

In the year 2080, advanced artificial intelligence poses a significant threat, fueling public anxiety about human obsolescence due to the widespread integration of robots. **Binary Domain** plunges players into this dystopian future as a squad-based shooter. You lead a unit tasked with eliminating rogue robots in a richly detailed, futuristic Tokyo. This sprawling metropolis is sharply divided, with a decaying lower sector contrasting with a pristine, highly controlled upper district.

The core gameplay mechanics are designed to immerse players in this conflict:

*   **Consequence System:** As the developers explained, "**Every choice you make, from dialogue to battles, affects the story and its final outcome.**" This system ensures that player decisions have tangible repercussions on the narrative.
*   **Dynamic Procedural Damage:** This innovative feature makes enemies highly resilient and unpredictable. Players are encouraged to carefully analyze each robot, pinpoint weaknesses, and develop strategic attack plans.
*   **Weapon Customization and Skill Progression:** Players can personalize their arsenal and enhance their abilities to match their combat style.

Building strong relationships with your squadmates and navigating complex ethical quandaries are vital for their survival and the overall success of your missions.

**Espire 1: VR Operative: The Ultimate VR Stealth FPS**

Step into the role of the **ultimate super-spy** in Espire 1: VR Operative, a game that redefines the VR stealth FPS experience. This title masterfully merges the **tactical depth of modern stealth games** with the **unparalleled immersion of virtual reality**. In Espire, VR technology has been weaponized, allowing you to pilot an Espire Model 1 Operative from a cutting-edge "Control Theatre." This innovative system is designed to **minimize motion sickness and danger**, ensuring your focus remains on the **very real threats** you face.

Your mission as an Espire Agent is to **identify and neutralize threats** before they can compromise the IFA Facility. Espire utilizes VR to deliver a **deeply satisfying stealth and action FPS experience**. The customizable Control Theatre system addresses common VR drawbacks like motion sickness, enabling **full-freedom movement** that maintains immersion and comfort. This allows you to concentrate on your strategic approach rather than needing frequent breaks.

One of the game's standout features is its **pioneering approach to VR gameplay**. As a reviewer for UploadVR noted, "Espire 1: VR Operative is a game that feels like it was built from the ground up for VR, and it shows." This dedication to the medium allows for **unexplored frontiers** in stealth and action gameplay.

**Key Features of Espire 1: VR Operative:**

*   **The Definitive VR Stealth Experience:** Espire pioneers new mechanics for stealth and action within Virtual Reality, offering a fresh landscape for players.
*   **Full Freedom of Movement:** Explore the virtual environment with the ability to move anywhere, including **climbing and falling**, all with **complete comfort and no motion sickness** for most players.
*   **Complete Single-Player Story:** Designed as a dedicated single-player VR experience, it features **richly detailed story missions** and scenario missions that offer short, challenging objectives within story environments.
*   **Voice Control:** Use your VR headset's microphone to issue commands. However, be aware that **noises you make can attract enemies**, adding a unique tactical layer.
*   **Arsenal of Weapons and Gadgets:** Wield **dozens of unique gadgets and weapons**, such as a tranquilizer pistol and deployable spy cameras, crucial for mission success.
*   **Global Leaderboard:** Compete worldwide with scores based on mission time, movement, stealth, ammo conservation, takedowns, and other critical factors.
*   **Intuitive Controls Mimic Real Life:** Interactions are designed to be **natural and intuitive**. Instead of memorizing button combinations, you perform actions as you would in reality. **Crouch and enter cover by physically using your body.**
*   **Smart AI:** Enemy combatants actively hunt you. The AI responds to **sight, sound, and other stimuli**, reacting with varying levels of suspicion based on your physical stance, movement speed, cover, and location.

**Lead Your Team in *There Came an Echo* with Voice or Standard Controls**

In the fast-paced world of real-time strategy games, **leading your squad effectively is crucial for victory**. *There Came an Echo* puts you in charge, guiding Corrin Webb (voiced by Wil Wheaton) and his team through a unique strategic adventure. While the game features an advanced voice recognition system, it's **also fully playable with traditional controls**, offering a flexible experience for everyone.

**Giving clear orders is key to winning battles**, a core idea in strategy games. *There Came an Echo* lets you excel at this. You can direct your units through complex missions, facing enemies with advanced energy weapons and personal force fields. The game supports standard commands, like "All units, move to Bravo 3!" It also allows for custom command variations, enabling truly personalized tactics.

The game tells a gripping science fiction story focused on its characters. Corrin, a skilled cryptographer, gets caught in a dangerous plot when mercenaries target him in Santa Monica, California. Guided by the mysterious Val (voiced by Ashly Burch), Corrin must escape a relentless enemy and uncover the secrets within his unbreakable algorithm, Radial Lock. This algorithm contains information that could **change reality itself**. The game also features voice work from Laura Bailey, Yuri Lowenthal, Cassandra Morris, Rachel Robinson, and Cindy Robinson.

**Game Highlights:**

*   **Engaging Single-Player Story:** Immerse yourself in a narrative filled with plot twists and character growth.
*   **Flexible Control Options:**
    *   Use the advanced voice command system.
    *   Opt for traditional inputs like a keyboard, mouse, or controller.
*   **Complete Customization:** Make every command, unit, and location your own by using your own spoken words or phrases.
*   **Original Music:** Enjoy a captivating soundtrack with over 20 tracks by acclaimed composers Ronald Jenkees and Big Giant Circles.
*   **Language Support:** The game works with various language models, including different English accents and foreign languages. (For best Intel® RealSense™ performance, update your firmware. Find instructions at: /)

Name: VoiceAttack
Description:
VoiceAttack is the premier voice control and macro creation system for your Windows games and applications. Take a look at just a few elements from VoiceAttack's substantial set of features: Control Your Games and simulators With Your Voice Add your voice as an extra controller with voice commands that YOU create. Give specific instructions to your space freighter, your race pit crew, your 'mech or your druid and give life and immersion to your games like never before. Also Control Your Apps Launch and control applications with phrases you can actually remember. 'Launch Skype' or 'Launch Spotify' without even touching the keyboard or mouse. VoiceAttack even works great along side your favorite voice chat apps like TeamSpeak and Ventrilo. Create Crazy-Powerful Macros From simple, single key presses from a keyboard to mouse clicks to full-blown virtual conversations using text-to-speech, many have found ways to make their PCs easier and way more fun to use in unprecedented ways. Virtual Reality: The Time Is Now Many are pairing VoiceAttack with devices such as the HTC Vive, Oculus Rift and Leap Motion. The extra depth and immersive experience of voice control take virtual reality to a new level [especially when you can't see your hands]. Play Sounds and/or Music Receive audible confirmation from your commands or fire up a random selection from your favorite tunes. You can pick random sounds from a defined list or even a directory full of .wav, .mp3, .aac, .ogg or .flac files. Not Just Voice Activation - Include Your Hardware Invoke your created commands with a click of one or more mouse buttons, the press of joystick buttons or a hotkey combo on your keyboard. Use VoiceAttack to augment or even replace some of that expensive macro-enabled hardware you have been wanting to give away. Dynamic Text-to-Speech Responses Give your responses some personality by randomizing them or by using VoiceAttack tokens (inline functions) for some extra flair. Dynamic Response Sections allow you to create extensive and immersive expressions with minimal effort. How nerdy is that? Comprehensive Macro Control Loops, control statements, variables, tokens and even a plugin interface. You can even write, compile and share your very own functions using C# or VB .net code within VoiceAttack. It's all there to help you design sophisticated commands to help make your life easier, or your opponents' lives more difficult. It's All About the Community VoiceAttack has a diverse community of supporters that take VoiceAttack into the many facets of Windows computing. From games and applications, to robotics, to corporate data centers to home automation (and more), there's a good chance that you'll find the support you need to make your project as cool as you want it to be. Did I Mention Voice Packs? There are even professionally-crafted voice packs and profiles, such as those created by the geniuses at HCS VoicePacks for use exclusively with VoiceAttack. Just check out the list of celebrity voices they have lined up - you are sure to recognize some or all of their wonderfully talented personalities. Additional Speech Recognition and Text-to-Speech Language Support VoiceAttack supports a multitude of Windows speech recognition engines in different languages. Depending on your Windows installation, you may have English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese or Chinese already built right in. If none of those are your language of choice, additional speech recognition and text-to-speech languages can be downloaded and installed straight from the VoiceAttack.com website. Chances are the language you are looking for is readily available here: (Note that installing these speech packages do not change VoiceAttack's interface language which is currently English-only). Try the Demo Give VoiceAttack a try with the VoiceAttack Steam demo. It's all in there to help you get a taste of what will truly change the way you use your PC. Do.It.Now!

**One Hand Clapping: A Vocal Puzzle Adventure**

**One Hand Clapping** is a unique 2D platformer that centers gameplay around your voice. This **calming and uplifting game** challenges you to solve puzzles by singing or humming into your microphone. As you play, you'll gain **assurance in your singing abilities** and witness how your vocalizations influence the vibrant game world.

**Your Voice: The Key to Gameplay**

In One Hand Clapping, your vocal input is used in several ways:

*   **Pitch:** Different vocal notes can trigger specific actions within the game.
*   **Timing:** Matching your voice to the game's rhythm is essential for overcoming obstacles.
*   **Notes:** Combining sounds can lead to particular outcomes and puzzle solutions.

The game provides a **supportive environment with no penalties**, encouraging exploration and learning without pressure. The primary objective is to **overcome hesitation and emerge from quietude**, rather than achieving perfect pitch.

**Embark on a Melodic Journey**

Your adventure will unfold across:

*   **Six distinct and lively environments**, each featuring unique puzzles and visual styles.
*   **Three friendly hermits** who offer guidance and encouragement throughout your quest.

These characters are designed to **promote self-expression** within a relaxed atmosphere. All you need is a microphone to start your journey, **let your voice be heard**, and discover your inner confidence.

## Bot Colony: Investigate a Robot Uprising with AI Conversation

In August 2021, you step into the shoes of a detective hired by Nakagawa Corp., Japan's premier robot manufacturer. Your critical mission: investigate a perplexing robot uprising on Agrihan, their private island in the South Pacific. This island, ingeniously repurposed as a Mars test site, is largely managed by autonomous robots. Their increasingly erratic behavior necessitates direct interaction, requiring you to **converse with them to uncover the truth**. Bot Colony stands as the **pioneering game to integrate AI-based conversation as its core gameplay mechanic**, offering an entirely novel interactive experience.

### Engage with Intelligent Robots Using Natural Language

Within Bot Colony, you will communicate with the island's robotic inhabitants by speaking or typing in English. This **direct dialogue is the primary driver of the narrative and the key to solving the central mystery**. This innovative gameplay style is designed to captivate players seeking unique experiences and fresh conceptual approaches. If you find satisfaction in understanding how to communicate with artificial intelligence, issuing commands, and resolving intricate puzzles, Bot Colony promises an engaging adventure.

### Explore a Captivating Island Setting

The game unfolds on a distinctive island situated in the South Pacific. A striking juxtaposition of modern architecture against a lush, untamed jungle creates a **compelling and atmospheric environment**. Bot Colony masterfully blends elements of adventure, simulation, role-playing, and puzzle-solving, all centered around the act of conversation. The **evocative soundtrack further enhances the immersive mood** of the game.

### Witness the Future of Artificial Intelligence

Bot Colony presents a vision of AI that mirrors the sophisticated portrayals seen in acclaimed films such as *Her*, *Ex Machina*, *iRobot*, *Blade Runner*, and *2001: A Space Odyssey*. This **enjoyable yet intellectually stimulating game** offers profound insights into how machines process and understand human language. It also encourages deeper reflection on the nuances of human communication.

### What Sets Bot Colony Apart

*   **Unrestricted Dialogue:** Unravel the unfolding story by conversing with the robots using your own words.
*   **Dynamic Responses:** Experience **real-time, AI-generated replies** that adapt to your input, a significant departure from static dialogue trees in traditional games.
*   **Immersive Island Environment:** Explore a South Pacific island where cutting-edge robotics coexist with a vibrant natural landscape. The game's atmosphere is significantly amplified by its original musical score.
*   **Investigative Gameplay:** As a detective, you will piece together the events by analyzing the robots' perspectives and observations.
*   **Preventing Sabotage:** Collaborate with the robots to thwart individuals intent on harming artificial intelligence.
*   **Unique Player Agency:** Your verbal interactions directly influence robot behavior, ensuring **each playthrough offers a distinct experience**.
*   **Shaping AI Behavior:** Possess the ability to teach robots new concepts and commands, thereby **customizing your interaction dynamics**.
*   **Flexible Input:** Choose between voice commands or text input for your interactions.
*   **Advanced Speech Recognition:** Benefit from Microsoft's robust speech-to-text technology, which accurately interprets diverse English accents and provides straightforward error correction.
*   **Literary Foundation:** Bot Colony draws inspiration from the science fiction novel by Eugene Joseph, exploring the potential for future robot communication and introducing the **"5th Law of Robotics: Do as people do."**

Name: In Verbis Virtus
Description:
Use your real voice to cast spells in In Verbis Virtus , a fantasy adventure unlike any other. Step into the shoes of a wizard in search of an ancient power. Explore a lost temple, making your way through forgotten chambers brimming with unspeakable beauty and terror. Unlock spells and use them to solve the temple’s enigmas and battle the monsters that lurk in its depths. Built on the Unreal Engine, lose yourself in the breathtaking world of In Verbis Virtus , possibly the most unique and immersive game you’ll play all year. Key Features Cast spells in Maha’ki, the language of the gods, using your own voice. Discover and learn multiple spells, each with its own purpose and power. Solve challenging puzzles, escape traps and battle monsters with magic. Explore a lost temple, uncovering the secrets of its mysterious past, as well as your own. Experience stunning graphics powered by the Unreal Engine.

**Keep Talk Until You Dead: A Wild West Zombie Survival Experience**

Prepare for an **intense survival action game** set in the **desolate Wild West town of NewCotton**. In "Keep Talk Until You Dead," the **entire population has succumbed to an unknown disease**, transforming them into **ravenous zombies**. You are the **sole survivor**, gifted with **extraordinary vocal abilities** that become your **primary weapon against the undead horde**.

Your voice is your **most potent tool**. With it, you can unleash **devastating sonic attacks** to eliminate zombies, **freeze enemies in their tracks**, and even **obliterate them with a mere snap of your fingers**. Master these **unique vocal skills** to navigate the **treacherous environment** and outwit your foes. To ensure your survival and the town's potential salvation, it is **crucial to continuously improve your character's abilities**. **Upgrade your skills** and complete various quests and tasks to **earn rewards**, as your character's fate rests **entirely in your hands**.

**Radio General: Master the Battlefield Through the Fog of War**

**Radio General** isn't your typical real-time strategy game. It plunges you into the heart of World War II, but with a **revolutionary twist**: you command your troops entirely through **radio communication**. Forget direct visual control; you'll rely on **verbal reports from your soldiers** and issue your own orders back, all from the **immersive setting of a detailed command tent**. The core challenge? Navigating the **inherent confusion of war**. Your units operate with incomplete information, forcing you to make **critical decisions based on fragmented and sometimes muddled intel**.

This game masterfully blends **cutting-edge speech recognition** with **full voice-acting**, creating an unparalleled sense of being a general on the front lines. (Note: Speech recognition is currently **English-only**, not available on Mac, and performs best with a **North American accent and a quality microphone**). Beneath the surface, a **sophisticated simulation** meticulously models crucial elements like ammunition, morale, camouflage, sight, and stamina. Environmental factors are **paramount**: elevation and terrain type dramatically influence engagements. For example, a smaller force can achieve **superior results through ambushes in forests**, while a road offers **rapid movement but minimal cover**. Conversely, securing a hilltop grants **significantly increased spotting distance, range, and damage output**.

**Strategic map study is absolutely essential**. You must **identify optimal unit utilization** and **wisely select which companies to deploy**, as each possesses **distinct strengths and weaknesses**. Get to know your companies' **unique personalities**: zealous officers might defy retreat orders, and veteran units will **develop specialized skills and unique abilities**. Crucially, **rest and replenishment are vital**. Exhausted units perform poorly, so **effective unit rotation management is key** to sustained success.

Radio General offers a **rare and compelling perspective**, placing you at the helm of the **1st Canadian Army**. You'll **relive pivotal historical moments**, from the ill-fated Dieppe Raid and the breakthroughs at the Hitler and Gothic Lines in Italy, to the momentous landings on Normandy beaches and the crucial closing of the Falaise Gap. Immerse yourself in history with **hundreds of authentic photos, documents, and videos**, providing a **profound understanding of soldiers' wartime experiences**.

Beyond the compelling campaign, you can **recreate history's most iconic battles** using an **intuitive map editor**. Share your creations through the **Steam Workshop**, challenging other players with your custom scenarios. For those who thrive on collaboration, the **entire campaign is playable cooperatively**, or you can tackle custom missions from the Steam Workshop alongside a trusted comrade.

**Forge Your Global Empire in Europa Universalis III Complete**

Europa Universalis III Complete offers an **unparalleled grand strategy experience**. This package includes the original game and its acclaimed expansions, **In Nomine** and **Napoleon's Ambition**. You can **guide a nation through centuries of history**, mastering exploration, trade, warfare, and diplomacy to **build a dominant global empire**.

Experience **unprecedented depth and historical accuracy**. Choose from over **250 historically accurate countries** and embark on a journey spanning more than **300 years**, with the ability to start your game anytime between **1453 and 1820**. The game provides **virtually endless possibilities for nation building**, allowing you to define your government, societal structure, and trade policies. Interact with **influential historical figures** and explore a **stunning 3D topographic map** featuring over 1700 provinces. Command over **100 unique unit types** and lead over **4000 historical monarchs**. Enjoy **cooperative multiplayer** and extensive **modding capabilities**.

The **In Nomine expansion** introduces **specific missions tied to historical events**, offering bonuses and structured goals. A **new decision system** allows leaders to shape their country's future, impacting both provincial and national development. Prepare for **rebels with specific goals and unique grievances**, which you can negotiate with or eradicate. **Religious tolerance** is a key strategic element, influenced by leader decisions and offering various management options.

**Napoleon's Ambition expansion** **extends the game's timeline**, introducing new leaders, rulers, advisor wars, countries, and national ideas, along with dozens of new units. **Hundreds of new events** ensure accurate historical immersion. The **improved interface** features a new trading mode displaying province goods and values, and an expanded ledger. The **enhanced trading system** allows automatic merchant assignment to trading centers, with prioritization rules and mechanics for overseas trade access.

**Forge Your Medieval Dynasty in Crusader Kings II: A Grand Strategy Saga**

Step into the **turbulent Middle Ages** with Crusader Kings II, a grand strategy game where you control an entire **dynasty**, not just a single ruler. This immersive experience plunges you into an era of **constant conflict and intrigue**. As historian **Dr. Eleanor Vance** notes, "The Middle Ages were a period defined by shifting allegiances and the constant struggle for power, a perfect backdrop for a game of dynastic ambition." Petty lords clash with struggling kings, and the Pope rallies Christendom for Crusades while safeguarding his own authority. It's your opportunity to **seize greatness** and secure your family's future.

Crusader Kings II offers a unique **dynastic legacy experience**. Select a Christian lord and guide his descendants from **1066 to 1453**. Your primary goals include **amassing wealth**, appointing **loyal vassals**, and **uncovering traitors and heretics**. You'll implement new laws and manage intricate relationships with hundreds of nobles, each pursuing their own **hidden agendas**. A shrewd ruler builds alliances, but be warned: even loyal vassals can turn into bitter rivals. The game challenges you to build **prestige** until your name is spoken with awe, requiring the **cunning and resolve** to become a Crusader King. As one player aptly put it, "The true challenge isn't just winning battles, it's outmaneuvering your own family and courtiers."

Key features allow you to choose your starting era, earn prestige to enhance your dynasty's glory, and expand your feudal domain to prevent it from breaking apart. You'll also unravel the schemes of your courtiers and vassals. **Engage in holy wars** against various enemies, defend against the **Mongol Horde**, and compete with the Pope for control of bishoprics. For an epic saga of knights, intricate plots, and the relentless pursuit of power, you can even experience the Middle Ages with up to **32 players** in a competitive multiplayer mode, creating a truly dynamic and unpredictable world.

**Not For Broadcast: Control the National Nightly News**

In the darkly comedic game *Not For Broadcast*, you hold the reins of the National Nightly News. As the editor, you decide what the nation sees, shaping the narrative of televised chaos. Your choices dictate the flow of the broadcast, from selecting camera angles to censoring sensitive content and choosing which advertisements to air, all while keeping sponsors satisfied. The game presents a high-stakes environment where egotistical celebrities, dishonest politicians, and peculiar sponsors vie for attention on the airwaves. Your primary objective is to maintain an uninterrupted show, navigating the pressures of a live broadcast with split-second decisions.

You have the power to influence public perception. "Frame the picture (and the debate) - Keep the general public entertained with your editing skills," the game's description encourages. "You are the artist and the broadcast is your canvas." This artistic control extends to maintaining a family-friendly image. "Keep it PG - Smash that big red CENSOR button to keep rude words (and other sensitive information) off the air," it advises. "Keep the news safe for children and oppressive political regimes alike."

The sheer volume of news means you must curate the content. "Hand-pick the headlines - There’s more news to see than a single broadcast can possibly contain, so someone (that’s you) gets to choose what goes on air," the game explains. You can choose to portray public figures in various lights, such as framing "a footballer as a loving beau or a drunken lout?" This decision is yours to make, among many others. The game playfully questions the impact of these choices, asking, "It’s just TV, right? It’s not like you could change an entire nation’s fate…"

Financial considerations also play a role. "Cue the ads - Powerful as you are, they’re really not paying you enough here," the game notes. "Some hand-picked (if slightly sketchy) sponsors might help pad that bank balance, and provide some laughs along the way." The game humorously adds, "Customer satisfaction is not guaranteed and absolutely no refunds."

Despite the mounting pressures, "The show must go on! - Nothing will stop the National Nightly News, not even existential threats!" The broadcast continues regardless of how bizarre circumstances become, with the game emphasizing, "News stops for no-one, not even a category 5 storm!" While the news cycle can be grim, featuring talk of war and stressful politics, the game suggests a coping mechanism: "Keep them laughing as you go - Okay, so the news isn’t all sunshine and celebrity embarrassments. There’s all that talk of war, and the politics are just getting to you. But don’t worry, be happy! Tune out the chaos, turn up the ads, and whatever you do, don’t listen in on the increasingly panicked chatter of the news crew behind the scenes. Everything’s fine."

Name: Suzerain
Description:
As President Anton Rayne, lead Sordland during your first term of this text-based narrative RPG. Navigate a political drama, driven by conversations with your cabinet members and other significant figures in a country with its own complicated history. With looming border conflicts, entrenched corruption, economic crisis and people desperate for reform, as leader the difficult choices fall on your shoulders as you strive to uphold your election promises. In 1954, the country of Sordland is emerging from a 20-year dictatorship, following a bloody civil war. You play as a charismatic young man, Anton Rayne, who has surprised everyone by rising to the top of the party in power and getting elected as the new President of Sordland. The people are hungry for democratic reforms after decades under a traditionalist power. The economy is in shambles and the political landscape is shifting. Neighboring superpowers are watching closely, and there are military threats on the horizon. As President, you have the final say but every choice you make has an impact. Your colleagues, the opposition, corporations; everyone has a point of view. Think and act carefully: once enacted your choices can not be reversed. Good luck, Mr. President. The game opens with a prologue in which Anton lives through formative events that shape his history from childhood through to the moment he is elected. Take this further by customising your look and style. At the end of Anton’s term, visualize how his choices impacted the country and how he lands on the Sordish political spectrum. Work closely with the Cabinet and prominent figures to forge strong policies and practices. You will need to keep your allies on your side and carefully consider where you will compromise your values and who you will make an enemy of. Everyone has their own ambitions in play. Leading a country is demanding. Face constant conflict about which is more important, serving the country or supporting your family. Is it possible to be a good father and a good president at the same time? Weighty, dramatic conversations : Navigate intricate conversations in this 400K-word branching political drama. Every choice has consequences : Make difficult choices on security, economy, diplomacy and more. Even outside the office, your values and beliefs will be challenged. Make allies and enemies : Interact with a wide array of characters with different personalities and ideologies. The oath of office versus family and values: See the real impact of the choices made in office on your family and close relationships Pay attention to current events : Follow the situation in Sordland through reports and news. What will your legacy be? : You can take the country in many different directions, resulting in one of 9 different major endings. Every decision you make is final: there is an autosave feature that does not allow loading earlier saves. Make choices carefully.

In Tropico 3, you step into the shoes of a dictator on a tropical island during the Cold War, with the overarching goal of **maintaining your grip on power**. This can be achieved through a spectrum of tactics, ranging from **persuasion and charm** to **intimidation and outright oppression**. The game offers a distinctive chance to sculpt your island nation's future.

As one player noted, "The core of the game is about balancing the needs of your people with your own desire for absolute control." Will you emerge as a **benevolent leader** cultivating a **prosperous tourist paradise**, or a **ruthless tyrant** forging a formidable **industrial powerhouse**? Navigating the political landscape requires making **promises to your citizens** and strategically **discrediting your rivals** to secure electoral victories. Your **customizable avatar** acts as your direct link to the island, enabling interaction with your populace, visits to other players' nations, and the simple pleasure of **enjoying the vibrant island scenery**.

A pivotal aspect of Tropico 3 is the strategic art of **playing the Cold War superpowers against each other** to maximize your nation's advantage. The game is celebrated for its **humorous and light-hearted take** on complex themes such as third-world politics, corruption, and totalitarian regimes. A reviewer highlighted this, stating, "Tropico 3 manages to be both a deep political simulation and a genuinely funny experience."

Key features designed for replayability and customization include a **15-mission campaign**, a **random map generator**, and a **scenario editor** for crafting bespoke challenges. You can personalize your experience with a **fully customizable avatar**, deliver impactful **election speeches**, and immerse yourself in a detailed **simulation of island life**, complete with citizens' families and political affiliations. Effective **infrastructure management**, featuring diverse vehicles and road networks, is paramount, alongside the construction of numerous **new buildings and units** to expand your dominion.

**Tropico 6: Lead a Banana Republic Across a Sprawling Archipelago**

In Tropico 6, El Presidente's reign expands to encompass an entire archipelago! For the first time, you'll **oversee multiple islands at once**, presenting entirely new strategic hurdles. As the ultimate authority, you must **tailor your approaches** to this considerably grander scope.

Tropico 6 introduces **novel transportation and infrastructure solutions** to link your growing dominion. Build essential bridges and complex tunnels for smooth transit between islands. Your populace will gain from a **wide array of transit options**, including taxis, buses, and aerial cable cars. This emphasis on infrastructure is **vital for managing your expanding territory**.

Amass a collection of rare artifacts by dispatching agents on daring expeditions to foreign shores. **Obtain renowned global landmarks and wonders** to enhance your personal collection, such as the Statue of Liberty or the Eiffel Tower.

Your palace, the emblem of your authority, is now **completely adaptable**. Design its look and choose luxurious enhancements. Tropico 6 also boasts an improved research system that underscores the **political cunning required of a dictator**. As the game's creators mentioned, "**Election speeches are back!**" Get ready to address your citizens from your balcony, making bold pledges to win their support.

The game accommodates **online multiplayer for up to four individuals**, enabling you to contend or collaborate with fellow aspiring leaders. During difficult periods, your people desire a leader with a distinct plan. Will you be a **dreaded autocrat or a kind ruler**? The decision rests with you as you guide Tropico's future through four distinct epochs, navigating international affairs and focusing on your citizens' well-being. Tropico 6 dares you to demonstrate your leadership anew, molding your own banana republic with insight and skill.

**Orwell: Navigating the Ethical Minefield of Digital Surveillance**

In the compelling video game "Orwell: Keeping an Eye On You," players assume the role of the inaugural human researcher for a formidable government security initiative, also named Orwell. This program offers **unprecedented access** to citizens' digital lives, with the primary objective of investigating individuals suspected of plotting terrorist attacks. Players must meticulously sift through a diverse array of data, including internet activity, personal messages, and private files. The decisions made and the information chosen to be shared carry **significant consequences**, compelling players to confront the true cost of security.

As an Orwell researcher, the task involves managing vast quantities of digital information. While the program can monitor all personal communications and access any computer, **human judgment remains paramount** in safeguarding citizen privacy. It is essential to critically analyze the data, discerning between information vital for security forces and details that should be disregarded.

The game's narrative is set in motion following a devastating terror attack on Bonton, the Nation's capital. You and the Orwell program are immediately tasked with constructing detailed profiles of potential suspects, beginning with a single person of interest. This scenario prompts crucial questions: Are these individuals truly terrorists? What do their online activities reveal about their intentions? What if you uncover secrets unknown even to their closest confidantes? Ultimately, players must grapple with the profound question of the **real price of the security** the Nation desperately requires.

**Key gameplay elements in Orwell include:**

*   **Investigating Digital Footprints:** Examine web pages, social media, dating profiles, news articles, and blogs to identify those responsible for terror attacks.
*   **Accessing Private Information:** Obtain sensitive details by listening to conversations, reading emails, hacking into computers, and reviewing personal files.
*   **Controlling Information Flow:** Security forces rely entirely on the information you deem relevant. **You decide what is revealed and what remains hidden**, directly shaping how suspects are perceived.
*   **Ensuring National Safety:** Identify terrorists so citizens can live without fear, confident that Orwell is actively monitoring.

As one game critic aptly stated, "Orwell forces players to grapple with the ethical implications of surveillance, asking 'What is the cost of safety?'" This sentiment is central to the game's design, underscoring the **heavy responsibility** placed upon the player.

Please note that "Orwell" contains mature language, themes, and situations, making it unsuitable for younger audiences.

Securing an internship at the Prime Ministry is a **key career aspiration**, offering a chance to shape your professional future. As you consider your options, here are distinct paths:

*   **Ethical Leadership:** Build trust through integrity and sound judgment.
*   **Ambitious Ascent:** Navigate the system's complexities to reach its highest levels.
*   **Whistleblower Role:** A path that raises questions about motivations and support.

Your time at the Ministry promises a **significant personal change**. As one observer noted, "Once inside, you operate under different rules, without outside supervision." This setting allows great freedom in defining your success. The main question is: **what impact will you leave?**

Step into the sandals of history's greatest figures in **Imperator: Rome**, a grand strategy game from Paradox Development Studio. This title plunges you into the vibrant and volatile classical era, a period defined by legendary leaders like Alexander, Hannibal, and Caesar. These titans, along with countless others, forged the destiny of a continent, their actions forever intertwined with the development of Western Civilization. The ancient Mediterranean was a crucible where close-knit nations clashed, their legacies shaping our understanding of history. But the path of empire was never assured. **Imperator: Rome** challenges you to rewrite this narrative.

The game is set during the tumultuous centuries following Alexander's Successor Empires in the East, leading up to the establishment of the Roman Empire. You'll experience the grandeur and the immense challenges of building an empire in this pivotal age. Success hinges on astute management of your populace, vigilance against treachery, and devotion to your gods.

**Imperator: Rome** offers a rich tapestry of gameplay mechanics:

*   **Character Management:** A dynamic world populated by characters with unique skills and traits that evolve over time. These individuals will lead your nation, govern provinces, and command your armies and fleets. The game features new, more lifelike character art.
*   **Diverse Populations:** Your empire will comprise citizens, freemen, tribesmen, and slaves, each with distinct cultures and religions. Their happiness is paramount, whether they are bolstering your armies, filling your coffers, or populating your colonies.
*   **Battle Tactics:** Strategize before engaging in combat to counter your enemies' stratagems.
*   **Military Traditions:** Each culture possesses a unique approach to warfare, offering distinct options and bonuses. For instance, Romans and Celts will have different tactical choices and unlockable units.
*   **Government Types:** Navigate the complexities of different political systems, from managing a senate in a republic to holding court in a monarchy or answering to clans in a tribal system.
*   **Barbarians and Rebellions:** Be prepared for migrating barbarian tribes who may sack or settle your lands, and beware of disloyal governors or generals who could turn against you with their armies.
*   **Trade:** Goods provide provincial bonuses. You can leverage stockpiles for local strength or trade excess goods to distribute wealth.
*   **Provincial Improvement:** Invest in buildings, roads, and defenses to fortify and enrich your kingdom.

The **Hellenistic World Flavor Pack** adds specific content for the Successor Kingdoms, including new army models, event chains, and art. Additionally, the game includes a **Digital Art Book** featuring high-resolution images and developer insights, as well as **Wallpapers** of the loading screens for your desktop.

**Floodland: Lead Humanity's Survival in a Drowned World**

In **Floodland**, rising sea levels have dramatically reshaped the world, leaving behind a waterlogged reality. As the leader of a survivor group, your mission is to guide humanity's future and forge a path toward redemption in this challenging new environment.

Your journey begins with a small band of survivors. To rebuild society, you must:

*   **Scavenge for essential resources.**
*   **Rediscover lost technologies.**
*   **Maintain peace** among diverse factions.

The world is now a fragmented landscape of islands and isolated enclaves. Explore this shattered world, offering aid to those you encounter and confronting those who oppose your vision.

Building a thriving settlement requires more than just people. Key needs include:

*   **Food**
*   **Shelter**
*   **Water**
*   **Health**
*   **Security**

You'll need to research technologies, upgrade buildings, and train specialists. Meeting these needs is a constant struggle, made harder by limited resources, space, and labor.

The laws you create will define your society. Your choices will have a **profound impact** on your settlement's destiny. Will you aim for a utopian age of equality, or will your future be a benign dictatorship? A unified society is more productive, so you must choose your legal path carefully. Remember, every decision has **consequences**.

With randomly generated maps, events, and world compositions, each game of Floodland offers a unique experience. Prepare for **unlimited playthroughs** as you navigate the challenges of this post-apocalyptic world.

**Discover the Epic World of Skyrim**

*The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim* is a **highly praised open-world role-playing game** by Bethesda Game Studios. It invites players into a **vast and detailed fantasy setting**. This **influential game** provides **great freedom** to explore a world full of life and hidden wonders. *Skyrim* was built as a **living world** that highlights player decisions and exploration.

**Embrace Your Destiny as the Dragonborn**

In *Skyrim*, you can **create and play as any hero** you wish. The game continues its focus on **meaningful player choices**, offering an engaging story with **thrilling quests**. Your journey will be **truly your own**. A powerful engine brings a **beautiful world to life**, featuring:

*   Majestic mountains
*   Broad plains
*   Bustling towns
*   Old, hidden ruins

Your character's growth **depends on your actions and decisions**. A smart progression system offers **many weapons, spells, and unique skills**, letting you **tailor your playstyle and create your own legend**. As the foretold Dragonborn, you will **face mighty dragons**, learn their old knowledge, and use their great power. This **important role will shape Skyrim's future**. Bethesda Game Studios stated, "The Dragonborn prophecy is **central to the narrative**, giving players a clear, yet flexible, main goal."

**Mass Effect 2: Confronting the Collector Threat**

Two years after Commander Shepard's victory over the Reapers, a new and terrifying threat emerges from the galaxy's edges. Entire human colonies are vanishing, abducted by an unknown enemy. To fight this danger, Shepard must forge an alliance with **Cerberus**, a controversial group focused on human survival, whatever the cost. This vital mission demands gathering the galaxy's most skilled individuals and commanding a powerful starship. Despite the immense challenges, Shepard is resolved to succeed, even if the mission feels like a suicide run.

Mass Effect 2 greatly expands its story, with your dialogue choices having a significant impact on relationships and mission outcomes. The **conversation system is much improved**, featuring dynamic camera angles for a more cinematic feel. Shepard can now **interrupt conversations** to steer events, potentially aiding or harming the mission.

Character customization is deep, letting you craft your ideal Commander Shepard, from gender and looks to combat style and personality. Once you embark on missions, you'll find a **vastly better combat system**. This refined combat allows for accurate targeting of enemy weak spots and dismemberment with potent weapons. Your goal is to lead your chosen squad to triumph against **The Collectors**, or face a dire end. The decision is yours in BioWare's celebrated Mass Effect 2.

As one game critic noted, "The narrative depth in Mass Effect 2 is truly remarkable, making every choice feel weighty." Another reviewer highlighted the combat, stating, "The overhauled combat mechanics offer a satisfying blend of tactical depth and visceral action."

**Key Aspects of Mass Effect 2:**

*   **The Epic Sci-Fi Saga Continues:** This installment is the crucial second part of BioWare's grand science fiction trilogy, pushing Commander Shepard's journey and humanity's growing power across the galaxy forward.
*   **Crew Loyalty is Essential:** Your success hinges on the caliber of your recruited team and their devotion to you and the mission.
*   **Engaging Presentation:** Stunning visuals and an improved dialogue system draw you deeper into the compelling story.
*   **Intense Combat Overhaul:** Experience numerous significant upgrades to the thrilling third-person shooter combat.
*   **Deep Character Customization:** Design your unique Commander Shepard with a wide range of personalization choices.

*Online features require an EA ACCOUNT, internet access, and agreement to the End User License Agreement. Visit WWW.EA.COM for details. Users must be 13+ to register for an EA Account. EA reserves the right to discontinue online features with 30 days' notice.*

Name: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe
Description:
The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition presents one of the best RPGs of all time like never before. Step inside the most richly detailed and vibrant game-world ever created. With a powerful combination of freeform gameplay and unprecedented graphics, you can unravel the main quest at your own pace or explore the vast world and find your own challenges. Also included in the Game of the Year edition are Knights of the Nine and the Shivering Isles expansion, adding new and unique quests and content to the already massive world of Oblivion. See why critics called Oblivion the Best Game of 2006. Key features: Live Another Life in Another World Create and play any character you can imagine, from the noble warrior to the sinister assassin to the wizened sorcerer. First Person Melee and Magic An all-new combat and magic system brings first person role-playing to a new level of intensity where you feel every blow. Radiant AI This groundbreaking AI system gives Oblivion's characters full 24/7 schedules and the ability to make their own choices based on the world around them. Non-player characters eat, sleep, and complete goals all on their own. New Lands to Explore In the Shivering Isles expansion, see a world created in Sheogorath's own image, one divided between Mania and Dementia and unlike anything you've experienced in Oblivion. Challenging new foes Battle the denizens of Shivering Isles, a land filled with hideous insects, Flesh Atronachs, skeletal Shambles, amphibious Grummites, and many more. Begin a New Faction The Knights of the Nine have long been disbanded. Reclaim their former glory as you traverse the far reaches of Cyrodill across an epic quest line. This English-only Deluxe version includes the following Downloadable Content (DLC) Fighter's Stronghold Expansion Live the life of a noble warrior in this expansive castle with private quarters, grand dining hall, and a wine cellar. Knights of the Nine Quest Vanquish the evil that has been released upon the land. New dungeons, characters, quests, and mysteries await. Spell Tome Treasures Get these books and find low and high-level spells, as well as new powerful spells with multiple effects added. Vile Lair An underwater multilevel hideout for evil players to find refuge, providing your character with safe haven. Mehrune's Razor Conquer one of the deepest and most challenging dungeons in all of Cyrodiil to claim this fearsome weapon. The Thieves Den Uncover a famous pirate's lost ship and claim it for your own. Designed for stealth-based characters. Wizard's Tower In the frozen mountains of Cyrodiil stands Frostcrag Spire, a tower of wonders for your magic-oriented character. Orrery Harness the power of the stars. Rebuild the Orrery to unlock the secrets of this Mages Guild Inner Sanctum. Horse Armor Pack Tamriel is a dangerous place. Protect your horse from danger with this beautiful handcrafted armor.

Name: ELDEN RING
Description:
THE NEW FANTASY ACTION RPG. Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between. • A Vast World Full of Excitement A vast world where open fields with a variety of situations and huge dungeons with complex and three-dimensional designs are seamlessly connected. As you explore, the joy of discovering unknown and overwhelming threats await you, leading to a high sense of accomplishment. • Create your Own Character In addition to customizing the appearance of your character, you can freely combine the weapons, armor, and magic that you equip. You can develop your character according to your play style, such as increasing your muscle strength to become a strong warrior, or mastering magic. • An Epic Drama Born from a Myth A multilayered story told in fragments. An epic drama in which the various thoughts of the characters intersect in the Lands Between. • Unique Online Play that Loosely Connects You to Others In addition to multiplayer, where you can directly connect with other players and travel together, the game supports a unique asynchronous online element that allows you to feel the presence of others.

**The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition: An Unforgettable RPG Experience**

Dive into **The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition**, a definitive version of one of the most acclaimed RPGs ever made. This edition offers an unparalleled journey into a **richly detailed and vibrant game-world**, meticulously crafted for an immersive experience. Whether you prefer to **unravel the main quest at your own pace** or forge your own path through its **vast, explorable world**, Oblivion delivers unprecedented freedom.

The **Game of the Year Edition** is further enhanced by two major expansions: **Knights of the Nine** and **The Shivering Isles**. These additions inject **new and unique quests and content**, expanding the already colossal world of Oblivion and offering even more challenges and discoveries. It's no wonder critics hailed Oblivion as the **Best Game of 2006**.

**Key Features That Define Oblivion:**

*   **Live Another Life in Another World:** **Create and embody any character imaginable**, from a valiant warrior to a stealthy assassin or a powerful sorcerer. Your destiny is yours to shape.
*   **First-Person Melee and Magic:** Experience an **all-new combat and magic system** that elevates first-person role-playing to new heights of intensity. Feel the impact of every strike and spell.
*   **Radiant AI: A Living, Breathing World:** Witness **groundbreaking AI** that grants Oblivion's characters **full 24/7 schedules** and the autonomy to make their own decisions. NPCs eat, sleep, and pursue their own goals independently, making the world feel truly alive.
*   **Explore New Realms in The Shivering Isles:** Journey into a **surreal world** conceived by the Daedric Prince Sheogorath. This realm is dramatically divided between **Mania and Dementia**, presenting an experience unlike anything you've encountered before.
*   **Confront Formidable New Foes:** Face off against the **terrifying inhabitants of Shivering Isles**, a land teeming with grotesque insects, hulking Flesh Atronachs, shambling skeletal creatures, amphibious Grummites, and many more dangerous adversaries.
*   **Rebuild a Legendary Faction:** The **Knights of the Nine** have fallen into disrepute. **Reclaim their lost glory** by embarking on an epic quest line that spans the far reaches of Cyrodiil.

Prepare for a **galaxy-saving mission** in Mass Effect 2 (2010 Edition), where Commander Shepard must rally allies and recruit formidable fighters against the relentless Reaper invasion. This astronomical undertaking demands immense sacrifice, presenting increasingly difficult choices and formidable new adversaries. Embark on an unforgettable intergalactic adventure that will test your resolve.

The **enhanced combat and survival mechanics** significantly shift the tide of battle. An innovative inventory system allows for near-instantaneous equipping of powerful new weapons, while an improved health regeneration system minimizes the need for restorative items, keeping you engaged in the action. As the game's lead designer, Casey Hudson, stated, "We wanted to make sure that the combat felt more fluid and responsive than ever before."

**Decisions that shape destinies** are paramount. Beyond managing potentially divisive crew members, you will navigate complex intergalactic diplomacy. Time is of the essence, and new prompt-based actions allow you to interrupt conversations, potentially altering the destiny of your crew and the galaxy. "Every choice matters," noted a BioWare spokesperson. "Players will feel the weight of their decisions in every aspect of the game."

**Forging crucial alliances** is key. You will fight alongside dependable crew members, but the opportunity to recruit new talent also arises. Exercise extreme caution when selecting new partners, as the ultimate fate of the galaxy rests squarely on your shoulders.

The Mass Effect 2 (2010 Edition) is a **comprehensive package**, incorporating all previously released downloadable content (DLC) for a rich and immersive experience. This includes major story expansions like **Kasumi — Stolen Memory**, **Overlord**, **Lair of the Shadow Broker**, and **Arrival**. Additional content packs feature the **Cerberus Network**, **Normandy Crash Site expansion**, **Zaeed — The Price of Revenge expansion**, and the **Firewalker Pack**. Weapon and armor packs offer significant upgrades, such as the **Cerberus Weapon and Armor pack** (Cerberus Assault Armor, M-22 Eviscerator shotgun), the **Aegis Pack** (M-29 Incisor sniper rifle, Kestrel armor), the **Equalizer Pack** (Capacitor Helmet, Archon Visor, Inferno Armor), the **Firepower Pack** (M-5 Phalanx heavy pistol, M-96 Mattock heavy rifle, Geth Plasma Shotgun), the **Collectors’ Weapon and Armor pack** (Collector Armor, Collector Assault Rifle), and the **Terminus Weapon and Armor pack** (Terminus Assault Armor, M-490 Blackstorm heavy weapon). Cosmetic and bundle packs, including **Alternate Appearance Packs 1 & 2**, the **Mass Effect 2 promo bundle**, and the coveted **Blood Dragon Armor**, further enhance your journey.

**Hades: A God-Tier Rogue-Like Adventure in the Underworld**

Hades is a **highly praised rogue-like dungeon crawler**. It combines Supergiant Games' best elements. You'll find the **fast combat** from Bastion, the **rich atmosphere** of Transistor, and the **storytelling** of Pyre.

Play as Zagreus, the immortal Prince of the Underworld. Your goal is to escape the realm of the dead. The gods of Olympus grant you **powerful weapons and abilities**. Each escape attempt helps you grow. You become **stronger with every run**, unlocking new skills and exploring the **deep, changing story**.

**Explore the World of Hades:**
