Street Fighter V delivers **intense one-on-one combat** with a diverse roster of **16 iconic characters**, each boasting a unique backstory and specialized training. Players can engage in thrilling matches against friends, either online or locally, with a variety of options designed to suit **all playstyles**.

Players can earn **Fight Money** through competitive Ranked Matches, or opt for more casual play in Casual Matches. For those seeking to settle **friendly rivalries**, private sessions can be hosted in a Battle Lounge. A standout feature is the **cross-play compatibility**, allowing players on PlayStation 4 and Steam to compete seamlessly.

The "Arcade Edition" of Street Fighter V expands the experience with engaging modes like Arcade Mode, Team Battle Mode, and the online Extra Battle Mode. These modes offer opportunities to unlock **valuable rewards, XP, and Fight Money**. This in-game currency is essential for acquiring **new characters, cosmetic outfits, additional stages, and more**.

Dive into the **compelling cinematic story mode, "A Shadow Falls,"** and witness the formidable power of M. Bison as he unleashes seven Black Moons, casting the world into shadow.

For the **definitive Street Fighter V experience**, consider the Street Fighter V: Champion Edition. This comprehensive package includes all content from the original and Arcade Edition (with the exception of select costumes). It also incorporates **every character, stage, and costume released after the Arcade Edition**, presenting a vast collection featuring **40 characters, 34 stages, and over 200 costumes**.

Mastering the game's intricate mechanics is **crucial for success**. **V-Trigger 1 and 2** unleash potent, character-specific abilities and unique moves when your V-Gauge is full, capable of inflicting significant damage or enabling a dramatic comeback. **V-Skills 1 and 2** are fundamental for developing your strategy and replenishing your V-Gauge, each offering a distinct move or advantage to aid in V-Gauge progression.

Control the rhythm of the fight with **V-Reversal**. This defensive technique, which consumes one V-Gauge stock, can effectively interrupt an opponent's offensive pressure, creating an opening for your own counter-attack.

**Special Attacks and EX Special Attacks** are foundational to Street Fighter's strategic depth. Utilizing a variety of Special Attacks helps manage the battlefield, dictate the match's tempo, and build your Critical Gauge for enhanced offensive capabilities. **EX Special Attacks** are powered-up versions of these moves, requiring one bar of the Critical Gauge.

The ultimate offensive maneuver is the **Critical Art**. This devastating attack can be unleashed once your Critical Gauge is completely filled, delivering a decisive blow to your opponent. As one prominent player noted, "The timing of your Critical Art can completely turn the tide of a match."

Your journey begins with the iconic **D-Day landings in Normandy**. You will command Allied forces as they confront German adversaries across a series of pivotal World War II battles. Test your strategic prowess in **2-8 player online matches**, playable via LAN or the internet. Team up with friends for thrilling battles between the **Axis and Allied forces**.

**Company of Heroes: A Revolutionary WWII RTS Experience**

For those seeking **total conversions** and **user reviews** for the original Company of Heroes (COH1), the **'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page on Steam** is your definitive resource.

Company of Heroes offers a **profoundly immersive World War II real-time strategy (RTS) journey** that **reshaped the genre**. It vividly captures the **human cost of war** through **devastated landscapes** and **ever-changing battlegrounds**. Players will engage in **critical WWII operations**, beginning with the **decisive D-Day landings in Normandy**. Within the single-player campaign, you will lead **Allied forces** against **German opposition**, emphasizing the **courage of individual soldiers** confronting overwhelming odds.

The game's **sophisticated squad artificial intelligence** fosters a **realistic combat environment**. Your troops react **intelligently to their surroundings**, **leveraging cover** and executing **strategic maneuvers**. Relic's **pioneering engine** delivers **stunning visuals** and a **physics-driven world** with a **completely destructible environment**. This allows you to **reshape the battlefield** by **destroying buildings**, **exploiting terrain for tactical gains**, and **impeding enemy progress**. Beyond its captivating single-player narrative, Company of Heroes provides **multiplayer engagements for 2-8 participants**, featuring **thrilling online or LAN confrontations** between **Axis and Allied armies**.

Dota 2 is a **highly strategic battle arena game** on Steam, attracting millions of players daily due to its **deep gameplay and competitive spirit**. The game features an **impressive roster of over one hundred unique heroes**, offering **significant opportunities for skill development** for players of all levels. Dota 2's core systems, mechanics, and hero balance are **regularly updated**, ensuring the game remains **fresh and evolving**. Several key elements distinguish Dota 2:

*   **An intricately designed, highly strategic map**
*   **An exceptional variety of hero choices**

Each hero has a distinct set of abilities and powerful items, resulting in **remarkably diverse gameplay** where **no two matches are the same**. The inherent flexibility of hero roles, coupled with a **wide selection of items, promotes deep strategic decision-making**, enabling players to fully express their individual playstyles.

A **fundamental principle of Dota 2 is that all heroes are entirely free to play**. The game is built on fair competition, guaranteeing that all essential gameplay elements, including the **complete hero roster, are instantly available to every player from the outset**. While optional cosmetic items can be purchased, these **do not affect gameplay or competitive balance whatsoever**.

Playing with friends is a **crucial part of the Dota 2 experience**. Despite its challenging learning curve and ongoing updates, it's an **excellent time to begin playing**. New players can grasp the fundamentals by playing against AI or by practicing in the hero testing area. The game's advanced matchmaking system is designed to create **fair and enjoyable matches** by pairing players with opponents of similar skill and behavior. This approach ensures a more balanced and engaging experience for everyone.

**Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition: Conquer the Age of Enlightenment**

Embark on an epic journey through the **Age of Enlightenment** with **Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition**. This comprehensive package includes all downloadable content and feature updates, offering hundreds of hours of **absorbing gameplay**. Take command of the land, rule the seas, forge a new nation, and **conquer the globe** in this definitive version of the acclaimed strategy game.

Total War: EMPIRE transports you to the 18th century, a period of **political upheaval, military advancements, and radical thought**. For the first time, you can intuitively command single ships or vast fleets on seascapes brought to life with extraordinary water and weather effects. With **Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition**, you receive every piece of content made for the game, ensuring a complete and **unforgettable strategic experience**.

## Mastering Strategy in Total War: SHOGUN 2

**Total War: SHOGUN 2** plunges players into the turbulent 16th-century Sengoku period of Japan, a time of **intense conflict and the relentless pursuit of national unity**. As a **Daimyo**, the leader of your clan, your ultimate objective is to **forge a unified Japan under your rule** and claim the title of Shogun. This grand ambition requires a mastery of **military command, economic management, and shrewd diplomacy**. The core gameplay loop centers on conquering territories, developing your provinces, and executing **brilliant strategic maneuvers**.

The game is renowned for its **stunning 3D battles** on both land and sea, a hallmark of the Total War series. These thrilling combat encounters are seamlessly integrated with the **strategic campaign map**, the foundation of the Total War experience. SHOGUN 2 uniquely incorporates an innovative AI system inspired by **Sun Tzu's "The Art of War,"** a philosophy that profoundly influenced Japanese military doctrine. As the game's developers have noted, this ancient wisdom is woven into the gameplay, creating an experience that is both **deeply strategic and remarkably accessible**. The game's mechanics champion victory through clever tactics, echoing Sun Tzu's timeless advice: **"The supreme art of war is to subdue the enemy without fighting."**

Your path to dominance involves leading disciplined samurai armies and powerful naval fleets in **captivating real-time battles**. The turn-based campaign map allows you to expand your influence through economic growth, political maneuvering, and military strength. **Strategic complexity is amplified** by applying tactical principles derived from "The Art of War," such as implementing devastating battle strategies, utilizing spies for crucial intelligence gathering, and deploying assassins to eliminate key adversaries.

For players eager to test their skills against others, **robust multiplayer options** are available. You can embark on the main campaign with a friend in cooperative play or engage in large-scale online battles with up to eight participants. SHOGUN 2 also introduces **innovative gameplay elements**, including RPG-like progression systems for your Generals and Agents, multi-phase siege battles for dynamic assaults, the inclusion of formidable Hero units, and a vibrant and interactive 3D campaign map.

**Master Feudal Japan's Warfare in Total War: SHOGUN 2**

Total War: SHOGUN 2 plunges players into the tumultuous 16th century of Feudal Japan, a period defined by relentless conflict. The once unified nation has splintered, with ten powerful warlords vying for supremacy. Amidst this landscape of intrigue and warfare, only one clan leader will ultimately triumph, uniting the land and claiming the coveted title of Shogun.

As a Daimyo, you are tasked with the monumental challenge of **reuniting Japan** under your banner. This involves not only military conquest but also astute economic development and shrewd diplomacy. The game's core experience revolves around the strategic campaign map, enhanced by the series' signature **full 3D land and sea battles**.

A significant innovation in Total War: SHOGUN 2 is its **new AI system**, directly inspired by Sun Tzu's seminal work, "The Art of War." This ancient text, which profoundly influenced Japanese military strategy, was meticulously studied by The Creative Assembly to craft a **deep yet accessible gameplay experience**.

Key features of Total War: SHOGUN 2 include:

*   **Conquer Japan:** Lead your armies and fleets across the war-torn islands in visually stunning real-time battles featuring iconic samurai and warships.
*   **Build Your Empire:** Develop your domain on a turn-based campaign map, employing economic, political, and military strategies to amass wealth, raise formidable armies, and expand your influence.
*   **Scheme with Sun Tzu:** Apply the timeless principles of "The Art of War" through **innovative tactics** such as fire and siege warfare, alongside espionage and assassination, to adapt to the battlefield and effectively manage your territory.
*   **Online Warfare:** Engage in the main campaign in a **two-player mode**, or join **epic online battles** with up to eight players in specialized campaigns.

Total War: SHOGUN 2 also introduces several new elements to the series:

*   **Enhanced Leadership:** Generals and Agents now possess **new RPG skills and experience**, allowing for greater customization and strategic impact.
*   **Multi-Stage Sieges:** Siege warfare is more complex, with scaling walls representing only the initial challenge in capturing a city.
*   **Hero Units:** Deploy **powerful Hero units** to bolster your troops' morale and turn the tide of battle against enemy forces.
*   **Dynamic Campaign Map:** A **newly implemented rotating 3D campaign map** offers a more immersive and strategic overview of your domain.

Name: Sacrifice
Description:
Sacrifice is the acclaimed real-time strategy game that focuses on combat instead of resource gathering. The only two resources you'll need to worry about are mana and souls. Need more units? Capture the souls of your enemy. Cast spells of awesome power. Choose which gods to support and you will be rewarded with a different selection of spells. Banish your enemy by sacrificing one of your allies at his altar...

**Rise of Nations: Extended Edition: A Comprehensive Guide to Historical Real-Time Strategy**

**Rise of Nations: Extended Edition** is a real-time strategy game where you guide a civilization through all of human history. You begin with a small settlement in the Ancient Age and must **gather resources**, **build infrastructure**, and **research technologies** to advance your nation. Building **Wonders of the World**, such as the Pyramids or Eiffel Tower, offers significant strategic benefits.

As your civilization grows, so does its military might. Prepare for **global conquest** with a wide variety of units, ranging from ancient warriors to modern bombers and battleships. The game features **18 unique Nations**, each with distinct advantages and specialized units. You will command over **100 different military units** across land, sea, and air.

Develop your nation from a small city into an advanced society by constructing over **two dozen buildings**, each with its own upgrades. Discover and build **14 Wonders of the World**, including the Terra Cotta Army and the Taj Mahal, each providing special bonuses. Explore various map types, from the Amazon Rainforest to the Himalayas, and participate in the **"Conquer the World" campaign**, a series of historical scenarios.

The **Extended Edition** significantly improves upon the original game by incorporating **Rise of Nations: Thrones and Patriots**. This version includes **enhanced visuals** with better water effects and textures, **full-screen anti-aliasing** for smoother graphics, and **full Steamworks integration**. You can enjoy **ranked multiplayer matches** with an ELO system, earn **achievements**, collect **trading cards**, and utilize **cloud saves**.

**Commandos 2: Men of Courage** thrusts players into the intense world of World War II, where you'll lead an elite commando unit on dangerous missions deep behind enemy lines. The gameplay centers on strategically using the **unique skills of each commando** to conquer a variety of difficult objectives. As one reviewer highlighted, success hinges on "clever planning and precise execution."

The game features **authentic WWII locations**, transporting you to pivotal war zones. These include the heart of the Third Reich, a secret submarine base in Northern Europe, and the Japanese army's main headquarters. Environmental interaction is a significant element, allowing players to **steal enemy uniforms and weapons**, **climb poles and swing from cables**, **swim and operate vehicles**, and **seamlessly enter and exit buildings, ships, and planes**.

You'll command a varied team of **nine distinct commandos**, each with specialized abilities vital for mission success. This elite squad includes the Green Beret, Sniper, Demolitions Expert, Seductress, Thief, and even a Dog. The game's **all-new 3D engine** delivers a dynamic and immersive experience, offering **360-degree environment rotation**, smooth movement in and out of structures and underwater, and zoom capabilities for detailed observation. A notable feature is the **simultaneous management of multiple gameplay windows**, providing a comprehensive tactical overview.

Engage in **authentic WWII scenarios** across **10 missions** set in **9 diverse environments**. These missions take place in both day and night settings, enhanced by realistic weather effects. For PC players, a **cooperative multiplayer mode** introduces an additional layer of strategic depth. The game also introduces a range of new WWII vehicles and weapons, such as jeeps, tanks, trucks, ships, bazookas, and flamethrowers, further expanding tactical options.

**Tumblestone: A Unique Action-Puzzle Game**

Discover **Tumblestone**, a new action-puzzle game. It features **exciting multiplayer** and a **story mode**. The game presents **tough puzzles**, asks you to **help a sausage make friends**, and uncover the mystery of the **Tumblecrown**.

**Key Features:**

*   **Multiplayer Fun:** Enjoy **addictive puzzle-solving**. One reviewer said, "The multiplayer is where Tumblestone truly shines, offering a frantic yet strategic experience."
*   **Local Play:** Play with **up to four players** on one system.
*   **Online Play:** Compete with friends or **new players** online.
*   **Bot Battles:** Play against the **tough Nightmare bot** if no human players are around.
*   **Story Mode:** Play a **40+ hour campaign** that tests your puzzle skills. This mode includes:
    *   Over **10 gameplay types**.
    *   Difficult **puzzle areas**.
    *   Exciting **boss fights**.
*   **Arcade Modes:**
    *   **Marathon Mode:** A **calm way to play**.
    *   **Infinipuzzle Mode:** For **endless puzzles**.
    *   **Heartbeat Mode:** Offers **quick action**.
*   **Leaderboards:** Climb the **online leaderboards** to show off your skills.
*   **Quests:** Complete **many quests** for new challenges and rewards.
*   **Track Progress:** **Improve your rank** and see your stats compared to friends.
*   **Customization:** Choose from **twelve characters and settings** to make the game your own.

**PuzzleQuest: Challenge of the Warlords** combines classic puzzle action with an epic good vs. evil story. Your goal is to **save the Kingdom of Etheria** from the evil Lord Bane by mastering match-3 gameplay.

Here's how you play:

*   **Match crystals:** Make matches of different crystal types.
*   **Build spells:** Successful matches create powerful spells.
*   **Unleash spells:** Use spells to disrupt opponents and lower their scores.
*   **Strengthen your hero:** Win head-to-head battles to build and improve your character.

For a quicker challenge, try **Quick-play mode** for classic match-3 fun. Explore an **expansive kingdom** in a grand single-player campaign featuring over **150 quests**.

As you advance, you will:

*   **Build your empire:** Capture cities and construct castles.
*   **Assemble companions:** Recruit allies for crucial battle support.
*   **Earn gold:** Use victory earnings to buy gear like helms, weapons, and armor.
*   **Gain experience:** Experience tiles provide instant boosts.
*   **Inflict damage:** Matching skull tiles directly harms opponents.

Embark on an epic journey into a captivating puzzle game fantasy realm, teeming with extraordinary creatures, formidable weaponry, and engaging minigames. This sequel to the acclaimed Puzzle Quest masterfully intertwines addictive Match 3 mechanics with a deeply immersive role-playing experience, inviting you to dive headfirst into the adventure. You can personalize your hero by selecting from four distinct classes, each boasting a unique set of skills and abilities, allowing for diverse gameplay strategies. As you advance through the narrative, you will accumulate experience points and acquire valuable treasure, subsequently unlocking potent new spells and increasingly demanding Match 3 puzzles. The ultimate challenge awaits: will you prove yourself a valiant hero capable of liberating the once tranquil village of Verloren from the malevolent grip of the demon Gorgon?

Key Features of Puzzle Quest 2 include:

*   **Master New Abilities:** Acquire proficiency with innovative mana gems, powerful spells, and a variety of potent weapons.
*   **Character Customization:** Tailor your hero with four distinct classes, available in both male and female options, enabling a personalized playstyle.
*   **Immersive Story Mode:** Traverse an expansive and richly detailed fantasy world, unraveling its compelling narrative.
*   **Engaging Minigames:** Participate in a multitude of unique minigames designed to reward you with treasure and valuable experience.
*   **Character Progression and Online Battles:** Enhance and equip your character, then test your mettle against friends in thrilling online multiplayer matches.

**Bejeweled 3: A Deep Dive into the Premier Gem-Matching Experience**

Bejeweled 3 stands as the pinnacle of the celebrated gem-matching puzzle genre, introducing innovative gameplay mechanics. The game boasts **eight distinct modes**, ensuring a tailored experience for every player and promising extended periods of captivating entertainment.

Discover a diverse array of modes crafted for all preferences. **Classic Bejeweled** revives the cherished experience of matching gems, enhanced with potent new gems and refined mechanics. For those seeking a rigorous challenge, **Quest Mode** presents 40 elaborate puzzles designed to push your strategic abilities. **Lightning Mode** provides rapid, time-sensitive gameplay demanding swift decision-making. Alternatively, find tranquility in **Zen Mode**, where you can personalize the visual and auditory elements, including binaural beats, for a serene retreat.

Furthermore, Bejeweled 3 conceals **four secret games** that become accessible through progression, significantly broadening the game's replayability. The title showcases breathtaking **high-definition graphics**, ensuring each gem possesses a brilliant luminescence. Players can also strive to earn as many as **65 achievement badges**, serving as tangible proof of their expertise. Experience an uninterrupted stream of gem-matching enjoyment, characterized by fluid, cascading animations.

Name: Critical Mass
Description:
Critical Mass is an action puzzle game that takes traditional match 3 and brings it into the world of 3D. We combine fast addictive game play with strategy to create a new and innovative experience. Key features: Fast Addictive Gameplay 4 Unique Game Modes Online Leaderboards & Ranking Systems Achievements & Skillpoint Rewards Accessible to Everyone Exciting Colorful Art Style Great Music & Sound Effects.

In Victusia, the **Battle Chef Brigade** invites you to a unique culinary tournament where you must hunt monsters and craft exquisite dishes. To earn a spot in this prestigious brigade, you'll need to conquer a demanding competition. Step into the shoes of either **Mina** or **Thrash**, two ambitious chefs vying for the title of Brigadier. Your journey will be filled with **thrilling monster hunts** and **intricate cooking puzzles**, all while racing against the clock to impress the judges.

This game masterfully blends **action-packed combat** with **engaging puzzle-solving** and light **RPG elements**. Whether you choose Mina or Thrash, you'll experience characters brought to life with **stunning art and voice acting**. Critics have lauded these characters, describing them as "vibrantly illustrated and voiced," which contributes to the game's **distinct and memorable personality**.

The **Deluxe Edition** introduces **Ziggy, the Undead Necromancer Chef**, who is playable across several exciting modes:

*   **Local Multiplayer:** Challenge friends in head-to-head culinary battles.
*   **Break the Dishes:** Test your skills in a difficult cooking puzzle.
*   **Survival:** See how long you can endure against the relentless clock.
*   **Free Play:** Unleash your creativity by experimenting with recipes and inventing unique dishes.

You can also enjoy **Local Multiplayer** with Mina, Thrash, or Ziggy in custom matches, offering endless opportunities for fun. Who will rise to become the ultimate culinary champion?

Further hone your abilities in these additional game modes:

*   **Daily Cook-Off:** Aim for the top of the global leaderboard by achieving high scores.
*   **Restaurant Rush:** Experience a fast-paced cooking simulation.
*   **Break the Dishes:** Tackle a challenging puzzle mode designed to test your culinary reflexes.
*   **Survival Mode:** Earn impressive scores by showcasing your most exceptional creations.

In the new **Free Play Mode**, you have the freedom to discover innovative recipe combinations. The game also features an **Art Gallery**, allowing you to **"collect and admire the brilliant illustrations"** that define its unique visual style, as highlighted by the developers. Vive la Brigade!

Prepare for **Zuma's Revenge!**, a thrilling evolution of the classic puzzle-action game. This time, our brave frog finds himself on a mysterious island where the familiar ball-blasting gameplay has been transformed with **amazing new twists**. However, beware, as **evil spirits and tenacious tiki bosses** stand in your way!

To triumph on this perilous island, you'll need to master several key strategies. You must **fire stone spheres** to clear the relentless stream of balls, **conquer over 60 challenging levels**, and stay alert to avoid hidden traps. Smarter play is rewarded with mechanics like **slide-aiming and lily-pad hopping** for more strategic shots. Keep an eye out for **exotic bonuses** and **detonate new power-up balls** to gain an edge. Ultimately, you'll need to **battle six imposing tiki bosses** and guide your agile amphibian to victory across **four all-new game modes**.

As one PopCap Games representative stated, "Zuma's Revenge! takes the addictive core gameplay players loved and injects it with a fresh dose of challenge and excitement." The game boasts **amazing graphics and effects**, bringing the vibrant world of Zuma into the modern gaming landscape.

Key features include:

*   **Over 60 challenging levels** to conquer.
*   Intense **Boss Battles** against formidable foes.
*   **Explosive power-ups**, including three new shot types.
*   Innovative gameplay mechanics such as **lily-pad hopping** and **slide-aiming**.
*   **70 all-new Challenges** set in distinct environments:
    *   Jungle of Mystery
    *   Quiet Village
    *   Lost City
    *   Mosquito Coast
*   Endurance tests like the **Iron Frog gauntlet** (beat 10 levels consecutively).
*   Skill-pushing **Heroic Frog mode**.

Will you succumb to the jungle's perils, or can you tame the island in this **PopCap ball-blasting challenge**?

**Bejeweled Twist** introduces a fresh take on gem-matching. Its **key innovation** is the **Gem Rotator**, a feature that lets you **spin jewels freely** anywhere on the board. This new mechanic opens up possibilities for **big combos** and **exciting chain reactions**, making the game more engaging and visually fun.

PopCap Games, the creators, state the Gem Rotator is "central to the gameplay, enabling you to manipulate gems anywhere on the board and create matches across the entire grid." This means you can plan smart moves and find many ways to win.

You'll face challenges like **Locks and Bombs** that you need to clear to get good rewards. Making **Flame and Lightning gems** strategically can cause powerful special effects. The game has **four distinct ways to play**:

*   **Classic:** For fans of the original Bejeweled feel.
*   **Zen:** A calm mode for relaxed play.
*   **Challenge:** For those who want tough gameplay and to test their skills.
*   **Blitz:** A fast, **five-minute mode** for quick, exciting rounds.

**Bejeweled Twist** also adds features to improve your game. These include:

*   An **Instant Replay feature** to watch your best plays.
*   A **global high-score leaderboard** to see how you rank.
*   **Helpful in-game tips** to get you started easily.

With its **beautiful graphics**, **Bejeweled Twist** greatly improves the classic Bejeweled experience.

**Turba: A Revolutionary Match-3 Experience Driven by Your Music**

Prepare for a truly unique gaming adventure. Turba redefines the "match-3" genre by **seamlessly integrating your personal music library**. This innovative approach allows you to load your favorite songs directly from your PC, and in turn, **watch the game board dynamically transform** in perfect synchronization with the rhythm of your chosen track.

The fundamental gameplay loop challenges players to clear blocks in time with the music, with the ultimate goal of achieving expert combos for top scores. Once you've mastered a track, you can **test your skills against players worldwide** on online leaderboards specifically curated for each song. Turba boasts a robust set of features designed to deepen your engagement and provide lasting replayability.

The game offers **three distinct game modes** to cater to various playstyles and challenges. Strategic depth is further enhanced by **seven special powers** that can be utilized during gameplay. For those seeking a competitive edge, **online leaderboards are available for every song**, fostering a global community of players. Turba supports a wide array of audio formats, including Mp3, Music CDs, Flac, Ogg, Wma, Ape, and Mpc. Additionally, **Last.fm Scrobbling** ensures your gaming sessions are logged with your broader music listening habits. The game also features **detailed statistics and an unlock system** to keep you coming back for more. With **full Steam integration**, players can unlock **20 achievements**, track over **50 detailed stats**, and compete on **Steam leaderboards**.

**Might & Magic: Clash of Heroes** invites players into the rich world of Ashan, set four decades prior to the events of *Heroes V*. This strategic RPG tasks you with guiding five distinct heroes through five varied regions. Your overarching goals are to **cultivate your heroes' capabilities**, **uncover a sinister demonic plot**, and ultimately **defend Ashan from the encroaching threat of Chaos**.

At its heart, *Clash of Heroes* presents a **compelling combat system**. This tactical battlefield requires a deep understanding of the "Art of Tactics." Victory depends on **skillfully positioning your units**, both for offensive maneuvers and defensive stands, to outsmart and defeat your adversaries. Players will uncover and unleash **sophisticated combo attacks** for devastating assaults, complemented by **powerful spells and potent artifacts** to craft winning strategies. The game features a variety of combat encounters, including **standard battles**, **special challenges**, and **epic boss fights**. A notable element is the inclusion of **puzzle-based battles**, demanding precise unit placement within strict turn limits.

**Effective unit management is paramount** to achieving success. You will **enlist a variety of units**, each with unique traits and skills, and then **experiment with different army formations** to assemble your most formidable force. Both heroes and their accompanying units gain **experience points** from combat, allowing them to level up and unlock new, powerful abilities.

The game boasts **impressive visuals, a captivating soundtrack, and immersive sound design**, drawing players into **beautifully rendered environments**. Its **unique manga-inspired art direction** vividly portrays a diverse cast of characters, including knights, elves, mages, necromancers, and demons. As a prequel, *Clash of Heroes* delves into the backstories of younger versions of Anwen, Godric, Fiona, Aidan, and Nadia, providing a fascinating glimpse into their formative years.

Beyond its engaging solo campaign, *Clash of Heroes* enhances the experience with its multiplayer offerings. Players can engage in **local and online matches**, participating in one-on-one duels or games for two to four players. With **ten unique heroes**, each equipped with special spells and abilities, players can select optimal creature and artifact combinations for competitive **Player vs. Player modes**. Furthermore, **cooperative battles** enable you to join forces with allies to confront up to two opponents.

**Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: A Gateway to Classic WWII Strategy**

This legacy version of **Company of Heroes (COH1)** offers more than just a nostalgic trip. It also grants you access to the **latest updated version of COH1**, simply titled 'Company of Heroes' in your Steam library. For online play and engagement with the vibrant community, **please use the latter version**. You can find resources and connect with fellow players on the **COH1 Steam Community Hub** and explore user-created content on the **COH1 Steam Workshop**.

**Company of Heroes** delivers a **visceral WWII gaming experience**, revolutionizing real-time strategy. It brings to life the **sacrifice of heroic soldiers**, the **devastation of war-torn environments**, and the **dynamic nature of battlefields**.

The game begins with the **D-Day Invasion of Normandy**. Players command Allied squads against the formidable German war machine, fighting through some of World War II's most **pivotal battles**. A **rich single-player campaign** immerses you in the **cinematic intensity and bravery** of ordinary soldiers facing extraordinary circumstances.

**Key Features:**

*   **Cinematic Single Player Experience:** Witness the turmoil of WWII like never before.
*   **Advanced Squad AI:** Soldiers react realistically to their surroundings, taking cover and employing sophisticated tactics to overcome enemy forces.
*   **Stunning Visuals:** Built on Relic's cutting-edge engine, it boasts unprecedented graphic quality and a physics-driven world for an RTS.
*   **Environmental Strategy:** Real-time physics and a **completely destructible environment** ensure every battle is unique. **Destroy anything and reshape the battlefield!** Utilize buildings and terrain for strategic advantage or deny them to your opponents.
*   **Multiplayer Competition:** Engage in **2-8 player matches** via LAN or the internet, joining the ultimate Axis versus Allies conflict.

**Company of Heroes: A Classic WWII Real-Time Strategy Game**

If you're looking for user reviews and information on total conversions for **Company of Heroes (COH1)** on Steam, the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page is the best place to find it.

Company of Heroes offers a compelling World War II real-time strategy experience. It's known for its realistic depiction of soldier sacrifice, war-torn settings, and dynamic battlefields. The game immerses you in key WWII battles, starting with the D-Day landings in Normandy. You'll lead Allied squads against German forces in a gripping single-player campaign that showcases the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers facing tough situations. As one player perfectly described it, the game "truly captures the grit and sacrifice of the common soldier."

The core gameplay is designed for deep immersion. The **single-player campaign** throws you into the heart of WWII, following regular soldiers as they overcome extraordinary obstacles. **Smart squad AI** ensures your troops act realistically, adapting to their environment, seeking cover, and using clever tactics to outwit enemies. Visually, the game is **impressive**, using Relic's advanced engine to deliver outstanding graphics and a physics-driven world within the RTS genre.

Strategic depth is boosted by **environmental interaction**. **Dynamic battlefield destruction** is a key feature. Real-time physics and a fully destructible environment mean each battle plays out differently. You can destroy buildings for an advantage or change the terrain, using structures and the landscape for strategic gains or to slow down enemy advances. Beyond the campaign, you can join **multiplayer battles**, competing online with 2-8 players via LAN or the internet in the conflict between the Axis and Allied powers. This part of the game has been praised, with one reviewer stating that "the destructible environments add a level of tactical depth rarely seen in RTS games."

Prepare for **Dwarf Fortress**, a game offering the **deepest, most intricate world simulation** ever created. This isn't just generated scenery; it's an entire simulated world. Experience the rise and fall of civilizations, the development of unique personalities, creatures, and cultures, all within a game that promises **infinite hours of play**. Now, enjoy this legendary experience with **beautiful pixel graphics**!

**Dwarf Fortress** has been a lifetime "living" project, continuously created and updated since 2003 with no end in sight. Generate your own unique world and manage a bustling colony of dwarves. Guide them as they mine, build, and strive to survive, even as they likely dig towards their eventual demise. This complex construction, management, and roguelike simulation presents a new, **endless hobby** tailored just for you.

The legendary Dwarf Fortress is now available on Steam! Your mission is to build a fortress and help your dwarves survive against threats like:

*   **Starvation**
*   **Dragons**
*   **Madness**

Each generated world offers a unique challenge, from dwarves with their own simulated personalities to the ever-present threat of aquifers. Observe the factors that lead to your civilization's decline, learn from your mistakes, and prepare for the next inevitable setback.

The game's combat model is incredibly detailed, featuring:

*   Skills
*   Body parts
*   Material properties
*   Aimed attacks
*   Wrestling
*   Pain
*   Nausea
*   Various poison effects
*   And much more!

The depth of world generation is difficult to fully convey. Hundreds of animals and monsters populate each world, many randomly created for every playthrough. You'll also find generated poetry, musical forms, instruments, and dances for your dwarves to practice and perform. A dynamic weather model tracks wind, humidity, and air masses to create realistic fronts, clouds, storms, and blizzards. Over two hundred rock and mineral types can appear, situated in their proper geological environments.

Remember the core philosophy: **"Losing is fun!"** Nothing substantial has changed under the hood; it's still the classic Dwarf Fortress experience, now with graphics and music enabled by default. The familiar tile sets from Michał “Mayday” Madej and Jacob 'Ironhand' Bowman have been enhanced by artists Carolyn Jong and Neoriceisgood, creating an all-new pixel art experience. The Dwarf Fortress Steam edition boasts a 15-track soundtrack by Dabu, Simon Swerwer, and Águeda Macias, including tracks in the Dwarvish language.

Getting started has never been easier. We've improved the new player experience with in-game tutorials to guide you through building your first fort and keeping your dwarves happy. Command your dwarves as they search for wealth within their generated mountains. They'll need a steady supply of food and beer, but more importantly, your guidance to survive attacks from hostile civilizations, the wilderness, or even the undead.

You can:

*   Craft treasures and furniture from various materials
*   Establish a barony
*   Cater to the increasingly demanding nobility

Read your dwarves' thoughts to maintain their happiness. Build floodgates to divert water for farming or to prevent magma mishaps. Construct buildings and witness your dwarves discover and develop their culture through activities like establishing taverns, libraries, and temples. They can also engage in crafts such as pottery, animal training, and bookbinding, and produce goods like honey and wax.

Dwarf Fortress served as the original inspiration for games like RimWorld, Prison Architect, and Minecraft. It was one of the first video games acquired by the Museum of Modern Art in New York. The game has been updated for over 16 years by brothers Tarn “Toady One” and Zach “Threetoe” Adams. With the ambitious goal of simulating all of existence, Bay 12 estimates they are currently only about **44% complete**.

**Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition** offers a deep space strategy experience where you build and command your own galactic empire. This complete package includes:

*   **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**: The original acclaimed title.
*   **Dark Avatar**: An award-winning expansion that enhances core gameplay.
*   **Twilight of the Arnor**: The latest addition, bringing new conflicts and features.

Prepare for an **immersive journey** to guide your civilization toward galactic supremacy.

### Core Gameplay in Dread Lords

In **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**, you manage a growing space civilization in a challenging galaxy. Success hinges on balancing key elements:

*   **Economy**: Manage resources and production.
*   **Technology**: Research for a strategic edge.
*   **Diplomacy**: Forge alliances and negotiate with alien races.
*   **Culture**: Expand your influence across space.
*   **Military**: Build and command powerful star fleets.

Engage in strategic warfare, form vital alliances, and aim for total galactic control. The game features:

*   A captivating single-player mode with **randomly generated maps** for endless replayability.
*   A narrative campaign exploring the history of the ancient Dread Lords.

### Expanding Your Empire with Dark Avatar

The **Dark Avatar** expansion introduces significant new gameplay mechanics, such as:

*   **Mineable asteroid belts** and **special planets** requiring unique colonization tech.
*   **Crucial espionage systems** for offense and defense.
*   New treaties, a tougher AI, more opponents, and new units.
*   An exciting new campaign.

### The Arnor's Twilight and Galactic Conflict

Set in 2227, **Twilight of the Arnor** plunges the galaxy into a conflict orchestrated by the Dread Lords. Humanity and other races must unite against this threat. This expansion adds:

*   **Powerful Terror Stars** that can devastate enemy worlds.
*   **Distinct technology paths** for each civilization, offering unique strategies.
*   **Advanced tools** for creating custom maps and scenarios.
*   New ship designs and improved planetary upgrades.

### A Visually Stunning and Deeply Customizable Experience

**Galactic Civilizations II: Ultimate Edition** features:

*   **Impressive graphics** from an advanced 3D engine, bringing planets, stars, and ship battles to life.
*   **Extensive customization**:
    *   Design your own 3D ships in the Shipyard.
    *   Choose from a dozen unique civilizations or create your own.
*   **Multiple victory conditions**: Achieve dominance through conquest, culture, politics, technology, or ascension.
*   **Dynamic gameplay** with galaxies of various sizes for a fresh challenge.
*   A **smart AI** that provides a formidable opponent. As one reviewer noted, "The AI in Galactic Civilizations II is remarkably adaptive, presenting a genuine challenge even for seasoned players."
*   **Global competition** by submitting scores to the Metaverse.
*   **Full moddability**, allowing players to create and share content, extending the game's lifespan.
*   **Advanced diplomacy** for complex trade deals, treaties, and alliances.

Factorio is a highly acclaimed simulation game where players **design, construct, and manage intricate factories**. The core gameplay involves **resource extraction, technological research, infrastructure development, and automating production processes**, all while defending against hostile alien lifeforms.

Players begin by manually gathering resources and crafting basic components. However, the game quickly progresses, allowing you to become an industrial titan. This involves building vast power arrays, implementing sophisticated oil refining, and deploying robots to manage complex resource demands. This intensive resource exploitation inevitably provokes native inhabitants, requiring a **robust defense strategy** for your growing machine empire.

Factorio also offers a **robust cooperative multiplayer experience**, letting players join forces to build colossal factories together and delegate tasks. The game's appeal is further amplified by its **extensive modding support**, with creators worldwide adding everything from quality-of-life improvements to complete game overhauls.

Beyond the open-ended "Freeplay" mode, Factorio features engaging "Scenarios" and an in-game Map Editor for ultimate creative freedom. You can craft custom maps, place entities, enemies, and terrain, and even use custom scripts for unique gameplay.

**What People Say About Factorio:**

*   "No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly." - **Reddit**
*   "I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately." - **Notch, Mojang**
*   "Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens." - **Zisteau, YouTube**

**Discount Disclaimer:** Wube Software, the developers of Factorio, have stated that they do not have any plans for sales or price reductions in the foreseeable future.

**XCOM: Enemy Unknown: Save Earth from Aliens**

In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, you command a secret global force fighting a scary alien invasion. This popular strategy game, remade by Firaxis Games, asks you to handle resources, study alien tech, and control both big-picture strategy and small-unit tactics.

Your main goal is to keep humans alive. This means studying alien tech, building and running your base, planning fights, and leading soldiers in tough battles.

**What You'll Do:**

*   **Deep Strategy:** Enjoy a strong blend of planning and fighting.
*   **Base Control:** Hire, train, and change soldiers. Build and grow your XCOM base to fight aliens.
*   **Tactical Fights:** Lead teams in turn-based ground fights and use cool aircraft.
*   **World Missions:** Complete over 70 missions across the globe, working with other countries to defend Earth.

**Rise of Nations: Extended Edition** is a real-time strategy game that immerses players in the entirety of human history, from humble beginnings to global dominance. The core gameplay loop revolves around **managing resources, building infrastructure, and advancing technology** as your civilization progresses through distinct historical ages.

As your nation expands, you'll have the opportunity to construct iconic **Wonders of the World**, such as the Pyramids, and assemble a formidable military force. Combat is a central element, featuring a vast array of units that evolve throughout the game, from early aircraft and naval vessels to contemporary tanks, all within a single, continuous match.

The **Extended Edition** enhances the original **Rise of Nations** experience by incorporating the **Thrones and Patriots** expansions and introducing several new features. These additions include **improved graphics** with updated textures and water effects, alongside **full Steamworks integration**. This integration unlocks features like ranked multiplayer matches, achievement hunting, trading card collection, and cloud-based game data saving.

Players can choose from **18 distinct nations**, each offering unique advantages and specialized units. With an arsenal of over **100 military units** spanning land, sea, and air, you will command everything from ancient warriors to modern helicopters. The game encourages societal development through the construction of **numerous structures** and the research of technologies, allowing a small village to transform into a highly advanced civilization.

The game boasts the construction of **14 different Wonders of the World**, each bestowing a significant advantage upon your nation. Gameplay unfolds across **diverse maps** with varied environments, including dense jungles and expansive river deltas. The **Conquer the World Campaign** presents a series of interconnected scenarios designed to guide players toward achieving global victory.

**Company of Heroes: Opposing Fronts: A Strategic Look at WWII**

**Company of Heroes: Opposing Fronts** is a significant expansion for the acclaimed real-time strategy (RTS) game, plunging players back into the brutal realities of World War II. This expansion introduces **two distinct new armies**, each boasting unique abilities and upgrade paths. Players can embark on two compelling narrative journeys: commanding the resilient British 2nd Army in their arduous fight to liberate Caen, France, or taking control of the formidable German Panzer Elite as they repel a massive airborne invasion.

The expansion presents **two complete campaigns**. As the British 2nd Army, players will engage in intense combat to reclaim the strategically vital city of Caen. Conversely, playing as the German Panzer Elite, players will confront the formidable task of repelling the Allied airborne assault during the pivotal Operation Market Garden. The developers emphasized their commitment to "Real War, Real Battlefields, Real War Enhanced" for **Opposing Fronts**. To achieve this, they integrated features such as **Mission Persistence**, **Dynamic Weather Effects**, and **Enhanced Vehicle Tactics**, all designed to heighten realism and introduce novel strategic combat opportunities.

**Opposing Fronts** also significantly bolsters the game's multiplayer capabilities. When combined with the original **Company of Heroes**, the game now offers a total of **four playable armies** for online engagements. This expanded roster facilitates a broad spectrum of strategic pairings. For example, players might combine British artillery with American armor to counter German forces, or employ the swift German Wehrmacht and Panzer Elite to thwart Allied offensives. Furthermore, reviewers highlighted that with **DirectX® 10 support**, the game delivers a **visually stunning RTS experience**. This is evident in its improved lighting and highly detailed environments, which bring the battlefields to life.

**Dawn of War: Dark Crusade - Confronting the Necron Menace on Kronus**

The planet Kronus has become the focal point of a **significant Necron threat**. This ancient danger, long dormant, has been reawakened due to recent excavations. Beneath the planet's arid deserts lies an extensive necropolis, a resting place for fallen Necron warriors, which is now unleashing its reanimated inhabitants.

In **Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War - Dark Crusade**, players assume command of one of seven distinct races, all engaged in a fierce struggle for **dominion over Kronus**. Achieving victory necessitates the capture of **critical strongholds** scattered across **diverse landscapes**. This expansion notably introduces two **powerful new races**: the mysterious **Tau** and the ancient **Necrons**. Leading these factions presents opportunities for **significant devastation** and the exploration of novel tactical approaches.

**Dark Crusade** boasts an **improved online multiplayer** experience, featuring **twelve new maps** capable of supporting up to **eight players**. The **expansive single-player campaign** delivers an **entirely fresh, non-linear narrative**. Players have the freedom to select any of the seven races to conquer Kronus, thereby experiencing **unique story arcs** from each faction's viewpoint. As your chosen hero accumulates power, you can **customize their gear and proficiencies**. Personalize your army with a **wide array of emblems, squad colors, banners, and designations** to forge a distinctive fighting contingent.

**Relic Entertainment**, the game's creators, characterize the Necrons as a "truly ancient and terrifying force" that remained dormant for millennia. Their resurgence on Kronus poses a "unique challenge" for all other factions, demanding strategic adjustments.

**RimWorld: Forge Your Own Sci-Fi Saga with an Intelligent AI Storyteller**

Embark on an **unforgettable journey** in RimWorld, a captivating sci-fi colony simulation meticulously driven by an **intelligent AI storyteller**. Drawing inspiration from the legendary Dwarf Fortress, the gritty realism of Firefly, and the epic scope of Dune, RimWorld plunges you into a world where **destiny is forged by your decisions**. You'll begin with a mere three survivors of a devastating shipwreck, stranded on a **mysterious and unforgiving distant world**.

Your primary objective is to **master the intricate needs of your colonists**. This involves meticulously managing their moods, physical needs, the severity of their wounds, the onset of illnesses, and the grip of addictions. The game offers an **astonishing diversity of environments** to build your sanctuary, from lush forests and arid deserts to dense jungles and frozen tundras. As you guide your survivors, you'll witness them **forge and fracture relationships**, developing bonds of family, love, and marriage, or succumbing to bitter rivalries. The game's depth extends to the very fabric of your colonists' beings; you can **replace lost or damaged limbs and organs** with advanced prosthetics, cutting-edge bionics, or even biological parts harvested from fallen foes.

Prepare for **constant peril** as you defend your burgeoning colony against a relentless onslaught of pirates, hostile tribes, ferocious mad animals, colossal insects, and ancient, deadly machines. To survive and thrive, you'll need to **craft essential structures, formidable weapons, and protective apparel** from a wide array of materials, including metal, wood, stone, cloth, and exotic futuristic composites. Beyond the immediate threats, RimWorld offers the joy of **taming and training a menagerie of creatures**. From adorable pets that lift colonists' spirits to productive farm animals providing sustenance, and even deadly attack beasts unleashed upon your enemies, the animal kingdom is yours to command.

The world of RimWorld is alive with opportunity and interaction. **Engage in trade with passing ships and caravans**, or form your own caravans to embark on daring quests, establish lucrative trade routes, launch assaults on rival factions, or even orchestrate the migration of your entire colony to a new, more promising location. The environment itself presents formidable challenges, from digging through deep snow and weathering violent storms to battling raging fires. You'll face moral quandaries, such as deciding whether to **capture refugees or prisoners**, potentially turning them to your cause or selling them into the grim reality of slavery. Each playthrough promises a **unique and generated world**, ensuring endless replayability. Furthermore, the vibrant Steam Workshop offers access to **hundreds of wild and interesting mods**, allowing for unparalleled customization. The game's intuitive design is complemented by an **intelligent and unobtrusive AI tutor**, making the learning curve remarkably smooth.

RimWorld is, at its core, a **masterful story generator**. As one developer noted, "It’s designed to co-author tragic, twisted, and triumphant stories about imprisoned pirates, desperate colonists, starvation and survival." This is achieved by the AI Storyteller, which meticulously controls the "random" events that shape your narrative. "Every thunderstorm, pirate raid, and traveling salesman is a card dealt into your story by the AI Storyteller," the game's description explains. You have the agency to select from several distinct storytellers, each offering a unique narrative flavor: **Randy Random injects pure chaos**, **Cassandra Classic builds escalating tension**, and **Phoebe Chillax favors a more relaxed pace**.

Your colonists are not seasoned professionals but rather **crash-landed survivors** from a passenger liner that met its demise in orbit. This means your initial group could be a motley assortment, perhaps including a nobleman, an accountant, and a housewife. You'll expand your population by capturing enemies in combat and persuading them to join your cause, purchasing individuals from slave traders, or offering sanctuary to refugees. Consequently, your colony will invariably be a **diverse and eclectic crew**. Each colonist's background is meticulously tracked and profoundly influences their gameplay. For instance, a nobleman might excel at social interactions, such as recruiting prisoners and negotiating trade prices, but will adamantly refuse manual labor. Conversely, a farm oaf possesses extensive knowledge of agriculture but lacks research aptitude. A brilliant scientist might be unparalleled in research but utterly inept at social tasks. A genetically engineered assassin, while capable of little else, performs their deadly craft with **exceptional proficiency**.

The dynamics between your colonists are constantly evolving. "Each has an opinion of the others, which determines whether they'll become lovers, marry, cheat, or fight," the game highlights. Imagine your two most trusted colonists, happily married, only for one to fall for the charismatic surgeon who heroically saved her life from a grievous gunshot wound. The game generates an **entire planet**, from pole to equator, offering a vast canvas for your settlement. You can choose to land your crash pods in the frigid northern tundra, the parched desert, a temperate forest, or a sweltering equatorial jungle. Each region presents distinct challenges and opportunities, boasting unique animals, flora, endemic diseases, temperature extremes, rainfall patterns, mineral deposits, and terrain features. The arduous task of surviving in a disease-ridden, suffocating jungle is a stark contrast to the struggles of a barren desert wasteland or a frozen tundra with a mere two-month growing season.

Your exploration is not confined to a single location. You possess the ability to **traverse the planet**, forming caravans comprised of people, animals, and prisoners. These expeditions can involve rescuing kidnapped former allies from pirate strongholds, participating in peace negotiations, engaging in trade with other factions, launching attacks on enemy colonies, and completing a myriad of other quests. In extreme circumstances, you can even **pack up your entire colony and relocate** to a more advantageous site, utilizing rocket-powered transport pods for accelerated travel.

The game's depth extends to the intricate **tracking of individual body parts and their conditions**. "Wounds, infections, prosthetics, and chronic conditions are tracked on each body part and affect characters' capacities," the game explains. An eye injury, for example, will impede a colonist's ability to aim or perform surgery. Wounded legs will reduce their movement speed. The game meticulously simulates the impact of damage to hands, brain, mouth, heart, liver, kidneys, stomach, feet, fingers, toes, and more, with all these injuries having logical in-game consequences. Even non-humanoid species possess their own unique body layouts; removing a deer's leg still allows it to hobble on its remaining limbs, while taking a rhino's horn significantly diminishes its threat. You can **repair and enhance body parts** with prosthetics ranging from rudimentary to transcendent. A simple peg leg might enable a colonist named Joe to walk again after an unfortunate encounter with a rhinoceros, albeit at a reduced pace. However, investing in an expensive bionic leg from a trader the following year can transform Joe into a superhuman runner. The game even allows for the extraction, sale, purchase, and transplantation of internal organs, adding another layer of complex medical management. As one player enthusiastically stated, "And there's much more than that!" The game's **moddability is exceptional**, supported by a thriving and active modding community. (All non-English translations are fan-made.)

**Rome: Total War™ - Collection: Conquer the Ancient World**

Embark on an epic journey through ancient Rome with the **Rome: Total War™ - Collection**. This definitive package brings together two landmark titles from the renowned Total War series, offering a deep and engaging experience in **empire building and grand-scale warfare**.

The Collection Edition features:

*   **Rome: Total War:** Take control of one of three powerful Roman families. Guide your faction through a century of **political maneuvering and military conquest** to establish your dominance over the Roman Empire.
*   **Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion:** Experience the **twilight of Roman power**. This official expansion plunges you into a desperate struggle against **waves of barbarian tribes and internal decay**, mirroring the historical challenges of the period.

**Key Gameplay Features:**

*   **Massive Armies:** Lead **legions of thousands** in spectacular battles. The series is celebrated for its **impressive scale and visual detail**.
*   **Iconic Leaders:** Interact with or play as legendary figures like **Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal**, whose actions profoundly impacted the ancient world.
*   **Diverse Factions:** Command the disciplined Roman legions or lead fierce barbarian confederations, such as the **Huns led by Attila** and the formidable Saxons. Each faction boasts unique units and strategic approaches.
*   **Comprehensive Strategy:** Manage every facet of your empire, from **economic prosperity and civic development** to religious influence and military strength, across a vast campaign map.

The original Rome: Total War received widespread critical praise. IGN, GameSpy, and GameSpot, among other leading gaming outlets, awarded it "Best Strategy Game" in 2004. As one reviewer from GameSpot noted, the game offered a "truly epic scope" that redefined the strategy genre.

**Assassin's Creed Brotherhood: Lead Your Assassins in Rome**

In **Assassin's Creed Brotherhood**, you step into the role of Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a seasoned Master Assassin. Your mission: to confront the powerful Templar Order in the vibrant city of Rome. This installment focuses on Ezio's growth as a leader, as he builds and commands a **Brotherhood of assassins**. Their combined strength is key to overcoming the Templars.

A major innovation in the series is the **award-winning multiplayer mode**. Players can choose from various characters, each with unique weapons and assassination styles, to compete worldwide.

**Key Gameplay Features:**

*   **Become the Master Assassin:** Enjoy over 15 hours of single-player story as the experienced Ezio.
*   **Build Your Brotherhood:** Recruit, train, and level up your assassins. They will aid you in crucial missions.
*   **Utilize Advanced Tools:** Wield a variety of specialized gear, such as poison darts, parachutes, dual hidden blades, and a unique flying machine for stealthy approaches.
*   **Revitalize Rome:** Invest in the city's development to gain citizen support, unlock new factions, and find extra missions.
*   **Engage in Elite Multiplayer:** Select from distinct character classes, each with special weapons and signature finishing moves. Explore detailed maps and varied game modes for exciting matches.

**Extra Content:**

*   **Project Animus Update #1:** Improve your skills on the Mont Saint-Michel map and in Advanced Alliance mode.
*   **Project Animus Update #2:** Master the Pienza Map, ideal for stealth, and try Chest Capture mode. This update also adds the Templar Score system.
*   **The Da Vinci Disappearance:** Help Ezio rescue Leonardo da Vinci. This DLC introduces new areas and gameplay, plus the largest multiplayer expansion yet, with new maps, characters, and modes.

**The Forgotten City: Unraveling a Cursed Roman Mystery**

Embark on a journey **2,000 years into the past** to experience the final, fateful days of a cursed Roman city. In this unique setting, **a single sin dooms everyone**. While combat is a possibility, brute force is not the answer. To solve this epic mystery, you must:

*   **Question an interconnected community** of diverse characters.
*   **Cleverly exploit the time loop** to your advantage.
*   **Make difficult moral choices** with profound consequences.

Your decisions are **paramount**. The **fate of the entire city rests on your shoulders**.

**Key Features:**

*   **Explore an open-world ancient Roman city**, meticulously recreated with historically accurate art, architecture, costumes, and customs.
*   **Investigate a gripping, non-linear mystery** that offers multiple distinct endings.
*   **Become deeply entwined** with the lives of richly detailed and interactive characters.
*   **Grapple with moral dilemmas** where choices have life-and-death repercussions.
*   **Define your protagonist**: Choose your character's gender, origin, and backstory to play as whoever you wish.
*   **Solve challenges through various means**: Employ reason, charm, bribery, intimidation, violence, or the strategic exploitation of the time loop.

Name: Field of Glory II
Description:
Field of Glory II is a turn-based tactical game set during the Rise of Rome from 280 BC to 25 BC ;v=veTBw3GCZ4w The game that brought the fun and excitement of the tabletop experience to digital form is back. Developed by legendary designer Richard Bodley Scott in a completely new 3D engine, Field of Glory is ready to set new standards in computer wargaming. Field of Glory II allows you to fight large or small battles for or against Rome, or between the other nations who are as yet unaware of the Roman threat, or what-if battles between nations that never actual came into conflict historically, but might have done if the course of history had been different. Take command of a huge variety of armies employing vastly different tactical doctrines. Lead your chosen army and its named generals to victory in set-piece historical battles or 'what-if' custom battle situations against an AI or human opponent. Victory will require determination and tactical mastery! FEATURES Accurate simulation of Ancient battle in the last three centuries of the pre-Christian era. 86 historically accurate units, built from fully animated 3D troop models, each with many variants. These allow Field of Glory II to represent the full range of troop-types and tactical doctrines that make this era one of the most interesting to wargamers and military historians. To name just a few, there are Roman legionaries before and after the reforms of Marius, Greek hoplite and Carthaginian African spearmen, Hellenistic pike phalanxes, thureophoroi spearmen and xystophoroi lancers, Gallic warbands, Skythian horse archers, Sarmatian lancers, Roman, Carthaginian, Greek and Gallic spear-armed cavalry, war elephants, Celtic and Indian chariots, scythed chariots, a wealth of light troops and many many more. 12 Historical scenarios covering key engagements of the period on an epic scale. These include Bagradas 255 BC, Trebia 218 BC, Cannae 216 BC, Ilipa 206 BC, Zama 202 BC, Magnesia 190 BC, Pydna 168 BC, Chaironeia 86 BC, Tigranocerta 69 BC, Bibracte 58 BC, Carrhae 53 BC and Thapsus 46 BC. The player can play as either side. Custom Battle system allows unlimited “what-if” scenarios using historically realistic armies from carefully researched army lists, on realistic computer generated terrain maps. Armies covered include Romans, Carthaginians, Hellenistic Kingdoms (Macedon, Seleucids, Ptolemaic Egypt etc.), Gauls, Ancient Britons, Galatians, Spanish, Numidians, Spartacus’s Slave Revolt, Thracians, Skythians, Sarmatians, Parthians, Indians and lots more. Campaign mode allows you to rewrite history as you play through the battlefield careers of some of ancient history’s greatest generals, or war with any ancient nation against any other. Each victory increases the experience and elan of your core units. Quick to resolve strategic decisions allow you to go straight from one battle to the next without any delay. Random map generator produces an infinite variety of historically realistic battlefield maps for custom battles and campaigns. Scenarios include open battle, pursuit, awaiting reinforcements, enemy awaiting reinforcements, flank march, rearguard action, advance guard, remove the head, and protect the baggage. Classic turn-based, tile based gameplay. Easy to use interface, hard to master gameplay. Cohort-sized units. Battles can range from a few units to as many as 80 units per side. Named generals who can influence combat and morale of units under their command. Single player and multiplayer battle modes. Effective AI makes sound tactical decisions. 6 difficulty levels allow the challenge to increase as you develop your battlefield skills. Numerous different unit organisations, combat capabilities and tactical doctrines allow full representation of tactical differences and developments through the period. Mod friendly game system with built-in map editor. Multiplayer mode allows historical scenarios and “what-if” scenarios to be played by two players using Slitherine’s easy to use PBEM server.

**The Age of Decadence: A Bold New RPG Experience**

Prepare for a departure from the typical RPG formula with **The Age of Decadence**, a debut title that boldly ventures into new territory. This game is designed for players who crave an experience that **challenges conventions and explores new directions**, drawing inspiration from the very roots of tabletop role-playing. While its **bold design choices** might not appeal to everyone, those seeking an RPG that delves into a **crumbling society fractured by political intrigue** will find a deeply engaging world.

At its core, **The Age of Decadence** offers a **unique narrative focus**, centering on the struggles of human greed and brutality rather than the typical monster-slaying fare. Players will unravel a central mystery by piecing together events from conflicting accounts, much like a noir detective. Your words and actions hold significant weight, capable of **forging alliances or sowing discord** among seven distinct factions, including three Noble Houses and four powerful guilds. With over 600,000 words of dialogue, expect a **deeply developed world and believable characters**, presented without the usual fantasy tropes like elves or magic.

Combat in **The Age of Decadence** is a **deliberate design choice**, reflecting its unforgiving setting. It is intended to be **challenging, with frequent death a real possibility**. As the developers themselves put it, "**Think before you act**, or face swift consequences." Players must **carefully choose their battles**, as you are not an invincible hero.

Your decisions are **paramount** in shaping your narrative. Choices dynamically alter the story, the game world, and available options, offering **significant replayability** through multiple quest solutions and branching storylines. To truly grasp the game's complexities, **multiple playthroughs are essential**.

We strongly recommend a **"try before you buy"** approach. Even if the description sounds appealing, **download the demo first**. It grants access to the **entire first Chapter**, featuring three distinct locations and approximately 30 quests, offering a genuine taste of the game's core mechanics and narrative depth.

**Total War: ATTILA** plunges players into the tumultuous year of 395 AD, a period defined by widespread famine, devastating disease, and relentless conflict, marking the ominous beginning of the Dark Ages. A powerful new force emerges from the East, ready to confront the Roman Empire with an immense army. The game presents a critical decision: will you establish your own dominion or attempt to salvage the disintegrating Roman Empire? The "Scourge of God" is nigh, and your world teeters on the precipice of oblivion.

The game prominently features **apocalyptic destruction**. Players can strategically **employ fire in battle** to obliterate settlements and instill widespread terror. The **raze mechanic** enables the complete annihilation of cities and territories, leaving nothing behind.

A particularly demanding **legendary start position** is the Western Roman Empire. Despite commanding a significant territory, internal dissent and relentless external invasions forge a desperate fight for survival.

**Total War: ATTILA** introduces **overhauled game mechanics**. The user interface has been refined, and the intricate systems governing politics, family dynamics, city management, and technological advancement have been meticulously improved. Players will experience **authentic period detail**, accurately reflecting the emerging technologies, weaponry, diverse religions, distinct cultures, and profound societal transformations of the Dark Ages. The game showcases **outstanding visual fidelity**, presenting a grim and compelling vision of the apocalypse and the twilight of civilization. With its epic scope and deeply immersive atmosphere, the enhanced campaign and battle visuals deliver improved performance, allowing you to witness the close of an epoch and seize the chance to forge your own enduring legacy.

In **Expeditions: Rome**, you embody a young Legatus whose life is shattered by his father's murder. **Forced to flee Rome**, you join a military campaign against a Greek revolt, transforming from a fugitive into a powerful leader. As one observer noted, "**Your choices will echo through history, shaping not only your destiny but Rome's very path.**"

This immersive RPG puts you in command of a Roman general, influencing diverse regions from Greece to Gaul. You'll face critical decisions: will you rule with an iron fist or a diplomatic touch? Will you uphold tradition or forge a new path in the dangerous Roman Senate? Every choice matters, impacting your legion, your allies, and Rome's future.

**Craft your unique Legatus** with deep customization, including appearance, gender, class, and skills. Engage in strategic, turn-based combat, where a detailed skill system and a variety of weapons determine your battlefield success. Travel with five distinct companions, exploring their rich backstories and personalities. Discover a vibrant, historically accurate world spanning North Africa, Greece, Gaul, and Rome, all presented with a fully voiced narrative where your decisions have significant consequences.

**Develop your characters** by gaining experience and selecting from a wide array of skills and passive traits, opening up complex tactical possibilities. Enhance your gameplay by finding, crafting, and equipping numerous weapons, armor, and tactical items. Lead your legion through three major war campaigns in Greece, North Africa, and Gaul. Key actions involve:

*   Recruiting soldiers
*   Strengthening your base
*   Capturing territories
*   Managing essential supplies
*   Protecting your conquered lands

These actions are vital for achieving victory.

For retro gaming enthusiasts looking for a distinct challenge, **Time Commando**, a 1996 release, presents an engaging adventure. The game tasks players with combating a time-warping virus that has infiltrated a military supercomputer, threatening global technology. To avert this crisis, you will journey through history, confronting formidable adversaries.

Time Commando's historical excursions span **nine distinct worlds**. These include prehistoric landscapes, Ancient Rome, feudal Japan, the Medieval era, the Conquistador period, the Wild West, and modern combat zones. Players can wield a **varied arsenal**, from traditional katanas and rifles to more unconventional items like combat yo-yos and magic spells. The gameplay itself is **engaging**, blending combat, puzzles, and a compelling narrative, all wrapped in a unique visual style.

This title stands out as an entertaining and demanding experience, particularly for dedicated game collectors.

**Important Notes:** Time Commando requires DosBox to run. The European version includes an introduction without voice-over. Beginning on easy mode is advised for a more accessible introduction to the game.

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Alexander
Description:
Rome: Total War - Alexander is the second official expansion pack to Rome: Total War. An entirely new campaign map that stretches from Macedonia to Greece and into the heart of the ancient Persian Empire New campaign game that tasks players with matching the exploits of Alexander the Great as he swept across Central Asia and dominated the Persian Empire Four new factions including the Macedonians, Persians and Indians Over 25 new units, including Alexander's own renowned historical troops Historical Alexander the Great campaign with six new historical battles that unlock sequentially, telling the story of Alexander and providing a historical backdrop to each of the battles All-new movies to support the Alexander campaign, with professional voiceovers by actor Brian Blessed (Alexander, Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace)

**Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition: A Grand Strategy Journey Through the Roman Republic**

**Dive into the Roman Republic** with Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition. This package combines the acclaimed grand strategy game Europa Universalis: Rome with its major expansion, Vae Victis. Experience a **pivotal era of world history**, meticulously crafted by genre masters. Immerse yourself in the grandeur of ancient civilizations, brought to life with remarkable strategic and tactical depth.

Vae Victis significantly enriches Europa Universalis: Rome, focusing on **overhauling government systems** for more fluid gameplay. Historical figures are also transformed, and new missions, decisions, and laws add fresh content. As Paradox Development Studio notes, "Vae Victis is an expansion packed with a huge amount of new content."

**Key Features:**

*   **Immersive 3D Map:** Explore a detailed, **fully 3D map** of the ancient world.
*   **Flexible Starting Dates:** Begin your campaign anytime between **280 B.C. and 27 B.C.**
*   **Vast Civilizations:** Choose from 10 cultures, including Roman, Celtic, Greek, and Egyptian, with over **53 playable factions**.
*   **Dynamic Character Development:** Witness characters evolve new traits through **political intrigue**.
*   **Strategic Gameplay:** Engage in trade, diplomacy, and warfare to achieve dominance.
*   **Robust Multiplayer:** Challenge up to **32 players** in competitive or cooperative modes.

**New in Vae Victis:**

*   **Advanced Military AI:** Experience a **revised military AI** for more challenging battles.
*   **Living Characters:** Characters now have their own **personal goals and agendas**. As one developer stated, "The dynamics of the characters that live in the Republic will come to life as the men and women have their own personal goals and agendas."
*   **Senate Influence:** As a republic, you must **actively consider the Senate's influence**. Characters align with parties based on their objectives.
*   **Monarchy and Tribal Courts:** Monarchies and Tribes feature distinct courts. Be wary of ambitious individuals, as "bootlickers and sycophants who will stop at nothing to replace your divinely appointed ruler."

**Don Bradman Cricket 17: A New Benchmark in Cricket Gaming**

**Don Bradman Cricket 17** represents a significant leap forward in cricket simulation, largely due to its **highly advanced control system**. This system offers players **unparalleled precision** across all facets of the game. Batters now have access to a much wider array of shots, including the helicopter, reverse sweep, and scoop, enabling more **dynamic and aggressive batting**.

Bowling mechanics have been meticulously refined, allowing players to make **strategic decisions** to outwit opponents. The game features **diverse fast bowling variations**, such as leg-cutters and off-cutters, alongside **deceptive spin deliveries** like the doosra and googly.
