As one reviewer noted, "The Backyard Battleground is a fantastic addition, offering a dynamic space for players to strategize and have fun between battles."

**Deluxe Edition Includes:**

*   Grass Effect Z7 Imp and Mech Character Variant
*   Exclusive Plant Class Custom Accessories Pack
*   Exclusive Zombie Class Custom Accessories Pack
*   Phenomenal Character Variant Pack
*   200,000 Coins Starter Pack
*   Emoji Pack

**Key Features:**

*   **Plants Take the Offensive:** This time, the plants are bringing the fight directly to the zombies. Lead the charge to reclaim Suburbia, or stand firm as the zombies to preserve Zomburbia in entirely new game modes.
*   **More Characters, Classes, and Customization:** A total of 14 playable character classes are now available, with 6 new classes joining the fray. Choose from over 100 unique plants and zombies from across time, ensuring you can stand out on the battlefield.
*   **Play Your Way:** Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2 offers a wealth of engaging game modes for both solo and multiplayer experiences. Fancy some company? Jump into the new Herbal Assault mode for an epic 24-player online showdown across Suburbia. Alternatively, join forces with either the plants or zombies in 4-player co-op. For those who prefer a solitary experience, solo play is also an option.
*   **A Living, Breathing PvZ World:** The epic struggle for Suburbia unfolds across 12 vibrant maps, each brimming with personality and humor. Battle your way through Zombossified cityscapes and bustling airspaces, all filled with hidden secrets waiting to be uncovered. As one player enthusiastically put it, "The maps are incredibly detailed and full of surprises; you never know what you'll find around the next corner."

**Gears 5** revitalizes the **Gears of War** franchise with a compelling narrative and enhanced gameplay. The campaign centers on Kait Diaz's personal journey to uncover the truth about her family and the relentless enemy. This investigation leads to a **profound revelation**: Kait herself poses the greatest threat to the planet Sera. To deepen replayability, **Gears 5** allows players to retain their character and weapon customizations across subsequent playthroughs. The game also introduces **new difficulty levels and significant gameplay adjustments**.

For those who thrive on competition, **Gears 5** delivers substantial enhancements to its **player-vs-player (PvP) offerings**. The "Versus" mode is designed to be engaging for **a wide spectrum of players, from casual enthusiasts to seasoned professionals**. Complementing this, the **player-vs-environment (PvE) modes emphasize cooperative strategy**. Players can select their preferred character and class for the iconic "Horde" mode or the more strategic "Escape" mode.

**Gears 5** further expands its cooperative features with **three-player campaign co-op**, enabling friends to join the adventure either online or via split-screen. The game is meticulously crafted to be **accessible to all players, offering extensive options for personalizing the experience**. These include **comprehensive controller customization, single-stick movement, dedicated support for the Adaptive Controller, voice guidance for menu navigation, and improved subtitle options**. An Xbox profile is required for gameplay, which can be signed into or created at no cost.

Get ready for an epic showdown in **Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville™**! Neighborville is usually a peaceful place, but a **crazy, new conflict** is brewing between the brain-less zombies and the determined botanicals. Are you ready to **kick some grass** in this wild plant-on-zombie battle that will take you across Neighborville and beyond?

**Here's what awaits you:**

*   **Go All Out in Online Multiplayer:**
    *   Join the action with **up to 24 players** in a massive suburban skirmish.
    *   Master the **unique abilities of each character class** across **6 PvP modes**, including the exciting new **Battle Arena**.
    *   Experience **unbeleafable thrills** in intense combat!

*   **Venture to the Outer Edges of Neighborville:**
    *   The conflict has spread to **free-roam regions** beyond the town.
    *   Team up with **up to 3 friends** in the Giddy Park social hub.
    *   Reclaim key areas like **Weirding Woods, Mount Steep, and Neighborville Town Centre**. It's definitely **grow time**!

*   **Customize Every Character for Battle:**
    *   Join the latest bloom in the **age-old battle** between plants and zombies.
    *   Choose from **20 fully customizable classes** at launch, including a **Team Play class** for each faction.
    *   Outfit your characters with **ludicrous looks and wacky weapons** to express your unique style.

**Important Note:** Split-screen couch co-op is **NOT available on the PC version**.

**Deluxe Edition Bonus Content:**

The Deluxe Edition comes packed with the base game and some outrageous exclusive content to get you started:

*   **Legendary Chickpea costume** for Peashooter
*   **Legendary Judge Z costume** for 80s Action Hero
*   **5 explosive emojis** to express yourself
*   A **special digital comic** to learn more about Battle for Neighborville

**Deluxe Edition Exclusive Content Includes:**

*   Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville Standard Edition
*   Legendary Chickpea costume for Peashooter
*   Legendary Judge Z costume for 80s Action Hero
*   Digital comic
*   5 emojis

Name: Super Meat Boy
Description:
Super Meat Boy is a tough as nails platformer where you play as an animated cube of meat who's trying to save his girlfriend (who happens to be made of bandages) from an evil fetus in a jar wearing a tux. Our meaty hero will leap from walls, over seas of buzz saws, through crumbling caves and pools of old needles. Sacrificing his own well being to save his damsel in distress. Super Meat Boy brings the old school difficulty of classic NES titles like Mega Man 2, Ghost and Goblins and Super Mario Bros. 2 (The Japanese one) and stream lines them down to the essential no BS straight forward twitch reflex platforming. Ramping up in difficulty from hard to soul crushing SMB will drag Meat boy though haunted hospitals, salt factories and even hell itself. And if 300+ single player levels weren't enough SMB also throws in epic boss fights, a level editor and tons of unlock able secrets, warp zones and hidden characters. Story mode, featuring over 300 levels spanning 5+ chapters Play as a Head Crab! (Steam Exclusive) 33 legitimate Achievements Warp zones that will warp you into other games Over 16 unlockable able and playable characters from popular indie titles such as, Minecraft, Bit.Trip, VVVVVV and Machinarium Epic Boss fights Full Level Editor and Level Portal (January 2011) A story so moving you will cry yourself to sleep for the rest of your life

**Octahedron: Transfixed Edition: Master Gravity in a Psychedelic Action Platformer**

**Octahedron: Transfixed Edition** is a **psychedelic action platformer** where gravity is your key tool. Explore a **vibrant, ever-changing underground world**. Platforms appear as you play, helping you move through stunning areas and escape the Veetragoul. The game's core mechanics are tied to a **dynamic, rhythmic beat**, making every move count.

A key feature is its **unique platform generation system**. Press a button to create temporary platforms. Ride them until their energy runs out. In the game's **50 levels**, find **neon-powered upgrades**. These upgrades help you:

*   **Defeat enemies** with laser attacks.
*   **Break down obstacles**.
*   **Solve complex puzzles**.

The developers wanted to "build a world that felt alive and reacted to the player." Collect Octahedron fragments to unlock new areas, bonus stages, and rewards. **Precise controls** are essential to beat hazards and enemies that move to the **captivating soundtrack**. This immersive audio features artists like Chipzel, Andre Sobota, and Monomirror, adding to the game's rhythmic feel.

Master the art of powersliding in **Star Drift Evolution**, a minimalistic racing game that challenges your driving skills. This game emphasizes **precision and mastery**, making powersliding the **fastest way to drive** through corners. Success depends on **choosing the right car for each track** and executing every turn perfectly. Are you ready to prove your driving skills?

### Driving Experience

Experience a driving simulation with **refined physics** that offer both style and challenge. Feel the **weight of the car** as you navigate tight corners and master the art of the slide.

### Tracks and Cars

*   **75 Unique Tracks:** From simple dirt ovals to complex point-to-point courses, each track offers a new challenge.
*   **Over 50 Cars:** Each car has unique stats like top speed, acceleration, grip, and downforce. You'll need to pick the best car for each track.

### Game Modes

*   **Single Player Career:** Compete against AI and complete **450 Star Challenges**.
*   **Online Multiplayer:** Join races with up to 20 players. **Car collisions are turned off** so you can focus on your racing lines.
*   **Split Screen Multiplayer:** Race with up to four friends locally. You can even tackle Career Star Challenges together in **co-op mode**.

### Customization and Controls

*   **Camera Options:** Choose between **classic top-down views** or **arcade chase cams**. You can also **customize your own camera settings**.
*   **Easy to Learn, Hard to Master:** **Star Drift Evolution** features **simple controls, no mandatory grinding, and a clean interface**. This lets you jump into the action quickly. The main focus is on **mastering the art of drifting**.

### Leaderboards and Music

*   **Global Leaderboards:** Use the **automatic ghost replay system** to beat your opponents' best times. You'll always race against the ghost of the next player on the leaderboard.
*   **Dynamic Soundtrack:** Enjoy over **25 retro and synthwave tracks** from artists like Kenobit, Electroshark, and Luke McQueen II.

### Controller Support

The game offers **full controller support**, including button remapping. While testers have confirmed steering wheel support (e.g., Thrustmaster T150), it may not be guaranteed for all models.

**TrackMania² Canyon** brings a **fresh setting** to Nadeo Studio's popular online racing series. Dive into a **vivid Canyon world** for a racing experience beyond typical simulators. Prepare for:

*   **Spectacular aerial stunts**
*   **Exhilarating wall rides**
*   **Daring leaps**

These are all featured on tracks built and shared by the game's dedicated players.

The game boasts **impressive new graphics** that bring the Canyon to life, working well on various PCs. You'll feel a **unique and thrilling race**, with cars that have **better realism and sharp control**. The **main game is easy to pick up**, perfect for solo players and multiplayer fans alike. This simplicity is boosted by **simple track-making tools**.

Players get **advanced tools to create tracks, custom cars, and complex game rules**, allowing for **great customization**. **Strong community features** make it easy to share:

*   **Amazing player-made content**
*   **Unforgettable race moments**

An **in-built video editor** lets you create **pro-level race summaries**. This lively scene thrives thanks to a **very active community** that constantly adds **many kinds of player-made content**.

TrackMania² Canyon also fuels **fierce competition**. With a large player base and dedicated servers, the game offers **exciting, fast multiplayer races** for **up to 100 players at once**. As one observer put it, "The **official rankings** for solo and multiplayer modes prove it's a top online racing game." This strong base confirms TrackMania's status as a **top worldwide online racing game** and a key player in e-sports.

In a city where information is tightly controlled, **Runners** are essential for moving data and evading constant surveillance. You step into the shoes of Faith, a highly skilled Runner, in this immersive first-person action-adventure game. Your sister has been unjustly accused, and you find yourself relentlessly pursued through a seemingly utopian metropolis.

**Mirror's Edge™** thrusts you into Faith's perilous journey, where you'll navigate a **vibrant and disorienting urban landscape**. Prepare for thrilling combat sequences and high-speed chases that will test your reflexes. The game masterfully delivers an **incredible sense of motion and perspective**, deeply immersing you in Faith's risky world. As the developers themselves emphasized, "**You must survive**," presenting players with a stark choice: "rise above or fall." Ultimately, mastering the art of running is paramount to staying alive in this challenging environment. Developed by the acclaimed team behind the Battlefield series, Mirror's Edge offers a truly unique and unforgettable action-adventure experience.

To achieve success, you must **master your movement** by expertly employing parkour techniques. This includes performing wall-runs, precise jumps, and agile vaults to fluidly traverse the complex urban environment. **Crucially, you must utilize the city's architecture to your advantage**, not only for swift traversal but also for effective evasion of your pursuers. The innovative first-person perspective significantly amplifies the intensity of every action, allowing you to truly **feel the exhilaration of high drops, the seamless flow of movement, and the palpable adrenaline rush of close calls and intense gunfire.**

**Embrace the inherent challenge** by strategically choosing whether to confront your enemies head-on or expertly escape them. **Your speed and agility are undeniably your greatest assets**, empowering you to outsmart pursuers and navigate treacherous situations with grace. The game artfully blends exhilarating chases, intricate puzzles, and dynamic combat. A key mechanic is the activation of Runner Vision, which allows you to perceive the city from a Runner's unique and heightened viewpoint. In this mode, rooftops transform into **strategic pathways and vital escape routes**. A deep understanding of the city's intricate layout is absolutely crucial for maintaining your momentum and ensuring your survival.

**TrackMania United Forever: The Ultimate Racing Experience**

**TrackMania United Forever** is widely recognized as the **definitive edition** of the immensely popular car racing game, TrackMania. This comprehensive version masterfully **consolidates all previous environments** from the series and introduces a **vast, enhanced single-player campaign**. Players are invited to dive into **four distinct modes** – Race, Platform, Stunt, and Puzzle – across an impressive **420 tracks** that progressively escalate in difficulty. The game guarantees **exhilarating gameplay at breakneck speeds** on visually stunning tracks, featuring **daring jumps, loops, sharp turns, turbo boosts**, and a variety of challenging obstacles like track-breakers, rails, and ramps. Each track is meticulously designed to deliver a **fresh and intense experience**, ensuring sensational gaming whether you're playing solo or online.

As the game's description proudly boasts, "TrackMania is the most entertaining car racing game ever," underscoring its broad appeal with millions of players engaging in both single and multiplayer modes.

**United Forever** elevates the experience with **seven distinct vehicle types**, each offering unique gameplay and driving sensations across seven different TrackMania environments. A significant highlight is that the **Stadium environment is fully compatible with the free-to-play TrackMania Nations Forever**. The game robustly supports both solo and team-based multiplayer modes, allowing players to seamlessly join **millions of others on TrackMania servers worldwide**. A notable graphical update significantly enhances the three classic environments: Desert, Snow, and Rally, bringing them to life with improved visuals.

The game also features an **integrated peer-to-peer sharing system**, empowering players to showcase their custom creations, such as modified vehicles and avatars, to opponents. Players can earn **'Coppers,' the in-game currency**, by achieving medals in solo play or by trading their custom content, including cars, skins, tracks, and videos, with other players. **Official rankings** are readily available for both solo and multiplayer modes. In solo play, in addition to earning medals for exceptional racing, players can compete in official rankings by recording their best times on the game's tracks.

The **robust TrackMania editors** are a cornerstone of the game, empowering players to create their own tracks, vehicles, and videos using intuitive paint shop and movie studio tools. Furthermore, players can **seamlessly continue their progress from TrackMania Nations Forever**, carrying over all their valuable data, including medals, ladder positions, scores, and friends lists.

Name: Nimbus
Description:
Nimbus is a unique combination of racing & puzzling. The player controls a craft with no means of directly propelling itself and needs to use whatever is scattered around the levels to acquire thrust and reach the goal. Traverse a world map with several distinct islands in order to recover your lost love. Light on story, but heavy on gameplay Nimbus offers several hours of increasingly harder challenges. Key features: Over 50 levels available on the main campaign Unique game play that is easy to understand, but hard to master A varied blend of levels that requires a combination of skill & puzzle solving Plenty of opportunity for optimizing how you approach each level in order to beat the best times Several trails, levels and ships to unlock Loads of secrets & tricks

**Dustforce DX** offers a distinct 2D platforming experience where players embody a skilled janitor tasked with a crucial mission: **to cleanse a world choked by dust and grime**. Success hinges on **mastering fluid movement**, a skill honed through abilities like wall jumps and dashes that allow for navigation through intricate levels. The ultimate goal is to **achieve mastery by thoroughly and efficiently cleaning every stage**.

The game provides an abundance of content designed for diverse player engagement. It features **over 75 distinct levels**, thoughtfully designed to accommodate both casual exploration and demanding trials for seasoned players. Further expanding the replayability, **more than 100 community-created levels** are seamlessly integrated into the game. Players can also **compete for top scores on the global leaderboard** and **study replays** from elite players to refine their techniques. For those seeking direct competition, **local multiplayer battles** offer a fun and engaging way to test skills against friends.

The game's appeal is further amplified by its **artistically crafted environments** and a **captivating original soundtrack**. As one prominent reviewer noted, the soundtrack "perfectly complements the game's frenetic pace and melancholic atmosphere." Beyond its curated content, **Dustforce DX** boasts a powerful **level editor**, a tool that empowers players to **create their own stages** and **seamlessly share them** with the vibrant community. This user-generated content ensures a virtually endless supply of new challenges and creative endeavors.

**TrackMania² Valley: Experience the Thrill of Arcade Rally Racing**

TrackMania² Valley, the latest installment from Nadeo Studio, plunges players into the heart of **exhilarating arcade rally racing**. This title masterfully blends **high-speed action with accessible driving mechanics**, offering an engaging experience for all. Building on the series' legacy, Valley features a robust solo campaign, **diverse multiplayer modes**, and a vast library of player-created content, all integrated within the ManiaPlanet platform.

The game is designed to deliver an **unparalleled racing adventure**. Players can expect a **noticeably authentic car feel and responsive handling**, contributing to a truly electrifying racing sensation. The Valley environment is a **visual treat**, providing ample creative opportunities for track design while ensuring **smooth performance** across various hardware.

TrackMania games are celebrated for their **user-friendliness**, and Valley upholds this tradition with **remarkably straightforward gameplay**. This ease of access is further enhanced by **powerful creative tools**, granting players significant freedom. You can design **custom tracks, unique vehicles, and intricate game logic** using a wide array of design elements and scripting options.

The franchise's sustained success is largely driven by its **vibrant community and content-sharing ecosystem**. Players can easily share their creations and gameplay moments globally. An **integrated video editor** allows for the production of polished highlight reels directly within the game. The community remains highly active, **consistently generating diverse user-created content and hosting exciting events**.

**Multiplayer competition is a core element**, supporting over 100 players on a single track. **Official leaderboards** are available for both solo and multiplayer modes, enabling players to track their performance. TrackMania 2 Valley's dedication to **deep customization and seamless content sharing** is vital for fostering a dynamic and devoted player base. As one player noted, "The freedom to create and share is precisely what makes TrackMania so incredibly special."

**Offspring Fling!** is an **action-puzzle platformer** where players guide a distressed forest creature on a mission to **reunite with her lost children**. This **heartwarming adventure** spans **over 100 challenging levels**, each presenting unique obstacles and puzzles.

The game emphasizes **intense gameplay** with a focus on **awesome puzzles and rad platforming action**. Players can utilize **ghost replays** to improve their performance and **replay sharing** to compete against friends. The game also boasts numerous **secret unlockables** for dedicated players. Adding to the immersive experience is a **beautiful soundtrack** composed by Alec Holowka. A unique mechanic involves **throwing babies and watching them bounce off various surfaces**, contributing to the game's **cute and cuddly aesthetic**. Ultimately, Offspring Fling! promises **immense satisfaction** as players overcome challenges to bring the family back together.

Name: EVE Online
Description:
THE #1 SPACE MMO EVE Online is the largest single shard space MMO of all time. With over 7,000 solar systems and nearly 20 years of rich player-created history, join this storied universe and play free to experience everything from immense PvP or PvE battles to mining, exploration, and industry. Seize your destiny as an immortal, a Capsuleer capable of piloting over 350 fully customizable starships from small, nimble Frigates to formidable Battleships and massive Freighters. Embark on a solo adventure through the twisting nexus of wormhole space, form a mighty industrial empire to transform athe building blocks of the universe, or take up arms with likeminded players to conquer vast frontiers together. Who will you be in New Eden? PLAY FREE Experience this vast spaceship MMO for free as an Alpha Clone with access to Frigates, Destroyers, Cruisers, Battlecruisers, and Battleships of any faction. Enterprising Capsuleers may also choose to upgrade to Omega Clone for unlimited Ship access and double training speed. SINGLE SHARD, SINGLE SERVER SANDBOX As a single sharded MMO, all players of EVE Online play on the same server across all timezones. Jump in and join thousands of players in the greatest space sandbox there is. Every decision you make, battle you win, and system you claim becomes a part of the long, rich history of New Eden. Where will you leave your mark? GAMING'S BIGGEST BATTLES There's no limit on what you can accomplish as a Capsuleer. EVE currently holds the Guinness World Record for the largest multiplayer video game PvP battle - 8,825 players in a single conflict. Take part in massive spaceship battles from day one or train up and command those fleets yourself. PLAYER DRIVEN ECONOMY EVE's player economy is one of unprecedented scale. The single shard nature of the universe makes for a single economy spread across thousands of space stations. Whether you want to trade on the local markets, produce new ships and equipment, or make cunning investments based on knowledge of player politics, it's all possible. LIMITLESS CHOICES Pursue a life of exploration, warfare, prosperity, or all of the above! Pilot over 350 different vessels and customize it to your liking with thousands of unique modules. Modify your ship as a fast and nimble fighter or design it from the ground up as a heavily shielded brawler to go toe to toe with others. Feeling lucky? Take a chance and modify your equipment further using alien technology found deep in Abyssal Deadspace. CONTINUOUS DEVELOPMENT With over 17 years of active development and free expansions, EVE is one of the longest running space MMOs out there. Join a thrilling universe filled with the unrelenting activity and combined history of millions of other players!

**STAR WARS™: Squadrons: Your Gateway to Galactic Space Combat Mastery**

Step into the cockpit for an authentic piloting adventure with STAR WARS™: Squadrons. This game plunges you into **intense, first-person, multiplayer dogfights**, where mastering space combat is key to galactic domination. As a pilot, you'll command iconic starfighters from both the New Republic and Imperial forces in **strategic 5v5 battles**. To achieve victory, you must **customize your starfighter's loadout** and thoughtfully assemble your squadron to match various combat approaches. Teamwork is paramount; success hinges on pilots working together to achieve tactical goals across both familiar and **novel combat arenas**.

**Experience the thrill of combat firsthand** from a deeply immersive, visceral first-person viewpoint. For an unmatched level of immersion, the **entire game is playable in virtual reality (VR)**. Personalize your starfighter with unique loadouts and cosmetic items. A core gameplay mechanic involves **strategically managing power between weapons, shields, and engines**, demanding your constant attention to your ship's critical systems.

STAR WARS™: Squadrons provides a **complete, self-contained experience**, with all rewards earned solely through gameplay. Ascend through the ranks to unlock new components, including advanced weaponry, reinforced hulls, potent engines, upgraded shields, and distinctive cosmetic options. This straightforward progression system keeps the gameplay **consistently exciting and rewarding**.

The game boasts a captivating single-player STAR WARS narrative, told from dual perspectives, chronicling the fierce struggle for galactic supremacy following *Return of the Jedi*. Plan your engagements with your squadron in the briefing room before deploying to dynamic battlefields. Engage in **thrilling 5v5 multiplayer dogfights**, or join forces with your squadron to make a decisive impact in large-scale fleet battles. Take command of various starfighter classes, **skillfully allocate power to their essential systems**, and outmaneuver your adversaries in exhilarating, tactical space combat.

Prepare for an epic journey into the 22nd century, where mega-corporations vie for control of our solar system. This precarious balance shatters with a monumental discovery near the system's edge, igniting a catastrophic war known as 'The Jupiter Incident.' **Nexus - The Jupiter Incident** plunges you into this thrilling space opera.

This real-time, mission-based tactical space game delivers a captivating experience, focusing on **deep strategic command** and **intense space combat**. Players will lead a fleet of up to a dozen battleships, employing masterful tactics and decisive action. As one developer stated, "The game aims to immerse players in a believable, yet fantastical, future of space exploration and conflict."

The game presents a universe brimming with **varied challenges**. You'll confront alien threats, explore uncharted star systems, and navigate the wonders and dangers of space. The **grand narrative** unfolds across 6 episodes and over 26 engaging missions, featuring diverse objectives from espionage and combat to stealth, sabotage, rescue, and scientific discovery. Another source highlighted the game's "meticulous attention to detail in its ship design and combat mechanics."

Command an **adaptable fleet** of up to 10 intricately detailed, customizable spaceships, offering control from basic maneuvers to simulation-level complexity. Face formidable foes in the form of 6 unique alien species, each with distinct strategies and commanding a fleet of 30 alien vessels. Explore a **vast in-game world** populated by over 50 distinct characters and utilize more than 90 different weapons and devices. Navigate an interactive galaxy map with animated celestial bodies and realistic light effects, and zoom in on over 350 planets, moons, and comets within a fully realized 3D universe where celestial bodies adhere to authentic physical laws.

Will you rise to defend Earth and conquer the challenges of 'The Jupiter Incident'?

**Chorus: A Space Combat Saga of Redemption and Rebellion**

Embark on an epic journey in **Chorus**, a thrilling space combat shooter. You play as Nara, a former elite warrior of the oppressive Circle. Now a fugitive, Nara is driven by a **burning mission**: to dismantle the dark cult that forged her and find **redemption across the galaxy**.

Pilot Nara, an **ace pilot haunted by her past**, alongside **Forsaken, her sentient starfighter**, on a deeply personal quest. Their **critical mission** is to unite scattered resistance forces against the tyrannical Circle and their **enigmatic leader, the Great Prophet**. This odyssey will take them across the galaxy, confronting the **darkness that has shaped Nara's existence**. As one developer noted, "**Chorus is about Nara's journey of self-discovery and her fight for freedom.**"

**Venture into a dark, captivating universe** brimming with intrigue and **intense battles**. Explore **vast space stations** and delve into otherworldly planes, engaging in **exhilarating zero-g combat**. From **sweeping cosmic vistas** to claustrophobic crystalline passages, Chorus blends **grand space exploration with fast-paced action**. The game's world is designed to be both **beautiful and perilous**, offering players a truly **immersive experience**.

Chorus delivers a **unique gameplay experience** centered around its **dual protagonists** and **evolved combat mechanics**. You'll seamlessly switch between controlling Nara and her sentient starfighter, Forsaken, on their **intertwined quest for liberation**. Experience **fast-paced action** that pays homage to classic space shooters while introducing **innovative elements**. Your **paramount mission** is to rally forces against the formidable Circle and the Great Prophet. Prepare to confront a **diverse array of enemies**, from swarms of agile starfighters and colossal battleships to the **mysterious Void entities**.

To **overcome these threats**, you will acquire and upgrade **powerful weapons** and **mind-bending abilities**. Master Forsaken's **unique drift mechanic** and unlock **devastating powers** such as extra-sensory perception, teleportation, and telekinesis. The **strategic ability to combine these powers** is the **key to becoming unstoppable**. As the game's creative director stated, "**We wanted to give players a deep and satisfying combat system that rewards experimentation and skill.**" All of this unfolds within a **stunning sci-fi world**, a dark and mysterious universe brought to life with **breathtaking next-gen visuals in 4K**.

**Sable: A Journey of Self-Discovery in a Vast Desert World**

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Sable, a young woman undertaking her Gliding. This rite of passage will lead her across vast deserts and mesmerizing landscapes. She'll explore the remnants of spaceships and ancient wonders.

**Explore the Open World**

Traverse the dunes on your hoverbike. Scale monumental ruins and encounter other nomads. Unearth long-forgotten mysteries. Discover Sable's true identity beyond her mask. The world is rich with remnants of past civilizations, waiting to be explored.

**Master Movement and Customization**

Climb, leap, hover, and glide. Use every ability at your disposal to discover every inch of the world. Customize your hoverbike by finding or earning new parts.

**Connect with Others and Collectibles**

Help other clans and nomads you meet on your travels. Lose yourself in the adventure and find yourself through masks, outfits, and other collectibles. These items allow you to express who you are to those around you.

**Forge Your Path**

Complete puzzles to earn rewards. Forge your path through unforgiving terrain. Sable's unique art style and original soundtrack by Japanese Breakfast create an immersive experience. Explore everything at your own pace. There is much to discover. Take the leap.

**Star Conflict: Engage in Epic Space Battles**

Dive into **Star Conflict**, a game where you pilot advanced spacecraft in a vast interplanetary war. Experience **thrilling Player versus Player (PVP) battles** and challenging **cooperative Player versus Environment (PVE) missions** across stunning cosmic landscapes. The game offers diverse combat scenarios, from **swift dogfights** with other pilots to tough PVE encounters. A **flexible sandbox mode** lets players shape conflicts, and you can **create or join corporations** for large-scale territorial wars.

Your fleet can include **more than a hundred unique ships**, each built for a specific role. With **nine tactical classes** and deep customization, you can **adapt every ship to your playstyle**. The ability to **build modules and ships** adds another layer of personalization. Explore **occupied space colonies** to find valuable items and craft vital upgrades. **Team up with other pilots** to face tough pirates or dangerous alien foes. Prepare your ships for **scouting, stealth attacks, or vital support**, using various weapons and tools to **carry out your plans effectively**.

**Build strong alliances** to form squads for both PVP and PVE. Start your own corporation and **fight for control of key areas**. **Constantly improve your abilities** and combat strategies, whether you prefer:

*   **Direct assaults**
*   **Stealthy long-range attacks**
*   **Surprise ambushes**

The galaxy is a war zone between star empires and mercenary groups. In **Sector 1337**, known as the "area of the dead," you'll find remnants of an old alien civilization. This dangerous sector attracts scavengers, leading to **intense fights for ancient alien artifacts**.

**Space Pirates and Zombies (SPAZ)** is a top-down space combat game that puts **action and skill** at the forefront. It delivers a familiar feel to classic games but enhances the experience with a **full physics simulation** and modern graphics, resulting in **spectacular explosions**. However, SPAZ offers far more than just combat. Players command an **expanding and evolving fleet**, unlocking deep tactical elements that are **instantly accessible**. You can issue orders, switch ships, and adjust fleet AI settings on the fly. The game's Tactics Panel provides the tools to adapt to changing battles and **turn the tide in your favor**.

Beyond the action and tactics, SPAZ includes a detailed technology and level-up system, much like RPGs. Players can research and build new ships by defeating enemies. Exploring the galaxy yields components, and research points can be used to unlock their potential, allowing for **extensive fleet customization**. The game's universe is a **persistent, randomly generated galaxy** filled with story elements, factions, enemies, missions, and items, ensuring a unique experience with every playthrough. Amidst the struggle for survival, players will uncover the mystery of a spreading Zombie infestation that operates with its own **real-time, multi-tiered ecosystem**.

Key features include:

*   **33 ships** to research, build, outfit, and pilot.
*   **70 unique components** to discover and customize your fleet's performance.
*   A **fully physics-based combat system**.
*   Battles against **Zombie infestations**, featuring a full zombie ecosystem with four distinct stages of un-life.
*   Exploration of a **persistent, randomly generated galaxy** with hundreds of star systems.
*   The **freedom to explore** and tackle challenges at your own pace.
*   The ability to **aid, flee, or exploit warring factions** within each star system.
*   A unique **event system** that allows players to influence the balance of power in any star system.
*   Hundreds of upgrades across **15 categories**, requiring careful spending of research points.

Starpoint Gemini Warlords is a **captivating space simulation game** that blends role-playing and strategy. In this vast universe, you decide how to lead: command your war fleets from afar or **take direct control of your ship** to dominate in combat. As the Warlord, you can pilot your vessel, aiming and firing yourself, or let your gunners handle tasks while you use unique skills. Gather trusted companions for battles and call upon your fleets when needed for **glorious combat**.

Battles in Starpoint Gemini Warlords are **incredibly diverse**, from one-on-one duels and small skirmishes to massive fleet engagements. You'll build ships and assemble fleets to challenge the war-mongering factions across the Gemini system. **Strategic awareness is key**; a weaker fleet can be bolstered by "warmasters," specialists who can turn the tide. You can direct your fleets to follow you, leading them personally to victory.

**Enhance your headquarters** with modules for advanced weaponry and upgrades. Develop new ships, like the colossal Proxima, and build structures to activate territory-wide bonuses. As leader, a strong stronghold is vital. Expand your territory to spread influence and resources, but **avoid overextending defenses** to prevent enemy opportunism. Fortify territories by building resource and defense structures. Expanding the T-Gate network will speed up fleet travel across your empire, where **timely arrivals are decisive**.

Your journey starts with a small gunship and progresses to commanding massive carriers that deploy fighter wings. **Customize your ship** with a wide array of weapons and enhancements, and even personalize its appearance.

**Key Features:**

*   **Massive Game World:** Explore a vast universe with over 60 diverse factions ready to clash.
*   **Campaign Mode:** Experience the story of the "exiles" who fled an alien invasion of the Sol system to Phaeneros.
*   **Free Roam Scenarios:** Engage in five distinct scenarios, each with a unique starting setup.
*   **Extensive Ship Selection:** Choose from nearly 90 ships, including gunships, corvettes, and carriers.
*   **Personal Headquarters:** Build and upgrade your headquarters to boost economic and military power.
*   **Procedural Content:** Take on generated freelance jobs for Credits and prepare for unexpected events.
*   **Character Classes:** Select from three unique classes or create your own hybrid.
*   **Technological Advancement:** Research technologies affecting your ship and the galaxy.
*   **Conquest and Dominion:** Build fleets, conquer territories for the Solari Concord.
*   **Infrastructure Development:** Build and upgrade infrastructure for better resource gathering and control.
*   **Diplomacy and Trade:** Engage in diplomacy and trade deals for advantages.
*   **Enhanced Mod Support:** Enjoy improved mod support over Starpoint Gemini 2.

For more details, see the official Starpoint Gemini Wiki on Gamepedia.

**Gratuitous Space Battles (GSB)** is a unique sci-fi strategy game that **focuses exclusively on massive, unprovoked space combat**. It **removes common genre elements** like detailed backstories, complex resource management, and time-consuming diplomacy. Instead, players are **immediately thrown into the excitement of enormous fleets clashing in spectacular, unprompted battles**. GSB **skillfully blends the visual spectacle of a Real-Time Strategy (RTS) game with the strategic unit placement and design elements found in tower defense titles**.

In GSB, you **don't directly control individual ships during combat**. Your fleet operates based on **pre-programmed orders and formations that you meticulously craft before the battle begins**. As the ultimate space commander, your role involves **designing individual starships, organizing your fleet, and issuing overarching engagement directives**. This game **doesn't rely on rapid reflexes; it's a strategic experience that emphasizes careful thought, meticulous planning, and a comprehensive grasp of the battlefield**. As one player aptly described it, "**The sheer scale of the battles is breathtaking, and the strategic depth is surprisingly profound.**"

Success in these immense space engagements hinges on your ability to **balance defensive strategies, such as shields and armor, with powerful offensive armaments like laser cannons and plasma torpedoes**. GSB also features an **innovative multiplayer challenge system**. You can **upload your most powerful fleet to serve as an AI opponent for other players**, and then **observe how they fare against your creation**. This system ensures a **continuous stream of ingeniously designed adversaries, providing a constant test of your strategic acumen**.

The game offers:

*   **Four distinct player races** that can be unlocked.
*   A selection of **over 40 unique ship hulls** for players to utilize.
*   **More than 120 spaceship modules** available for extensive customization.
*   Several gameplay modes, including skirmishes against AI opponents, an unending survival mode, and the opportunity to face off against other players' fleets through the online challenge system.
*   Diverse gameplay scenarios, as each battle introduces **unique spatial anomalies that modify the engagement rules**.

Embark on an epic journey in **Darkstar One**, a thrilling space combat and trading simulation where **you command your destiny**. This expansive universe is alive with diverse alien species, advanced technology, and dangerous enemies. Your central mission is to discover **ancient artifacts**, which are essential for upgrading your powerful ship, the Darkstar One.

To truly maximize your ship's potential, you'll need to gather **credits**. These valuable resources can be earned through a variety of activities. You can:

*   Complete missions
*   Hunt down bounties
*   Engage in piracy
*   Smuggle goods
*   Participate in trade
*   Provide escort services
*   Undertake transport missions
*   Claim rewards

Darkstar One features a massive, simulated galaxy populated by many alien factions. Each faction has its own unique ship designs and combat approaches. The game's compelling story is told through over fifty minutes of cinematic cutscenes, immersing you in the narrative.

You have the freedom to **customize and upgrade the Darkstar One** to perfectly suit your individual playstyle. Whether you prefer to be a fast and aggressive attacker or a heavily armored defender, the game offers more than two hundred choices for weapons, shields, and equipment. Different projectile types, like rockets, torpedoes, and mines, each have specific tactical uses. For instance, mines can be strategically placed to surprise enemies or to block incoming missiles.

A standout feature is the **'Spell Weapon,'** which operates similarly to magic in role-playing games. Its power grows as you advance, unlocking a broader range of tactical options. You can also find and utilize **special alien weaponry** that possesses unique capabilities, requiring you to adapt your combat strategies. Darkstar One also includes distinctive missions that will take you to fascinating locations. The choices you make throughout the game will significantly impact your **reputation**, determining whether you are seen as a hero or a villain, and even influencing the outcome of political conflicts.

Name: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City
Description:
Welcome to Vice City. Welcome to the 1980s. From the decade of big hair, excess and pastel suits comes a story of one man's rise to the top of the criminal pile. Vice City, a huge urban sprawl ranging from the beach to the swamps and the glitz to the ghetto, was one of the most varied, complete and alive digital cities ever created. Combining open-world gameplay with a character driven narrative, you arrive in a town brimming with delights and degradation and given the opportunity to take it over as you choose. Having just made it back onto the streets of Liberty City after a long stretch in maximum security, Tommy Vercetti is sent to Vice City by his old boss, Sonny Forelli. They were understandably nervous about his re-appearance in Liberty City, so a trip down south seemed like a good idea. But all does not go smoothly upon his arrival in the glamorous, hedonistic metropolis of Vice City. He's set up and is left with no money and no merchandise. Sonny wants his money back, but the biker gangs, Cuban gangsters, and corrupt politicians stand in his way. Most of Vice City seems to want Tommy dead. His only answer is to fight back and take over the city himself.

**Karateka: An Interactive Documentary Unveils a Gaming Classic**

Explore the fascinating journey behind **Karateka**, the seminal 1984 game created by Jordan Mechner, the visionary also responsible for **Prince of Persia**. This new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse offers a deep dive into how a college student, armed with only an Apple II, crafted one of the most successful and **influential games of its time**.

**Uncover the Development Process**

Delve into an extensive collection of design documents, playable prototypes, and new video features that shed light on the creation of Karateka. This engaging experience allows you to navigate interactive timelines at your own pace, akin to exploring a digital museum.

**Experience the Original and Enhanced Versions**

Play **pixel-perfect recreations** of the original Karateka games. The collection also includes **previously unreleased early prototypes**, now enhanced with modern features such as save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and insightful director's commentary for a smoother experience.

**Discover New Takes on the Classic**

Karateka Remastered offers a revitalized version of the original, featuring **additional content, commentary, and achievements**. Furthermore, experience **Deathbounce: Rebounded**, a vibrant twin-stick shooter that originated from one of Jordan Mechner's unreleased prototypes.

**A Game That Shaped Gaming History**

Learn how Karateka pioneered **cinematic storytelling**, featured a **hauntingly memorable soundtrack**, utilized **rotoscoped animation** for lifelike movement, and presented a **compelling Hollywood-esque romance**. Its groundbreaking innovations left a lasting mark on game design.

**Digital Eclipse's Gold Master Series: Celebrating Gaming Heritage**

From the award-winning team behind Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection and Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration, Digital Eclipse's Gold Master Series breathes new life into beloved games. This distinctive "interactive documentary" format honors the **deep history of video games and the talent behind them**, all within one comprehensive package. As Digital Eclipse states, their goal is to celebrate the **"rich history of gaming and its creators."**

**Pinball FX3** offers a vast, **community-focused pinball adventure**, showcasing iconic **Williams™ tables**. To mark its release, the **Fish Tales™ table is available for free** to all players. Zen Studios is committed to building a thriving hub for pinball fans, promoting competition through **multiplayer battles, player-organized tournaments, and official league play**.

A key aspect of Pinball FX3 is its dedication to **player appreciation**. The game features **free backwards compatibility**, enabling you to transfer your existing Pinball FX2 purchases to the new game without any extra cost.

For those looking to sharpen their pinball prowess, Pinball FX3 introduces **new single-player modes** designed to elevate the gameplay experience. Additionally, all tables have received substantial visual enhancements, now featuring **real-time lighting and shadow effects** that dramatically improve their appearance.

Zen Studios plans to continuously support Pinball FX3 with **regular new content and features**, ensuring the pinball world remains dynamic and engaging. As one developer explained, "**We wanted to make sure our loyal players felt appreciated for their past support of the Pinball FX universe.**" This focus on visual improvement is further highlighted by a source who commented, "**The new lighting system really makes the tables feel alive, offering a more engaging experience than ever before.**"

Counter-Strike is a top online action game. It offers a realistic, team-based combat experience. Players work with teammates to complete important strategic objectives.

These missions can include:
*   Neutralizing enemy positions
*   Rescuing hostages

Individual performance is key to winning. The game's developers state that your role directly impacts your team's success. In turn, your team's success shapes your role. This dynamic relationship makes every match a test of coordination and skill.

**The Gallery: Heart of the Emberstone - A VR Sci-Fi Adventure**

Embark on an **epic journey** in *The Gallery: Heart of the Emberstone*, a **groundbreaking virtual reality science fiction story**. This **award-winning VR series**, with over **30 accolades including 'VR Game of the Year'**, was a **true pioneer in roomscale movement and interaction**. This **compelling puzzle exploration game** draws inspiration from **dark 1980s fantasy adventure films**, immersing you in a world brimming with **mystery and profound discovery**.

Your **primary mission** is to locate your missing sister, Elsie. Upon arrival on the enigmatic planet Ember, you will:

*   **Uncover the tragic history of a civilization** destroyed by a conflict between two siblings.
*   Encounter a **formidable ally** searching for their lost partner.

Your ultimate **goal** is to master the **Gauntlet**, a powerful tool for controlling energy. This will allow you to **meticulously reconstruct the history of this lost world** and **gain a deep understanding of the intentions** of the mysterious figure who orchestrated your arrival. This **highly anticipated sequel** builds upon the original VR adventure, continuing your **thrilling quest** through the Starseed and onto the **intriguing planet Ember**.

**Key features** of this immersive experience include:

*   **Exploring a dark and captivating history** inspired by iconic 80s fantasy.
*   **Mastering the use of the telekinetic Gauntlet** to solve intricate puzzles.
*   **Leveraging VR's unique physical interaction and advanced hand tracking capabilities**.

Interact with a **memorable large ally** and **fascinating alien beings** within **meticulously detailed roomscale environments**. These environments are enhanced by **stunningly immersive spatial audio** and a **brand-new, evocative score** composed by **Jeremy Soule**. The game promises **many hours of engaging gameplay** with **experimental movement options** for a **truly personalized VR experience**. As one critic noted, "**The Gallery truly sets a new standard for VR storytelling.**"

Available for Arcades on SpringboardVR.

**Hotline Miami: A Brutal Descent into 1989 Miami's Criminal Underworld**

Hotline Miami is a **fast-paced action game** that plunges players into the **intense violence, gunplay, and close-quarters combat** of an **alternate 1989 Miami**. You play as a **mysterious antihero** carrying out a violent crusade against the criminal underworld, guided by **cryptic messages received on your answering machine**.

As the story unfolds, you'll confront the perplexing events and your own **violent tendencies**. **Strategic thinking is essential** to navigate challenging situations where enemies **consistently outnumber you**. The action is **relentless**, and **every bullet is fatal**. To survive and uncover the **dark forces** behind the bloodshed, **swift, decisive movements** are paramount.

The game features:

*   A **distinctive visual style**
*   A **captivating soundtrack**
*   A **surreal narrative**

These elements encourage players to **question their own enjoyment of the violence**. Hotline Miami offers a **brutally challenging experience** that truly **pushes players to their limits**.

**Become the Ultimate Bounty Hunter in the Lawless Future of HUNTDOWN**

In a future where criminal gangs rule the streets and law enforcement is overwhelmed, **bounty hunters** are the last line of defense. **HUNTDOWN** is a hard-boiled action-comedy arcade shooter that challenges you to dismantle the criminal underworld and get rich doing it.

**Experience Thrilling Co-Op and New Arcade Challenges**

Team up with a friend for online or local **couch co-op**, utilizing **Steam Remote Play** for seamless play anywhere. Test your skills in a new **action-packed arcade mode** and compete on global leaderboards. Discover innovative ways to defeat enemies, earn points through **combo-kills** and **quickdraw weapon-swap bonuses**, or even **hurl criminals off rooftops**. It's a **nail-biting race against the clock** to collect bounties and prove you're the **apex bounty hunter**.

**Play as Three Legendary Bounty Hunters**

*   **Anna Conda:** An ex-commando and firearms expert, Anna is a **loose-cannon** who eliminates targets without question, regardless of collateral damage. As one developer noted, "Anna is all about getting the job done, no matter the mess."
*   **John Sawyer:** A former Special Forces cop, this **scarred veteran** has lost so many limbs he's practically half robot.
*   **Mow Man:** A modified recon droid empowered with banned software, Mow Man **trades bodies for cold, hard cash**. "Don't expect to survive if Mow Man is on your tail," warns the game's description.

**Old School Charm, Modernized Gameplay**

**HUNTDOWN** features **hand-painted 16-bit pixel art graphics** and hand-drawn animations. This classic look is paired with **fluid 60-FPS gameplay** and an **epic synthesized soundtrack**, creating a unique retro-futuristic experience.

**Explore 20 Levels Across Gritty Cityscapes and Dismantle Four Unique Gangs**

Venture through **gritty, neon-soaked, graffiti-strewn 80s cityscapes** across 20 levels. Each level offers a new challenge with an **infamous gang boss to terminate** and a bounty to collect. You'll face off against:

*   **Hoodlum Dolls:** These **violent feral punks** are winning the gang war against toothless authorities.
*   **Misconducts:** **Organized hockey hooligans** specializing in robbery and extortion, with a dangerous penchant for explosives.
*   **The Heatseekers:** A **murderous motorcycle club** whose rockabilly villains style themselves after Ancient Roman centurions.
*   **NO.1 Suspects:** **Masters of discipline and organized crime**, these martial arts experts control the night through their casinos and nightclubs.

**Choose Your Weapon and Unleash Havoc**

Confiscate a variety of weapons, including **machine guns, laser weapons, katanas, and grenades**, and turn them against their former owners. **Stab, shoot, and explode** your way through hordes of gangs and bosses to collect your bounty.

The **Mega Man Legacy Collection** is a **definitive compilation** that brings Capcom's **iconic 8-bit adventures** to current platforms. It's an **essential gateway** for new players and a nostalgic journey for fans, cementing Mega Man's place as a **key figure in gaming history**.

This package does more than just re-release the **original six Mega Man games**. It adds **new gameplay features** to enhance the experience. A major highlight is the **Challenge Mode**, which cleverly combines gameplay sections from the entire series. It offers various difficulty levels, presenting **tough tests** for experienced players and a **great way to learn** for beginners. As one industry expert put it, the Challenge Mode is an "outstanding method for beginners to get acquainted with the series."

Additionally, the **Museum Mode** provides an in-depth look at the franchise's history. Players can find a wealth of **high-quality artwork, early design drafts, and detailed historical information**, offering a unique view of Mega Man's development. Reviewers have commended the collection for its accurate revival of the original games, with one stating it "faithfully revives the first six Mega Man games."

Key features of the **Mega Man Legacy Collection** include:

*   **Six Classic Games:** Play the foundational titles that started the legendary Mega Man series.
*   **Authentic Graphics:** Enjoy the classic 8-bit look, now with sharp, high-definition visuals.
*   **Engaging Challenge Mode:** Conquer remixed gameplay challenges made for all skill levels.
*   **Extensive Museum:** Explore the series' roots with concept art, design notes, and historical facts.
*   **Modern Engine:** The games are rebuilt on the modern Eclipse Engine for smooth, true-to-original gameplay.
*   **Worldwide Leaderboards:** Compete against players globally and showcase your scores.

**Darwinia: A Critically Acclaimed Indie Gem Reimagined**

**Darwinia** is a unique indie game that masterfully blends **fast-paced action** with **strategic battle planning**. Its standout feature is a **novel and intuitive control mechanism**, setting it apart from other titles. The game's distinctive visual style pays homage to **80s retro classics** like Tron and Defender, immersing players in a world reminiscent of early arcade adventures. The story follows a tribe of nomadic sprites trapped within a modern 3D environment.

Originally released to critical acclaim, Darwinia has been **fully re-mastered in 2022**. This updated version ensures the **indie classic** runs **seamlessly on all modern systems**, proving its appeal remains **fresh and relevant today**.

Darwinia's exceptional quality is further evidenced by its numerous awards. The game **won 3 out of 5 prizes at the IGF**, including the **Seamus McNally Grand Prize for Best Independent Video Game**. It also received **multiple editor's choice awards**, solidifying its status as one of the **most critically acclaimed indie games of all time**.

**EXPERIENCE THE LATEST GAME FROM INTROVERSION SOFTWARE.**

In **Astalon: Tears of the Earth**, you're plunged into a **post-apocalyptic desert** on a **critical mission to save your village**. Your quest leads you to a **mysterious tower** that has emerged from the earth, holding the **key to your survival**. To aid your perilous journey, one hero has forged a **pact with Epimetheus, the Titan of Death**, bestowing the power to **reincarnate** until your mission is accomplished. This **unique mechanic** is central to the game's narrative and gameplay, fundamentally altering your approach to challenges.

**Death is not an end** in Astalon: Tears of the Earth, but rather a strategic path to victory in this action-platformer set within a dying world. You'll leverage the **distinct skills** of three heroes to conquer the tower and unravel its many secrets.

Here's a breakdown of the core gameplay elements:

*   **Reincarnation Mechanic:** The pact with Epimetheus allows for repeated attempts, empowering you to **strengthen your party and ultimately change your destiny**.
*   **Hero Variety:** Utilize the unique abilities of:
    *   Arias the fighter
    *   Kyuli the rogue
    *   Algus the wizard
*   **Exploration and Progression:**
    *   Battle a variety of monsters and formidable bosses.
    *   Discover powerful artifacts, like the "Sword of Mirrors," granting new powers.
    *   Solve intricate puzzles as you ascend the Tower of Serpents.
    *   **Explore the Tower of Serpents' many secrets**, rewarding curiosity and perseverance.
*   **Character Development:**
    *   Switch between the three distinct heroes at will.
    *   Strategically select the appropriate hero to exploit enemy weaknesses.
    *   Character abilities can be significantly upgraded.
    *   Campfires serve as crucial save points, offering opportunities to switch characters and delve into their individual backstories.

Astalon: Tears of the Earth aims to evoke the nostalgic feel of **8-bit action-adventure games** through its meticulously detailed pixel art and a dark, fantastical setting. It masterfully combines progressive exploration of an interconnected world with fast-paced, room-by-room platforming challenges. The original character designs are the work of Ryusuke Mita, renowned for his manga work, Dragon Half. Players are given the freedom to choose their preferred playstyle, whether that involves **deep exploration and character development** or a more rapid, aggressive approach to climbing the tower.

The game promises hours of engaging and challenging gameplay, with hundreds of rooms to explore, replete with unlockables and hidden secrets. The entire experience is further elevated by an exciting chiptune soundtrack composed by Matt Kap, featuring over 30 original tracks that perfectly complement the game's atmosphere. As Ryusuke Mita himself might suggest, the art and gameplay work in tandem to create a cohesive and memorable experience. The story powerfully highlights themes of **friendship and sacrifice**, urging players to find courage and face daunting challenges to protect the vulnerable.

Name: Mini Motorways
Description:
Have you ever been stuck in traffic and wished you could do something to fix it? In Mini Motorways, the city’s traffic problems are in your hands. From the makers of Mini Metro, Mini Motorways is a game about drawing the roads that drive a growing city. Build a road network, one road at a time, to create a bustling metropolis. Redesign your city to keep the traffic flowing, and carefully manage upgrades to meet the changing demands. How long can you keep the cities of the world moving? Key Features Draw roads in dynamic cities that grow and change - every game is unique! Explore stunning maps inspired by cities all around the world. Choose from a variety of upgrades to meet the demands of your ever-expanding road network: highways, roundabouts, and more! Select different colour palettes on every map including colourblind and night modes. Relax to a responsive soundtrack from Disasterpeace that grows along with your city. Unlock new maps and achievements as you achieve mastery Export GIFs of your city layouts to share with your friends. Compete against other players in Daily and Weekly Challenges.

Embark on a journey to build a **thriving virtual trucking empire** in Euro Truck Simulator 2. This immersive simulation challenges your **driving prowess and strategic planning** as you deliver essential cargo across a vast European continent, navigating numerous cities throughout the UK, Belgium, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, and beyond. If you dream of joining an **elite trucking force**, it's time to demonstrate your capabilities.

Euro Truck Simulator 2 offers a deeply engaging experience where you'll transport a **wide variety of cargo** to over 60 European cities while developing your own **successful trucking business**. Key aspects of this growth include expanding your fleet with new trucks, purchasing garages to establish operational bases, and hiring skilled drivers to increase overall profits. As one player noted, "The satisfaction of building your own trucking company from the ground up is immense."

Beyond business management, the game provides extensive vehicle customization. You can fine-tune your trucks with a **broad range of tuning options** for both performance and aesthetics. Personalize your vehicles further with accessories like lights, bars, horns, beacons, and unique smoke exhausts to create a truly **distinctive truck**. Explore thousands of miles of **realistic road networks**, featuring hundreds of iconic landmarks that bring Europe to life.

To enhance your Euro Truck Simulator 2 journey, consider joining the **World of Trucks** online community. This platform connects virtual truckers worldwide, offering additional features and a space to share your enthusiasm. Within World of Trucks, you can utilize the in-game Photo Mode to capture and share memorable moments, save and discuss screenshots, and strive for recognition by aiming for the **Editor's Pick**. You can also personalize your profile with a **custom avatar and license plate**. World of Trucks is an **optional service**, and registration is not necessary to enjoy the main gameplay. A spokesperson for SCS Software, the game's developer, stated, "World of Trucks is designed to foster a sense of community and shared passion among our players."

**RAILGRADE: Build Your Industrial Empire with Smart Railway Design**

In **RAILGRADE**, your main goal is to **strategically design intricate railway systems**. You will deploy trains to connect vital industries with the resources they need. This engaging simulation game places you in charge of managing inbound and outbound logistics to **maximize production** and create **efficient supply lines**. The game includes **multi-level track construction** and various engine types, providing the tools for success. As one player noted, "The **train customization is exceptionally deep**, offering hundreds of distinct engine and cargo combinations." This allows you to **precisely tailor your fleet** to your colony's expanding needs. Gameplay focuses on optimizing supply chains by linking production facilities and managing train movements across a large map. Success hinges on **smart strategic planning** and **innovative construction** to revitalize a struggling industrial colony. "The ultimate goal is to sufficiently impress your corporate superiors to secure your passage back to Earth," a developer explained.

**RAILGRADE** features a substantial single-player campaign with over 50 missions. These tasks center on restoring prosperity to a challenged industrial colony. Completing missions earns tokens, which unlock new industries, upgrades, and gameplay features. The game offers **intuitive building tools** for quickly constructing and managing a busy railway network with many trains.

Key gameplay elements include:

*   **Improving your train system's efficiency**: This is crucial for success.
*   **Careful track placement**: Essential for overcoming difficult terrain and establishing effective delivery routes.
*   **Diligently managing resource output**: Control inputs and outputs, watching for bottlenecks to ensure a steady flow of trains and cargo.

A cinematic camera lets you admire your trains in action. Side missions offer unique challenges, such as finding oil in deserts or setting up rocket launch infrastructure. A photo mode with filters allows you to display your railway designs. You can also encourage city growth or use airships for exports to boost profits, adding another economic strategy layer.

**Mini Metro** is a popular simulation game where you design and manage subway systems for a growing city. Your main goal is to draw subway lines to connect stations efficiently, ensuring smooth travel for commuters. A key challenge is the **limited platform space** at each station, which requires smart network planning to avoid delays. As the city expands with new stations and more passengers, the transit system faces increasing demands. This means you'll need to constantly redesign and upgrade your network. New assets are added weekly to help manage these growing complexities. Ultimately, the success of your transit system depends on your strategic choices as more stations open and platforms get crowded.

The game offers a compelling experience, blending intense decision-making with calm, creative network design. Players can choose from several game modes:

*   **Normal:** For fast-paced, scored sessions.
*   **Endless:** For a relaxed sandbox experience.
*   **Extreme:** For a demanding challenge.
*   **Creative Mode:** For designing metro systems exactly as you imagine.

**Mini Metro** features over twenty real-world cities, each with a unique look, specific challenges, and a distinct pace. As **IGN** noted, "Mini Metro’s clean, stylish interface encourages me over and over again to make the trains run on time, and there’s a deeper amount of strategy to growing a sprawling metro system than meets the eye." The review also stated, "I wasn’t just hypnotized by the rhythmic movement of trains from station to station, I was completely absorbed in making them perfect."

The game's **distinctive art style** makes each map a visual work of art, inspired by classic abstract subway designs. This is complemented by a **dynamic soundtrack** from Disasterpeace, which changes with the metro system's activity, boosting player immersion. **Accessibility features**, like colorblind and night modes, are also included. If you enjoyed **Mini Metro**, you might also like **Mini Motorways**, a highway planning game from the same developers, Dinosaur Polo Club. You can try a **demo** of **Mini Metro** using the London map.

**American Truck Simulator** invites players to embark on an authentic trucking adventure across the United States. Developed by SCS Software, this simulation game builds upon the success of Euro Truck Simulator 2, offering a deeply **realistic and engaging experience**. You'll navigate diverse American landscapes, from the sunny coasts of California to the arid deserts of Arizona, all while transporting a wide array of cargo.

Your journey begins as an independent driver in a competitive industry. The ultimate goal is to **build your trucking empire**, progressing from a solo operator to a successful business owner with a thriving transportation company.

The game boasts several key features designed to enhance the realism of your trucking adventure. **"The truck is your personal space,"** offering extensive customization options for cabins, chassis, paint jobs, and powerful engines. You'll haul a broad spectrum of goods, from food to heavy machinery, mastering different trailer types, including those extending up to 53 feet, which will truly test your driving and parking skills. As one of the developers stated, "We aim to provide an **authentic and engaging trucking experience**."

Immersive environments include bustling refineries, extensive oil facilities, and car factories. The simulation mechanics are **"true-to-life,"** featuring realistic air brake simulation, multiple brake types, and various transmission options. Players can also **"enhance in-cabin immersion"** by adjusting their seating and mirror positions for optimal visibility. Navigating roads requires adherence to traffic laws and speed limits to avoid penalties, and ensuring your cargo isn't overweight is crucial for passing weigh station inspections.

Beyond driving, you'll **"expand your fleet,"** acquire garages, and hire drivers to manage your growing operations and maximize profitability. To make your drives more enjoyable, you can listen to music via the built-in player or streaming radio. The game also offers excellent support for steering wheels and gamepads, along with ongoing updates and challenging Steam achievements.

The **World of Trucks** community platform provides additional features and connects virtual truckers. Here, you can **"share your trucking journey"** using the in-game Photo Mode, engage in discussions, and strive to have your screenshots featured. Registration is optional and requires owning either American Truck Simulator or Euro Truck Simulator 2. As one player shared, "I love being able to **capture my best moments** and share them with other truckers."

Name: Transport Fever 2
Description:
The classic transport simulation genre has a new gold standard with Transport Fever 2. Discover a whole new world by navigating transport routes through land, water and air. May progress and prosperity find their way! Provide the world with the transport infrastructure it needs and make a fortune with custom-made transport services. Watch your trains run on rails, your buses and trucks thunder along roads, your ships power through the water, and your planes soar through the skies. Carry people on their way to work or play, and be the reason cities grow and thrive. Deliver raw materials and goods to drive the economy. Experience the greatest logistical challenges from 1850 to the present day, and build a transport empire unrivaled anywhere else on the globe! Free play offers a huge range of creative possibilities, while campaign mode re-writes transport history across three continents. Transport Fever 2 offers a choice of over 200 vehicles from Europe, America and Asia, modelled in extreme detail; and with the in-game map editor, you can re-create landscapes from three different climate zones. Finally, the realistic transport and economy simulator, along with comprehensive modding support, round off the gameplay experience. Open Up the World A huge game world is waiting for your railroads, road vehicles, aircraft and ships. Intuitive interactive rail construction tools and a modular construction system for stations make it easy to build and expand your transport empire; and thanks to a wide range of configuration options, every free play game provides a new challenge, where completely different strategies can lead to success. Write Transport History Three historic campaigns set in different time periods and located on three separate continents will challenge you with different objectives …only transport magnates will manage to complete all the missions! Voiceovers and cutscenes enrich the story and contribute to a thrilling gameplay experience, and even the free play mode will challenge you with different achievements to unlock. Optimize the Infrastructure It is vital to adapt your company to the needs of the economy and cities: bridges, tunnels, switches, rail signals, one-way streets, light signals, and bus lanes are just some of the possibilities you can use to optimize the transport infrastructure. Even train stations and airports can be expanded with modules in order to meet different requirements; and various data layers help you visualize traffic volumes and emissions, and provide information for further improvements. Free your Creativity Thanks to the detailed game world, you can develop your very own virtual railroad landscape: the map editor provides the possibility to create countless different worlds; the terrain in the game can be adjusted and painted; and thanks to the extensive modding support, new creations are being developed constantly, which are available for free via the Steam Workshop and which can be easily integrated into the game. Game Features Free play with countless configuration possibilities Three campaigns across three continents with over 20 hours of playing time Editors for creating maps and editing saved games Three landscape types: moderate, dry, and tropical Realistically modelled vehicles from Europe, America and Asia A total of over 200 vehicles: trains, buses, streetcars, trucks, aircraft and ships Modular train stations, bus and truck stations, airports and harbors Realistic transport simulation including one-way streets and light signals Editable and paintable terrain with realistic effects Intuitive construction tools for building railroads and more Display important data such as traffic and emissions, on separate layers Dynamic economy and city simulation More than ten economic chains with associated factories and goods Cities with countless residential, commercial and industrial buildings Detailed game world with physics-based lighting Individually simulated land animals, birds and fish Over 50 challenging achievements in free play mode Extensive modding support via the Steam Workshop

Experience the **thrill of pursuit and escape** in **Need for Speed™ Hot Pursuit Remastered** on PC. This remastered edition of Criterion Games' acclaimed racing title lets you unleash a **savage sense of speed** as both an outlaw and a law enforcer, commanding a fleet of the world's hottest high-performance vehicles.

The game's core is its **socially competitive racing**, powered by the groundbreaking **Autolog** system. This intelligent technology connects you and your friends, fostering head-to-head pursuits by **instinctively delivering challenges** based on your friends' recent activities. Autolog now boasts **cross-platform synchronization** and enhanced multiplayer, allowing you to race against anyone, regardless of their platform.

**Need for Speed™ Hot Pursuit Remastered** includes all previously released downloadable content, adding over **6 hours of additional gameplay** and more than **30 new challenges**. The remaster also introduces a host of updates, including new achievements, a wider array of car wraps and colors, reduced hard stops for smoother gameplay, an updated photo mode, and numerous **quality-of-life improvements**.

Get behind the wheel of desirable supercars, each with unique capabilities. As a cop, you'll command interceptors armed with tactical weaponry. As an elite racer, you can deploy counterattacks and defensive maneuvers. **Strategic play is paramount** to gaining an edge, no matter which side of the law you choose.

The game offers a deep single-player career that seamlessly integrates with multiplayer. You can challenge friends or play solo, earning Bounty to unlock new cars and equipment. **Need for Speed™ Hot Pursuit Remastered** revitalizes a timeless racing experience with **enhanced visuals**, bringing its iconic chases to life for a new generation.

## Forge Your Railroad Empire Across North America

**Railway Empire** invites you to build a sprawling rail network throughout North America, beginning in 1830 with the ultimate goal of becoming an industrial titan by 1900. The central objective is to outmaneuver competitors and transform your fledgling railway company into an undisputed leader.

To achieve this ambitious vision, your primary focus will be on establishing a **comprehensive and highly efficient rail system**. This entails:

*   **Acquiring a diverse fleet:** Choose from over 40 meticulously detailed train models.
*   **Investing in vital infrastructure:** Construct essential facilities such as stations, maintenance depots, factories, and even attractive tourist destinations to boost your company's profitability and public image.

Furthermore, triumph in **Railway Empire** hinges on **strategic workforce management** and the **adoption of cutting-edge technologies**. You will be responsible for hiring and overseeing employees to maximize their output. The game offers a vast progression system with over 300 technologies to unlock, progressing through five distinct historical eras. These innovations encompass everything from enhancing train performance to improving operational efficiency and introducing new passenger amenities.
