Together, their efforts are creating an all-new tileset featuring brand new pixel art by artists Carolyn Jong and Neoriceisgood. Dwarf Fortress Steam edition will have a 15 track soundtrack by Dabu, Simon Swerwer and Águeda Macias including tracks in the Dwarvish language! It's never been easier to start playing! We've improved the new player experience with the addition of tutorials to guide you through building your first fort and keeping your dwarves happy. Command your dwarves as they search for wealth in their generated mountain. Your dwarves will need a steady supply of food and beer, but they’ll also need your guidance in surviving attacks from hostile civilizations, the wilderness, or even the dead. Craft treasures and furnitures from various materials Establish a barony and support the increasingly demanding nobility Read your dwarves’ thoughts to keep them happy Build floodgates to divert water for farming, and/or prevent magma mishaps Build structures and watch your dwarves discover and build their culture, like taverns, libraries, temples, honey, wax, pottery, animal training, bookbinding, and more. The original inspiration for RimWorld, Prison Architect, Minecraft and more. One of the first video games acquired by the Museum of Modern Art in New York Updated for over 16 years by two brothers, Tarn “Toady One” and Zach “Threetoe” Adams With the goal of simulating all of existence, Bay 12 estimates they’re only about 44% done.

Embark on an **unforgettable journey** in UNDERTALE, a **unique role-playing game** where you play as a human who has fallen into a subterranean world inhabited by monsters. Your primary objective is to **escape this underground realm**, but the path you choose will determine whether you find freedom or remain forever imprisoned.

((Healthy Dog's Warning: This game includes visuals that might be problematic for individuals with photosensitive epilepsy or similar conditions.))

UNDERTALE offers a **refreshing departure from typical RPGs**. Combat is not about brute force; instead, you can **skillfully negotiate your way out of dangerous encounters** using an **innovative battle system**. As one reviewer noted, "Time your offensive maneuvers for maximum impact, and then expertly evade incoming enemy assaults, a mechanic reminiscent of classic top-down shooter games." The game boasts **original artwork and a captivating soundtrack**, both infused with **immense personality**. Prepare for a **deeply engaging, character-driven narrative** that masterfully blends humor and heartfelt moments. Notably, this **ambitious title was primarily developed by a single individual**.

Here's what makes UNDERTALE stand out:

*   **Innovative Combat:** Instead of just fighting, you can negotiate your way out of encounters. This involves timing your attacks and expertly dodging enemy assaults, similar to classic top-down shooter games. As the developer himself stated, "The combat system is designed to be more than just a test of reflexes; it's about understanding your opponent."
*   **Unique Characters and Story:** Forge friendships with every boss you encounter! The game features a deeply engaging, character-driven narrative that masterfully blends humor and heartfelt moments. You even have the option to pursue a romantic relationship with a skeleton. One player described the characters as "unforgettable, each with their own quirks and compelling backstories."
*   **Distinctive Presentation:** The game boasts original artwork and a captivating soundtrack, both infused with immense personality. The music, in particular, has been praised for its ability to evoke strong emotions.
*   **Solo Development:** This ambitious title was primarily developed by a single individual. This feat of independent creation is a testament to the passion and vision behind the game.

The game also features a notable number of canine companions. The exact count can be a bit tricky, but there are at least five dogs. Or perhaps six? I thought I spotted a seventh dog, but it turned out to be the third dog. If you decide to play, could you please help me count the dogs? I'm not very good at it.

Name: FEZ
Description:
Gomez is a 2D creature living in a 2D world. Or is he? When the existence of a mysterious 3rd dimension is revealed to him, Gomez is sent out on a journey that will take him to the very end of time and space. Use your ability to navigate 3D structures from 4 distinct classic 2D perspectives. Explore a serene and beautiful open-ended world full of secrets, puzzles and hidden treasures. Unearth the mysteries of the past and discover the truth about reality and perception. Change your perspective and look at the world in a different way.

Name: Stephen's Sausage Roll
Description:
A simple 3d puzzle game.

**Into the Breach: Advanced Edition - Master Turn-Based Mech Combat**

The acclaimed turn-based strategy game, *Into the Breach*, has received a significant free update: **Into the Breach: Advanced Edition**. This expansion enriches the core gameplay with a wealth of new content. Players can now command **five new mech squads**, each equipped with **nearly forty new weapons**, offering fresh tactical possibilities. The game also introduces heightened challenges, featuring **more formidable enemies**, **tougher bosses**, and **expanded mission objectives**. To further enhance variety, **four new pilots** are available, and the selection of **pilot skills has tripled**. For the ultimate strategic test, an **"Unfair" Mode** has been added, specifically designed to push even the most experienced players to their limits.

In *Into the Breach*, you are thrust into a desperate struggle for survival. The remnants of humanity confront a dire threat from colossal creatures emerging from beneath the earth. To combat this alien menace, you must pilot advanced mechs from the future. Each playthrough presents a **unique, procedurally generated challenge**, demanding meticulous planning and precise execution in this engaging turn-based strategy game, developed by the creators of *FTL*. A crucial element of the game involves **defending civilian structures**, which are essential for powering your mechs. Protecting these buildings from the alien "Vek" while simultaneously engaging them is paramount. The game's straightforward, turn-based combat system reveals enemy attacks in advance, allowing you to carefully analyze their actions and devise the **perfect counter-strategy** each turn. As you battle the Vek across various islands, you will discover **powerful new weapons** and **distinctive pilots** to assemble the ultimate mech force. The game emphasizes that defeat is not the end; if you fail, you can send aid back through time, offering an opportunity to save an alternate timeline.

Factorio is a **highly acclaimed game** where players **design, build, and manage complex factories**. The core gameplay loop involves **mining essential resources**, **researching new technologies**, and **constructing intricate infrastructure**. You'll start by manually crafting basic items like mechanical arms and transport belts, but quickly progress to **automating production** on a massive scale.

As your industrial empire grows, you'll harness the power of **huge solar fields**, implement **oil refining and cracking**, and deploy **construction and logistic robots** to manage your ever-increasing resource demands. However, this **intense exploitation of the planet's resources** doesn't go unnoticed by the native inhabitants. Be prepared to **defend your burgeoning machine empire** from hostile forces.

Factorio offers a rich multiplayer experience, allowing you to **join forces with other players in cooperative multiplayer**. Together, you can **create colossal factories**, **collaborate on complex projects**, and **delegate tasks** among friends. The game's **ground-up modding support** is a significant draw, enabling content creators worldwide to develop a vast array of mods. These range from **small quality-of-life tweaks** to **complete game overhauls**, offering endless possibilities to enhance your enjoyment.

While the **freeplay scenario** provides the core sandbox experience, Factorio also features a variety of **engaging challenges in the form of Scenarios**. If these don't capture your interest, you can unleash your creativity with the **in-game Map Editor**. Here, you can **place entities, enemies, and terrain** exactly as you envision, and even **add custom scripts** to craft unique gameplay experiences.

Regarding pricing, the developers have stated, "We don't have any plans to take part in a sale or to reduce the price for the foreseeable future."

Here's what players and notable figures have said about Factorio:

*   "No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly." - **Reddit**
*   "I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately." - **Notch, Mojang**
*   "Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens." - **Zisteau, Youtube**

Name: The Making of Karateka
Description:
Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

**Nuclear Throne** is a **post-apocalyptic top-down shooter** where you'll explore a **wasteland** devoid of humans, now ruled by **mutants and monsters**.

Your journey involves collecting **powerful weapons** and harnessing **radiation**. This radiation is key, as it allows you to gain **game-changing mutations**. These mutations can manifest as **new abilities** or **physical alterations**, significantly impacting your playstyle.

The ultimate goal is to **survive the wasteland's dangers** and **reach the Nuclear Throne**.

**"There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension"** is a **hilarious point-and-click adventure** that playfully defies expectations. Instead of a traditional gaming experience, this title actively tries to stop you from playing, creating a unique challenge where you must outsmart the game itself to progress.

This **unconventional game** offers a distinct experience, characterized by its:

*   **Simple point-and-click controls**
*   **Unique visual style** featuring charming 3D graphics cleverly mimicking a flat, pixelated look
*   **Almost entirely voiced dialogue**, with a few foreign accents contributing to its comedic effect

Prepare for **clever puzzles** that demand out-of-the-box thinking. A **helpful hint system** is readily available. This adventure is **surprisingly short**, making it a perfect choice for a quick and satisfying gaming experience.

Key features that make this game stand out include:

*   Discovery of **quirky in-game elements**, such as the "Top 10 best walls."
*   **Comfortable, motion sickness-free gameplay**.
*   **Plenty of intentional "bugs"** that are integral to the game's design and humor.

If you're intrigued by this **unusual and seemingly pointless video game**, **"There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension"** is definitely worth a try.

**Dead Cells: A RogueVania Experience**

If you're looking for a game that blends the best of roguelikes and Metroidvania titles, **Dead Cells** delivers a unique **RogueVania** experience. It masterfully combines modern roguelite elements with classic Metroidvania design, creating a gameplay loop that might remind you of games like *Rogue Legacy* and *Castlevania: Symphony of the Night*.

**Dead Cells** features several key gameplay elements:

*   **RogueVania Gameplay:** This core mechanic merges **progressive exploration of an interconnected world** with the **replayability of a rogue-lite**. The constant threat of **permadeath** ensures each playthrough is fresh and challenging, requiring players to adapt and learn.
*   **2D Souls-lite Action:** Combat in **Dead Cells** is designed to be **tough but fair**, demanding skill and precision. Players can wield **over fifty unique weapons and spells**, each with distinct mechanics. An **emergency panic roll** offers a crucial escape during intense fights.
*   **Nonlinear Progression:** The island in **Dead Cells** offers multiple paths to explore, with areas like the Sewers, Ossuary, and Ramparts presenting unique challenges. **Special permanent abilities** unlock new routes and secrets, allowing players to customize their journey based on their build, play style, or current mood.
*   **Deep Exploration:** The game encourages thorough exploration, with **secret rooms, hidden passages, and breathtaking landscapes** to discover. The **interconnected levels and progressive unlocking of access** incentivize players to explore every corner of the island. This, along with character evolution and permanent weapon upgrades, clearly draws inspiration from Metroidvania titles. Ultimately, however, **player skill is paramount** to success.

Roguelites are defined by continuous improvement, where players transform seemingly insurmountable obstacles into manageable challenges. The **unforgiving combat**, combined with the absence of a safety net, delivers an **adrenaline-pumping ride** with unparalleled replayability.

**Dead Cells** launched out of Early Access on August 7th, 2018, with a robust initial offering:

*   **13 Distinct Levels:** Each level has a unique atmosphere, challenging enemies, and hidden secrets.
*   **4 Challenging Bosses:** Developed by Motion Twin, known for their dedication to a punishing yet rewarding experience.
*   **Approximately 90 Weapons and Skills:** These range from classic melee weapons to devastating ranged attacks and spells.
*   **4 Special Powers:** These act as Metroidvania-style gear locks, opening up new areas and paths.
*   **1 Epic Combat System:** Praised for its responsiveness, fluidity, and depth.
*   **1 Daily Run Mode:** Complete with leaderboards for competitive play.

Players can expect **hours of engaging gameplay**, with completion times typically ranging from 10 to 30 hours or more, heavily influenced by player skill. While **rage quits** might happen, the journey to "git gud" in **Dead Cells** is ultimately a rewarding one.

*Portal 2* builds on the success of its predecessor, the award-winning puzzle game *Portal*. The original *Portal* received over 70 industry awards and gained a large fanbase. This sequel expands on its innovative gameplay, engaging story, and memorable music.

The single-player campaign in *Portal 2* introduces new characters and fresh puzzle mechanics in larger, more challenging test chambers. Players will explore new areas of Aperture Science Labs and encounter GLaDOS, the iconic AI from the first game.

*Portal 2* also features a **two-player cooperative mode**. This separate campaign has its own story, specialized test chambers, and two new characters. This co-op gameplay requires players to rethink portals, emphasizing **coordinated action** and **collaborative problem-solving**.

**Key aspects of *Portal 2* include:**

*   An **engaging single-player campaign** with a deep story.
*   A **dedicated two-player co-op mode** with its own narrative and mechanics.
*   An **innovative physics engine** for novel challenges.
*   A **unique and memorable original soundtrack**.
*   **Content creation tools** allowing players to design and share custom levels.

## Slay the Princess: A Twisted Fairy Tale of Survival

Prepare for a dark and perilous journey into a secluded cabin where a grim task awaits: the **slaying of a Princess**. The fate of the entire world hinges on your success; failure means its ultimate destruction. This is no ordinary damsel in distress, but a formidable adversary who will employ every tactic imaginable to thwart your mission. You'll face a relentless onslaught of charm, deception, and alluring promises. Succumbing to any of these could lead to your demise, potentially multiple times. The weight of global salvation rests squarely upon your shoulders, demanding unwavering resolve and a steadfast focus on your objective.

The Princess is not a cosmic horror but a seemingly ordinary human with profoundly malevolent intent. Your objective is to **eliminate her for humanity's sake**, a task requiring a sharp mind and unwavering determination. "Any thoughts of romance are not only ill-advised but will undoubtedly lead to dire consequences," warns the game's description. While survival is the hope, be prepared for repeated deaths, underscoring the critical need for caution and unwavering concentration.

This game offers a distinct roleplaying experience, diverging from conventional narratives. It features a **branching storyline** where your dialogue choices and deeply held beliefs profoundly shape your character and the unfolding events. The creators of *Scarlet Hollow* present a **psychological horror visual novel** that masterfully blends dramatic narrative branches with light roleplaying elements.

Immerse yourself in a world brought to life by the impeccable voice talents of Jonathan Sims and Nichole Goodnight, who fully voice-act the game's characters. The visual landscape is equally captivating, boasting **hand-penciled art**. Every background and character sprite is meticulously drawn traditionally with pencil and paper by Ignatz-winning graphic novelist Abby Howard.

Key gameplay mechanics include:

*   **Branching Narrative:** Your decisions and beliefs dictate the course of the story and your character's identity.
*   **Psychological Horror:** Experience a deeply unsettling and suspenseful narrative.
*   **Light RPG Elements:** Engage with mechanics that add depth to your gameplay.
*   **Hand-Penciled Art:** Appreciate the unique and traditional artistic style.
*   **No Time Loops:** The game adheres to a strictly linear progression of time, eschewing any temporal paradoxes or cyclical events.

Portal™ is a groundbreaking single-player game from Valve that challenges players to think differently. Set within the enigmatic Aperture Science Laboratories, this title has been hailed as one of the most innovative games on the horizon, promising gamers hours of truly unique experiences. The core design of Portal is to fundamentally alter how players interact with and understand their surroundings. As Valve stated, the game "will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay." This innovative approach is reminiscent of how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun revolutionized object manipulation, offering new ways to leverage items in any given situation. In Portal, players will need to solve intricate physical puzzles and overcome challenges by strategically opening portals. These portals allow for the seamless movement of both objects and the player character through space, demanding a fresh perspective on environmental interaction.

**Portal™: A Revolutionary Puzzle Experience**

Step into the innovative world of **Portal™**, a single-player game from Valve that redefines puzzle-solving. Developed by **Aperture Science Laboratories**, this title is celebrated for its **unique approach to challenges**.

The game's core mechanic fundamentally changes how you interact with the environment. Much like **Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun** altered object interaction, Portal™ promotes **creative thinking** by manipulating space. To solve the game's physics-based puzzles, players must strategically place portals. This system allows for:

*   **Movement of objects**
*   **Player traversal**
*   **Unforeseen and inventive solutions**

As one critic noted, "**The portal mechanic is a stroke of genius, forcing players to rethink everything they know about navigation.**" This innovative design has earned Portal™ widespread acclaim, marking it as a **major success in the puzzle genre**.

**Grand Theft Auto IV: The Complete Edition: Uncovering Liberty City's Dark Secrets**

**Grand Theft Auto IV: The Complete Edition** offers a **deep dive** into the **gritty reality** of Liberty City. This **vibrant metropolis** is a place where **wealth and social standing are paramount**. For some, it's a **dream destination**; for others, it's a **harsh fight for survival**. The game's story centers on **three unique characters**, each battling their own **ambitions and inner struggles** within this **tough urban environment**.

**Niko Bellic** arrives in America, hoping to **escape his difficult past** and build a **fresh start** in the land of **supposed opportunity**. Meanwhile, **Johnny Klebitz**, a **key member** of the infamous biker group, The Lost, is caught in a **fierce battle for control** over the city's areas. He's engaged in a **brutal turf war** against opposing gangs.

Adding another dimension to the city's intricate narrative is **Luis Lopez**. A **part-time criminal** and **loyal assistant** to the **flashy nightclub owner Tony Prince**, known as "Gay Tony," Luis walks a **dangerous line** between his duties to his **family and friends**. In Liberty City, **loyalty often demands a high cost**.

The **connected lives** of these protagonists lead to **dramatic outcomes**. As they **struggle to survive**, their tales highlight the **constant violence and corruption** that infect this **famous American city**. **Grand Theft Auto IV: The Complete Edition** includes the **highly praised original game** along with the **engaging add-ons**, *The Lost and Damned* and *The Ballad of Gay Tony*, providing a **vast and captivating adventure**.

Borderlands 2 **revolutionizes the "shoot and loot" genre**, plunging players into a sprawling, dynamic world. You'll select one of four distinct Vault Hunters, each boasting unique abilities, to confront formidable foes, deranged psychos, and the oppressive Handsome Jack. The game **shines in its cooperative mode**, allowing up to four players to band together. You can equip each other with an extensive arsenal and embark on a thrilling quest for vengeance.

The game introduces several **core gameplay enhancements**:

*   **Unique Classes:** Choose from four new classes:
    *   **Siren:** Possesses mystical abilities.
    *   **Commando:** A versatile combatant.
    *   **Gunzerker:** Capable of **dual-wielding any two weapons**, offering unparalleled combat flexibility.
    *   **Assassin:** Specializes in stealth and precision.
*   **Extensive Weaponry:** The Gunzerker's ability exemplifies the game's focus on diverse combat. Whether you favor dual machine guns for crowd control, rocket launchers for explosive power, or sniper rifles for pinpoint accuracy, the weapon selection is vast. Other classes provide distinct tactical advantages.
*   **Seamless Cooperative Play:** Enjoy smooth online and LAN drop-in/drop-out options. This feature allows you to join friends mid-game without restarting, fostering a sense of **continuous progression**. All acquired gear is retained across sessions.

The narrative kicks off with your character left for dead in Pandora's frigid landscapes, igniting a **personal quest for revenge**. You will uncover the sinister schemes of the Hyperion Corporation and its ruthless leader, Handsome Jack, who has falsely claimed credit for discovering the Vault. Beyond its **groundbreaking weapon generation**, Borderlands 2 features procedurally generated shields, grenades, Relics, class mods, and more. This results in an astonishing **"87 Bazillion" potential combinations**, a significant leap from its predecessor. Players will traverse new, vibrant regions of Pandora, from frozen tundras to noxious caverns. You will encounter a variety of enemies, including Bullymongs, Stalkers, and Hyperion's robotic forces, all under Jack's command. Please note that Mac and Linux versions are **limited to English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish**.

## DUSK: A Retro Shooter That **Tests Your Skills**

If you're searching for a retro shooter that **evokes the spirit of '90s classics** like Doom, Quake, and Half-Life, **DUSK** is a compelling choice. This game demands **skilled combat and constant vigilance** against relentless threats. The **energetic soundtrack**, composed by metal artist Andrew Hulshult, significantly enhances the game's mood, a sentiment echoed by reviewers.

**Key Elements of DUSK:**

*   **Three Distinct Campaign Chapters**: Each designed with a unique '90s aesthetic.
*   **Relentless Enemy Encounters**: Battle cultists and soldiers while uncovering hidden lore.
*   **A Variety of Classic Weapons**:
    *   Melee options such as sickles and knives.
    *   Ranged weapons including bows and pistols.
    *   Powerful choices like dual shotguns, grenade launchers, and rocket launchers.

**In addition to the main campaign, DUSK offers:**

*   **Endless Survival Mode**: Face increasingly difficult enemy waves to push your limits.
*   **DUSKWorld Arena Multiplayer**: Engage in exciting online matches for competitive player-versus-player combat.

As one reviewer aptly put it, "The gameplay is fast, brutal, and incredibly satisfying," a sentiment frequently highlighted in critiques from outlets such as PC Gamer.

Name: Blind Drive
Description:
Blind Drive is an audio-based, black comedy action arcade game. The entire game is experienced through your ears. You're blindfolded and going against traffic. Cars rushing past, angry drivers yelling at you. Cops on your tail. And a sadistic madman on the phone. Can you do it? Play as Donnie, trying to make a quick buck in a scientific study but quickly finding himself in over his head, cuffed to the wheel and driving blindfolded against traffic. Plus he's late for dinner with Grandma. ** Headphones required ** FEATURES Hyper-immersive 1st-person audio - so good you can play with your eyes closed Fast-paced, 2-button arcade gameplay 27 levels of mayhem including boss fights, secret areas and a very rude G.P.S. Hilarious crime-comedy story with mobsters, dolphins and your angry Grandmother, performed by a full cast of voice actors Minimalistic, jazzy visuals Gamepad support including extra-fine haptics (rumble) Full text-to-speech accessibility - supports NVDA and Windows TTS. Press SHIFT+A to enable

## Fallout 2: A Post-Nuclear Role-Playing Adventure

**Fallout® 2** invites you back to a **vibrant, apocalyptic retro-future**, expanding the role-playing genre beyond typical fantasy settings. Developed by Black Isle Studios, this acclaimed sequel is set eighty years after the original game. You'll step into the shoes of a new protagonist on a **critical quest**: to find the **Garden of Eden Creation Kit (GECK)**. This vital artifact is desperately needed to **revitalize your struggling village**, a goal underscored by sources like IGN.

The wasteland of Fallout 2 is a **treacherous environment**, as detailed in reviews from outlets such as GameSpot. Prepare to face **crippling radiation**, encounter **megalomaniac mutants**, and navigate a world steeped in **lies, deceit, and treachery**. This constant barrage of challenges will test your resolve and prompt introspection about the **true beneficiaries of this post-nuclear society**.

**Mastering your character's skills and traits** is key to success in Fallout 2, a core mechanic highlighted by game design analysis from sites like PC Gamer. The game demands **strategic thinking and resourcefulness** as you strive to endure in a world where the future appears increasingly bleak. Critics at publications like Eurogamer have praised the narrative for emphasizing your **agency in shaping your destiny** within this unforgiving landscape.

In **Saints Row IV**, you step into the shoes of the **President of the United States**. Your mission: **defend Earth from the alien overlord Zinyak**. This game marks a major shift for the series, taking the Saints from street thugs to world leaders. Your main goal is to **free humanity from Zinyak's rule**.

Get ready for an **amazing adventure**. Unlike earlier games like **Saints Row: The Third**, Saints Row IV features the "American (Fever) Dream" system. This lets you **explore space and bend time**. This new feature makes for a **fresh and exciting game** every time you play.

Become the **"Super Hero-in-Chief"** and use **amazing superpowers**. You can fly, use telekinesis to move enemies, and dodge attacks with ease. These are just some of the powers you have to **fight the alien invaders**.

The game also features **"Alien Toys of Destruction."** This includes a unique set of **alien vehicles and weapons**. Use these to explore the large world and, of course, cause plenty of mayhem.

Building on the series' famous character and outfit options, **Saints Row IV adds an advanced weapon customization system**. This lets you turn normal guns into **clever and powerful weapons of destruction**.

Enjoy **exciting co-op play**. The "Dynamic Duo" feature allows for easy **drop-in, drop-out co-op**. Team up with a friend and share the fun of being a super-powered President. As one reviewer put it, the game offers "a truly unique mix of political humor and wild action."

Here's a breakdown of what you can do:

*   **Explore the cosmos and manipulate time.**
*   **Wield extraordinary superpowers** like flight and telekinesis.
*   **Use "Alien Toys of Destruction"** for transport and combat.
*   **Customize weapons** to create devastating tools.
*   **Engage in thrilling cooperative gameplay** with drop-in, drop-out options.

**Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II: Master the Force**

Step into the **Star Wars™ universe** with **Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II**, a groundbreaking first-person shooter that deepens the experience of its predecessor. This title plunges you into a rich 3D world, offering refined gameplay and an expanded arsenal. You play as Kyle Katarn, a character who must reclaim his lightsaber and develop his nascent Force abilities to become a Jedi Knight. Your journey will involve confronting familiar adversaries like Greedo and stormtroopers, but a more significant danger emerges: seven dark Jedi intent on unleashing an ancient evil. Fortunately, your arsenal, featuring **10 distinct weapons** and **over 12 potent Force powers**, provides the means to confront these threats.

The game offers both **engaging single-player campaigns** and **dynamic multiplayer modes**, accessible online or through modem and network connections. Test your skills across **9 diverse multiplayer maps** or embark on the **21 challenging single-player missions**. These environments are rendered in detailed 3D, complete with intricate character animations. A key feature, highlighted in critical reviews, is your character's evolving journey. You have the agency to choose your path, either succumbing to the dark side by confronting **seven unique dark Jedi**, each possessing distinct abilities, or striving for Jedi Knighthood. Will you embrace the rapid, destructive power of the dark side, or patiently train for the light? Mastering the light side involves developing skills to become a true Jedi Knight, wielding your **iconic Lightsaber**, learning **four fundamental apprentice abilities**, and utilizing light side powers such as **healing, persuasion, blinding, and absorption**. Conversely, the dark side grants access to powers like **grip, Force throw, energy bolts, and destruction**, building upon your Jedi training. **Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II** delivers exhilarating Star Wars action with a compelling new narrative, fully compatible with a wide range of 3D graphics cards.

**Star Control III: A Universe in Peril Awaits**

Prepare for **Star Control III**, the epic finale to the renowned Star Control series. Your mission is critical: **protect countless worlds and billions of lives** from impending doom in the Kessari Quadrant. This final chapter combines strategic galactic management with vital diplomatic negotiations, propelling you into an unforgettable journey.

**Star Control III** ventured into new territory and garnered **positive critical reception**. IGN described its approach as offering a "fresh perspective" on the established universe. While some fans had reservations about its experimental nature, many agreed that the game featured a **truly compelling narrative**. This sentiment was echoed by GameSpot reviewers and players alike, regardless of their prior experience with the franchise.

This is your chance to **witness the captivating conclusion** of the Star Control saga. Whether you are a long-time fan, intrigued by the varied reception, or new to the series, **Star Control III** welcomes you to explore its **rich and engaging story**. The game delivers:

*   Unexpected plot developments
*   Memorable characters
*   Unforgettable moments

The **advanced diplomacy system** provides a wide array of options for resolving conflicts. Furthermore, each alien race possesses **distinct characteristics, objectives, and motivations**, significantly enriching your strategic choices. As PC Gamer observed, "The complex network of alien relationships is a standout feature, compelling players to carefully consider every diplomatic action."

**Her Story: A Deep Dive into a Groundbreaking Crime Fiction Game**

**Her Story**, a pioneering crime fiction game from developer Sam Barlow, delivers a **truly unique narrative experience**. Barlow, acclaimed for his work on games like *Silent Hill: Shattered Memories*, has crafted a title that **revolutionizes non-linear storytelling**. The game centers on a **comprehensive police database containing live-action video footage**, featuring a compelling performance by actress Viva Seifert.

The **gameplay mechanics of Her Story place you directly in the role of an investigator**. You'll navigate a **simulated, retro desktop computer interface** to access a police database. This archive holds **seven interview sessions conducted in 1994**. In these recordings, a British woman is interrogated regarding her husband's disappearance. To **solve the central mystery**, you must actively query the database using keywords. The system then **presents video clips** where the interviewee utters words matching your search terms. Your objective is to **reconstruct her account** by meticulously analyzing these clips. **Her Story** distinguishes itself from conventional games by providing an **absorbing and emotionally resonant journey** that rewards **close observation and keen analytical skills**.

Key aspects of the gameplay include:

*   **Investigating a simulated police database:** Accessing and searching through video interviews.
*   **Keyword-based video retrieval:** Using search terms to find relevant clips.
*   **Piecing together a narrative:** Assembling the story from fragmented video evidence.
*   **Deductive reasoning:** Applying logic to understand the events and motivations.

**Command & Conquer 3: Tiberium Wars - A New Era of Real-Time Strategy**

The year is 2047, and the world is engulfed by the devastating Third Tiberium War. This conflict marks the triumphant return of the groundbreaking Real-Time Strategy (RTS) franchise, Command & Conquer. Set in the familiar Tiberium Universe, the game plunges players into a future where the corrupting substance Tiberium has spread across most of the Earth.

The infamous Kane has resurfaced, leading his Brotherhood of Nod in a relentless global assault against the Global Defense Initiative (GDI) and the few remaining habitable Blue Zones. As Commander, the fate of the planet rests in your hands. Command & Conquer 3: Tiberium Wars promises to redefine RTS gaming with its cutting-edge, next-generation graphics, an epic narrative, and innovative features.

**Gameplay and Features:**

Experience the signature fast, fluid, and fun gameplay that Command & Conquer is renowned for, now more refined than ever. The intuitive interface puts your entire arsenal at your fingertips, ensuring seamless control.

*   **Extensive Single-Player Campaign:** Embark on over 35 single-player missions across a vast, open-world theater of war. Every decision you make impacts the cohesive, epic story, which is told from the unique perspectives of all three warring factions.
*   **Cinematic Storytelling:** Immerse yourself in a narrative brought to life by high-definition, live-action video sequences. The game features a diverse Hollywood cast, with actors from popular franchises like *Star Wars*, *Starship Troopers*, *Battlestar Galactica*, and *LOST*. Joe Kucan also returns as the iconic Kane.
*   **Adaptive AI:** Challenge yourself with an AI that adapts to your playstyle. Choose from tactical approaches like 'rushing' or 'turtling,' or let the AI devise its own strategies for a truly dynamic experience.
*   **Innovative Combat Mechanics:** Keep your opponents on their toes with new offensive capabilities. Deploy flying battleships, unleash the power of Ion Storms, and combine units to create formidable super-units.
*   **Dynamic Battlefield:** Witness a world brought to life by advanced technology. Enjoy stunning visual effects, including reflected sunlight, detailed explosions, and atmospheric elements like smoke, fire, haze, and tracers. State-of-the-art weather effects further enhance the immersive battlefield.
*   **Evolved User Interface:** The fully evolved side-bar interface allows for complete base management without ever leaving the action, ensuring a smooth and uninterrupted gameplay experience.

**Investigating Deception: A Deep Dive into *Telling Lies***

Explore the **intricate world of *Telling Lies***, a **unique investigative thriller** developed by Sam Barlow, known for his work on *Her Story* and *Silent Hill: Shattered Memories*. This **innovative title** casts you as an investigator tasked with **uncovering hidden truths** by examining **private, recorded conversations**. The game offers a **truly non-linear story**, requiring you to **assemble scattered video fragments** to grasp the unfolding events. A **talented ensemble cast**, featuring Logan Marshall-Green, Alexandra Shipp, Kerry Bishé, and Angela Sarafyan, brings to life four characters whose lives become **deeply connected**.

Within **_Telling Lies_**, your main interface is a **virtual laptop**, granting access to a **stolen NSA database** filled with video evidence. These **vast recordings cover a two-year period**, capturing **unfiltered moments** from the lives of the four main characters. Their separate stories converge, pointing towards a **significant central event** that you must **uncover through dedicated investigation**. To find relevant videos, you'll use a **robust search engine**. **Enter keywords**, and the game will display clips where those words are spoken. By **closely analyzing these dialogue segments**, your goal is to **rebuild the full story** and **reveal the truth** of what happened. As one reviewer noted, the game provides an experience that is "**intimate and intensely engaging**," allowing players to "**define your own version of reality**."

Embark on an extraordinary journey into **Riven**, a world **torn apart** by ongoing, unresolved conflicts. This realm of unparalleled beauty and intricate intrigue invites you to explore its depths. As you venture through **vast, awe-inspiring landscapes**, you'll witness clouds nestled in a deep blue sky and rolling sea waters shimmering under the bright morning sunlight. However, a crucial **warning** accompanies this breathtaking scenery: nothing is quite as it seems.

The land is populated by **reclusive beings and mysterious creatures**, and **deep, dark secrets lie hidden at every turn**. To accomplish the most elusive task, you will need to employ your **utmost powers of observation and reason**.

You must allow **Riven to become your world**; only through this complete immersion can the truth be discovered and a world be saved. **Riven stands as a timeless story**, evoking a profound sense of awe, wonder, and purpose. Prepare yourself for an experience in **Riven – a world unlike any you've ever known**.

Name: Myst III: Exile
Description:
'The idea that someone may be linking into my study, reading all of my books, disturbs me...' Experience the stunning sequel to Myst and Riven, a complex tale of betrayal and revenge that only you can successfully unravel. Myst III: Exile plunges you into an adventure so real, you'll forget it's a game. - Five entirely new Ages to explore - Hours of new mysteries to uncover - Dramatic new storyline - Free-look Movement System - View 360° at every location - Rich music and riveting cinematics

Experience the **Command & Conquer™ Remastered Collection**, a definitive revival of two legendary real-time strategy (RTS) games: **Command & Conquer** and **Red Alert**. This collection, crafted by Petroglyph Games with former Westwood Studios veterans, offers a **stunning 4K visual upgrade**, honoring the games that shaped the RTS genre.

This package includes:

*   **All three original expansion packs**, updated for today's players.
*   **Revamped multiplayer** with a new mode.
*   A **streamlined modern interface**.
*   A powerful **Map Editor** for endless creativity.
*   A **Bonus Gallery** with over four hours of exclusive behind-the-scenes content.

The **iconic soundtrack** is expanded to over seven hours of remastered music. This includes twenty tracks re-recorded live by the original composer, Frank Klepacki. As Klepacki stated, "We wanted to ensure this remaster felt true to the original while also bringing it up to current standards."

Gameplay enhancements include:

*   **Seamless graphics switching** to toggle between classic and 4K visuals in solo play.
*   **Upscaled full-motion video cinematics** to refresh the narratives.
*   An **enhanced Sidebar UI** for better usability.
*   A **Jukebox** to create your own music playlists.
*   **Custom game lobbies** to set your own rules.
*   **1v1 Quickmatches** to climb the **Leaderboard**.
*   **Replays and Observer Mode** for analyzing strategy.
*   Original **console missions on PC**, with their **original console cinematics**.
*   **Camera zoom** for tactical views.
*   **Skirmish Mode** with AI challenges and adjustable difficulty.
*   **Customizable hotkeys** that work with the new interface.

The beloved **EVA voice-over** was re-recorded by its original actress, Kia Huntzinger. **Control improvements** feature updated mouse functions and unit queueing.

The collection offers:

*   Over 100 campaign missions.
*   250 multiplayer maps.
*   Helpful tooltips.
*   Accessibility options.
*   Quicksave/autosave.
*   Subtitles.
*   Multi-language text support.

Voice-overs are in English, French, and German. The Steam version adds achievements, friends list integration, trading cards, and Workshop support.

**Command & Conquer: Red Alert 3**

**Command & Conquer: Red Alert 3** plunges players into an alternate reality born from a Soviet attempt to **rewrite history**. Their mission to restore Mother Russia's glory backfires, fracturing the timeline and igniting World War III. This new world features a **radically different technological evolution** and the rise of a **new global superpower**.

The conflict escalates into a **three-way global war** with the emergence of the formidable **Empire of the Rising Sun** from the East. This epic struggle pits the Soviets and the Allies against the technologically advanced Empire. Players will command armies equipped with a variety of unique and imaginative units:

*   **Tesla coils**
*   **Heavily armed War Blimps**
*   **Teleportation devices**
*   **Armored bears**
*   **Intelligent dolphins**
*   **Floating island fortresses**
*   **Transforming tanks**

**Star-Studded Storytelling** returns with Command & Conquer's signature live-action videos, now in stunning HD. Featuring over 60 minutes of footage and the **largest cast in the franchise's history**, the narrative is more engaging than ever.

**Command the Seas, Conquer the World!** For the first time, **naval warfare is paramount**, holding equal importance to land and air dominance. Players must seize strategic advantages by controlling vital sea resources and launch **devastating three-pronged attacks** from all directions.

**Ready your Man Cannons!** Alongside classic Red Alert units like Sonic Dolphins, Tesla Troopers, Attack Dogs, and Tanya, new forces join the fray:

*   **Armored War Bears**
*   **Anime-inspired psychic school girls**

A **New Threat From the East** arrives in the form of the deadly Empire of the Rising Sun. This **technological terror** draws inspiration from anime, science-fiction, martial arts, and robot culture. The Empire's **futuristic units can transform into alternate forms** and excel in **specialized naval warfare**.

**Not For Broadcast: Take Control of the National Nightly News**

In the darkly comedic simulation game, *Not For Broadcast*, you step into the **critical role of editor** for the National Nightly News. This unique experience places the **power to shape public perception** directly into your hands. As you navigate a world rife with sensationalism and political intrigue, your editorial decisions determine what the nation witnesses, influencing everything from celebrity scandals to the narratives surrounding dishonest politicians. Developed by **NotGames**, the game challenges players to maintain audience engagement while simultaneously balancing sponsor demands and the immense pressures of a live broadcast.

Your primary objective is to ensure the show runs seamlessly, a task demanding **quick, decisive actions**. You will be rapidly switching camera feeds, adjusting on-screen headlines, and **censoring inappropriate language** – all under the intense pressure of a live broadcast. As one player aptly described the experience, "You are the artist and the broadcast is your canvas." This creative control empowers you to frame debates and keep the public entertained. The game prominently features the "**big red CENSOR button**," a vital tool for removing offensive words and sensitive content, ensuring suitability for all viewers, even within politically oppressive environments.

Beyond editorial control, managing sponsorships is crucial for the broadcast's financial viability. While your influence is significant, the game humorously acknowledges financial realities. As one character wryly observes, "they’re really not paying you enough here." You can opt for slightly questionable sponsors to boost income, adding another layer of dark comedy to the gameplay. The game's disclaimers further emphasize this point, warning, "**Customer satisfaction is not guaranteed and absolutely no refunds.**"

*Not For Broadcast* bombards players with a barrage of bizarre events, from category 5 storms to existential threats, all while demanding the broadcast must continue. The game encourages a resilient, albeit darkly humorous, approach, advising players to "**keep them laughing as you go**," even when the news is grim. Amidst discussions of war and overwhelming politics, the in-game advice is to "tune out the chaos, turn up the ads, and whatever you do, don’t listen in on the increasingly panicked chatter of the news crew behind the scenes." After all, as the game sarcastically concludes, "**Everything’s fine.**" Critics, such as **IGN**, have lauded the game's distinctive fusion of humor and challenging gameplay.
